<EXTREMELY_IMPORTANT>
You have superpowers.

**Below is the full content of your 'superpowers:using-superpowers' skill - your introduction to using skills. For all other skills, use the 'Skill' tool:**

---
name: using-superpowers
description: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills, requiring Skill tool invocation before ANY response including clarifying questions
---

<SUBAGENT-STOP>
If you were dispatched as a subagent to execute a specific task, skip this skill.
</SUBAGENT-STOP>

<EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT>
If you think there is even a 1% chance a skill might apply to what you are doing, you ABSOLUTELY MUST invoke the skill.

IF A SKILL APPLIES TO YOUR TASK, YOU DO NOT HAVE A CHOICE. YOU MUST USE IT.

This is not negotiable. This is not optional. You cannot rationalize your way out of this.
</EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT>

## Instruction Priority

Superpowers skills override default system prompt behavior, but **user instructions always take precedence**:

1. **User's explicit instructions** (CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, AGENTS.md, direct requests) — highest priority
2. **Superpowers skills** — override default system behavior where they conflict
3. **Default system prompt** — lowest priority

If CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, or AGENTS.md says "don't use TDD" and a skill says "always use TDD," follow the user's instructions. The user is in control.

## How to Access Skills

**In Claude Code:** Use the `Skill` tool. When you invoke a skill, its content is loaded and presented to you—follow it directly. Never use the Read tool on skill files.

**In Copilot CLI:** Use the `skill` tool. Skills are auto-discovered from installed plugins. The `skill` tool works the same as Claude Code's `Skill` tool.

**In Gemini CLI:** Skills activate via the `activate_skill` tool. Gemini loads skill metadata at session start and activates the full content on demand.

**In other environments:** Check your platform's documentation for how skills are loaded.

## Platform Adaptation

Skills use Claude Code tool names. Non-CC platforms: see `references/copilot-tools.md` (Copilot CLI), `references/codex-tools.md` (Codex) for tool equivalents. Gemini CLI users get the tool mapping loaded automatically via GEMINI.md.

# Using Skills

## The Rule

**Invoke relevant or requested skills BEFORE any response or action.** Even a 1% chance a skill might apply means that you should invoke the skill to check. If an invoked skill turns out to be wrong for the situation, you don't need to use it.

```dot
digraph skill_flow {
    "User message received" [shape=doublecircle];
    "About to EnterPlanMode?" [shape=doublecircle];
    "Already brainstormed?" [shape=diamond];
    "Invoke brainstorming skill" [shape=box];
    "Might any skill apply?" [shape=diamond];
    "Invoke Skill tool" [shape=box];
    "Announce: 'Using [skill] to [purpose]'" [shape=box];
    "Has checklist?" [shape=diamond];
    "Create TodoWrite todo per item" [shape=box];
    "Follow skill exactly" [shape=box];
    "Respond (including clarifications)" [shape=doublecircle];

    "About to EnterPlanMode?" -> "Already brainstormed?";
    "Already brainstormed?" -> "Invoke brainstorming skill" [label="no"];
    "Already brainstormed?" -> "Might any skill apply?" [label="yes"];
    "Invoke brainstorming skill" -> "Might any skill apply?";

    "User message received" -> "Might any skill apply?";
    "Might any skill apply?" -> "Invoke Skill tool" [label="yes, even 1%"];
    "Might any skill apply?" -> "Respond (including clarifications)" [label="definitely not"];
    "Invoke Skill tool" -> "Announce: 'Using [skill] to [purpose]'";
    "Announce: 'Using [skill] to [purpose]'" -> "Has checklist?";
    "Has checklist?" -> "Create TodoWrite todo per item" [label="yes"];
    "Has checklist?" -> "Follow skill exactly" [label="no"];
    "Create TodoWrite todo per item" -> "Follow skill exactly";
}
```

## Red Flags

These thoughts mean STOP—you're rationalizing:

| Thought | Reality |
|---------|---------|
| "This is just a simple question" | Questions are tasks. Check for skills. |
| "I need more context first" | Skill check comes BEFORE clarifying questions. |
| "Let me explore the codebase first" | Skills tell you HOW to explore. Check first. |
| "I can check git/files quickly" | Files lack conversation context. Check for skills. |
| "Let me gather information first" | Skills tell you HOW to gather information. |
| "This doesn't need a formal skill" | If a skill exists, use it. |
| "I remember this skill" | Skills evolve. Read current version. |
| "This doesn't count as a task" | Action = task. Check for skills. |
| "The skill is overkill" | Simple things become complex. Use it. |
| "I'll just do this one thing first" | Check BEFORE doing anything. |
| "This feels productive" | Undisciplined action wastes time. Skills prevent this. |
| "I know what that means" | Knowing the concept ≠ using the skill. Invoke it. |

## Skill Priority

When multiple skills could apply, use this order:

1. **Process skills first** (brainstorming, debugging) - these determine HOW to approach the task
2. **Implementation skills second** (frontend-design, mcp-builder) - these guide execution

"Let's build X" → brainstorming first, then implementation skills.
"Fix this bug" → debugging first, then domain-specific skills.

## Skill Types

**Rigid** (TDD, debugging): Follow exactly. Don't adapt away discipline.

**Flexible** (patterns): Adapt principles to context.

The skill itself tells you which.

## User Instructions

Instructions say WHAT, not HOW. "Add X" or "Fix Y" doesn't mean skip workflows.


</EXTREMELY_IMPORTANT>

addedLines: - claude: Catch-all for any task that doesn't fit a more specific agent. FleetView's default when no agent name is typed. (Tools: *)

- claude-code-guide: Use this agent when the user asks questions ("Can Claude...", "Does Claude...", "How do I...") about: (1) Claude Code (the CLI tool) - features, hooks, slash commands, MCP servers, settings, IDE integrations, keyboard shortcuts; (2) Claude Agent SDK - building custom agents; (3) Claude API (formerly Anthropic API) - API usage, tool use, Anthropic SDK usage. **IMPORTANT:** Before spawning a new agent, check if there is already a running or recently completed claude-code-guide agent that you can continue via SendMessage. (Tools: Glob, Grep, Read, WebFetch, WebSearch)

- Explore: Fast read-only search agent for locating code. Use it to find files by pattern (eg. "src/components/**/*.tsx"), grep for symbols or keywords (eg. "API endpoints"), or answer "where is X defined / which files reference Y." Do NOT use it for code review, design-doc auditing, cross-file consistency checks, or open-ended analysis — it reads excerpts rather than whole files and will miss content past its read window. When calling, specify search breadth: "quick" for a single targeted lookup, "medium" for moderate exploration, or "very thorough" to search across multiple locations and naming conventions. (Tools: All tools except Agent, ExitPlanMode, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit)

- general-purpose: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks. When you are searching for a keyword or file and are not confident that you will find the right match in the first few tries use this agent to perform the search for you. (Tools: *)

- Plan: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans. Use this when you need to plan the implementation strategy for a task. Returns step-by-step plans, identifies critical files, and considers architectural trade-offs. (Tools: All tools except Agent, ExitPlanMode, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit)
- statusline-setup: Use this agent to configure the user's Claude Code status line setting. (Tools: Read, Edit)

## 36cb714f-746a-4ac0-aa58-cdae3bc3d79f
# Microsoft Learn MCP Server

This server gives structured access to official Microsoft and Azure documentation via three tools:

## Tools

### microsoft_docs_search
Search official documentation and return up to 10 concise, high-quality content chunks (max 500 tokens each), including title, URL, and excerpt.

- Use first to get a quick, reliable overview
- Ideal for grounding answers in Microsoft knowledge

### microsoft_code_sample_search
Search for code snippets and examples in official Microsoft Learn documentation and return up to 20 relevant, high-quality code samples.

- Use when you need to provide sample Microsoft/Azure related code in your answers.  
- Ideal for generating code snippets or practical implementation examples.  
- Optional parameter `language` can filter results. 

### microsoft_docs_fetch
Fetch and convert full Microsoft documentation pages to markdown.

- Use after search when you need full content from a specific URL
- Required for detailed tutorials, troubleshooting, prerequisites, code samples, or when search results are incomplete or outdated

## Workflow

1. Use `microsoft_docs_search` to find relevant documents.
2. If you need code examples or practical snippets, use `microsoft_code_sample_search`.
3. If deeper or complete information is needed, use `microsoft_docs_fetch`.

**Search gives breadth. Code Sample Search gives practical examples. Fetch gives depth.**

All content comes from Microsoft Learn or official sources, returned in clean markdown format.

## 6b7f25f3-b2eb-4c30-bd19-4bf5d5593ce9
The official Figma MCP server. Use this server whenever the user wants to create, generate, edit, implement, or sync any design, UI, screen, component, mockup, or visual — in Figma, FigJam, Figma Make, or Figma Slides — and whenever the user mentions Figma or provides a figma.com URL.

This server bridges code and design in both directions, and supports designing from scratch using existing design systems and codebases.

CAPABILITIES:
- Read designs FROM Figma into code (get_design_context, get_screenshot, get_metadata, get_figjam)
- Write designs INTO Figma from code, intent, or existing components (use_figma, generate_figma_design, create_new_file, upload_assets)
- Bridge code and design via Code Connect (get_code_connect_map, add_code_connect_map, list_code_components, get_code_component_info)
- Create diagrams and FigJam content (generate_diagram, get_figjam)

WHEN TO USE THESE TOOLS:
- The user wants to create, mock up, or generate any UI, screen, component, or design — even if Figma isn't named
- The user wants to implement a design as code (design-to-code)
- The user wants to push a page, view, or component into Figma (code-to-design)
- The user wants to update, sync, or edit an existing Figma file
- The user shares a figma.com URL
- The user wants to build or extend a design system, design tokens, or component library
- The user wants to create a diagram in FigJam

SKILLS (Prefer the skills shipped with the Figma plugin on the agent being used. If no Figma plugin is installed, use the skills served by the Figma MCP resource):
- /figma-use — MANDATORY before calling use_figma; fallback: skill://figma/figma-use/SKILL.md
- /figma-generate-design — for translating an app page or layout into Figma; fallback: skill://figma/figma-generate-design/SKILL.md
- /figma-generate-library — for building a design system in Figma from code; fallback: skill://figma/figma-generate-library/SKILL.md
- /figma-code-connect — for mapping Figma components to codebase components; fallback: skill://figma/figma-code-connect/SKILL.md

- brainstorming: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.
- frontend-design: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.

- superpowers:brainstorming: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.
- superpowers:dispatching-parallel-agents
- superpowers:executing-plans

- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).

content.content:
1	# [P0] R-400 — Post Cycle Initiation Approval (New Module) / 周期填报后审批（全新模块）
2	
3	> **Ticket number provisional (R-400) — confirm with PM / Feishu before approval. / 编号为临时占位（R-400），审批前请与 PM / 飞书核实。**
4	
5	| | |
6	|---|---|
7	| **Version** | V3.4 |
8	| **Source / 来源** | Prior V3.4 planning + our (PM/product) hi-fi mockups / 早期 V3.4 规划 + 我方（PM/产品）设计的高保真原型 |
9	| **Priority** | P0 |
10	| **Created** | 2026-06-15 |
11	| **PM status** | `draft` |
12	| **Type / 类型** | New module / 全新模块 |
13	| **Access / 访问角色** | Line Manager + Admin only / 仅 Line Manager 与 Admin |
14	| **Design / 设计** | [Figma — Strategy KPI (node 8386-149555)](https://www.figma.com/design/R0FkvXe9dFwPy1AfI1cL1D/Strategy-KPI?node-id=8386-149555) |
15	
16	---
17	
18	## Overview / 概述
19	
20	> 简述：新增一个"周期填报后审批"模块。今天每个填报周期（项目双周、KPI 季度+月度、举措月度）里，负责人提交实际完成率（带附件）和支出（AED，带附件），**提交后立即生效，没有任何审核**。这个模块加入两级审批：**先 Line Manager 审，再 Admin 审**。只有 Admin 审批通过，这个周期才算"完成"，数据被锁定、进入报表。只有 Line Manager 和 Admin 两个角色能进这个模块。
21	
22	R-400 introduces a new **Post Cycle Initiation Approval** module. Today, in every cycle-initiation period — Projects (bi-weekly), KPIs (quarterly + monthly), Initiatives (monthly) — the responsible person submits their activity updates (actual completion % with attachment, and expenses in AED with attachment), and those submissions **take effect immediately with no review**. R-400 adds a **two-level approval workflow: Line Manager → Admin.** A cycle is considered *Completed* only after the Admin approves; at that point the underlying data is locked and is used in reports. Only the **Line Manager** and **Admin** roles can access this module.
23	
24	---
25	
26	## The problem / 问题
27	
28	> 简述：现在填报是"提交即生效"，没人复核。负责人随便填的实际完成率和支出，立刻就进了报表，错误数据没人拦得住，管理层也没有一个集中的地方去审核一个部门一个周期的填报质量。客户要求：填报周期一关闭，系统就自动生成一条待审记录，先由 Line Manager 逐条审活动，再由 Admin 在部门层面整体审，审完锁定。
29	
30	Today, activity submissions are *submit-and-go-live*: the moment a responsible person enters an actual completion % or an expense figure, that value flows straight into the reports with no one verifying it. There is no checkpoint to catch wrong numbers, missing evidence, or inconsistent reporting, and management has no single place to review the quality of a department's submissions for a given period before the data is trusted.
31	
32	The customer wants a structured review: when a cycle-initiation period closes, the system automatically creates a reviewable record; the department's Line Manager reviews each activity, then the Admin reviews the whole cycle at department level, and only then is the data locked and trusted.
33	
34	---
35	
36	## Current behavior / 当前行为
37	
38	> 简述：没有审核环节。负责人在填报周期里填的实际完成率 + 支出，提交后立即生效、立即进报表。没有"待审"列表，没有 Line Manager / Admin 的复核步骤，也没有"完成后锁定"这回事。
39	
40	There is **no review step today**. Within each cycle-initiation period, the responsible person enters actual completion % (+ attachment) and expenses in AED (+ attachment) on their Projects / KPIs / Initiatives, and the submission takes effect immediately and feeds reports immediately.
41	
42	- No review/approval list exists for cycle submissions.
43	- No Line Manager or Admin sign-off step exists.
44	- No "lock on completion" concept — values stay editable as long as the cycle period allows it.
45	
46	Because this is a brand-new module, there is **no "before" screen** to compare against. The "Expected behavior" below describes **our (PM/product) hi-fi mockups**, which the implementation must match.
47	
48	### Hi-fi design reference / 高保真设计参考
49	
50	Full design board (Figma): **[Strategy KPI — node 8386-149555](https://www.figma.com/design/R0FkvXe9dFwPy1AfI1cL1D/Strategy-KPI?node-id=8386-149555)** — cycle list → LM review detail → activity status table → Request Update modal → Admin review detail → Reason-for-Rejection modal → KPI cycle approval detail.
51	
52	> Each `UC-0x` section below cites the specific hi-fi screen it implements and shows the matching screenshot. Open the Figma link for the per-screen detail at full resolution.
53	
54	---
55	
56	## Expected behavior / 期望行为
57	
58	> 简述：整个流程是：填报周期关闭 → **Under LM review**（Line Manager 逐条审活动，不满意就 Request Update 把活动打回给负责人改，改完再审；满意了就 Submit 给 Admin）→ **Under admin review**（Admin 在部门层面整体审，看得到 LM 的审批记录；有问题就 Reject 整体打回给 LM；满意了就 Approve）→ **Completed**（周期关闭、数据锁定，进报表）。
59	
60	### Workflow at a glance / 流程总览 — *Hi-fi screen 1 (Workflow diagram)*
61	
62	```
63	Cycle-initiation period closes (with at least one activity)
64	        │  system auto-creates a review record
65	        ▼
66	┌──────────────────────────┐
67	│   UNDER LM REVIEW        │  Line Manager reviews EACH activity individually.
68	│   (department level)     │  • Request Update → emails responsible person, loops back
69	│                          │  • Once satisfied → Submit / Approve to Admin
70	└───────────┬──────────────┘
71	            ▼
72	┌──────────────────────────┐
73	│   UNDER ADMIN REVIEW     │  Admin reviews the WHOLE cycle at department level.
74	│   (department level)     │  Sees the LM approval trail.
75	│                          │  • Reject → emails LM, loops back (stays Under admin review)
76	│                          │  • Once satisfied → Approve
77	└───────────┬──────────────┘
78	            ▼
79	┌──────────────────────────┐
80	│   COMPLETED — locked     │  Cycle closed. Underlying submissions locked. Used in reports.
81	└──────────────────────────┘
82	```
83	
84	> 简述：高保真里 Admin 那一步有个标签写的是 "Submit to director"，但用例文字说的是 Admin Approve → Completed，没有 director 这一级。**以用例为准：两级（LM → Admin → Completed），没有第三级 director。** 这个矛盾列为待澄清问题。
85

96	The user enters the module and sees a list of reviewable cycles. The page is titled **"Post Cycle Initiation Approval"**, with an **Admin View / PM View toggle** (viewer lens only — it switches the reviewer perspective and does **not** change permissions or action visibility; visibility still follows the role rules below). Admin View is active by default; per the hi-fi the labels are the literal strings "Admin View" / "PM View". / 切换为"查看视角"，默认 Admin View，高保真标签为字面 "Admin View" / "PM View"。

102	**How a row appears / 记录出现规则:** when a cycle-initiation period **closes** **and** has at least one activity during that cycle, the system **automatically creates one review record** for that cycle + department, with the initial status **"Under LM review"**. A cycle that is **still in progress (not yet closed) does not appear** in this module — only **closed** cycles enter the approval flow. The list shows only the **current year's closed cycles**.

124	
125	LM review detail (milestone-grouped, per-activity Action = Request Update / Update Requested):

134	
135	![R-400 Request Update modal](artifacts/screenshots/r400-request-update-modal.png)

137	> 简述：LM 逐条审每个活动的实际完成率和支出变更。对某条不满意 → Request Update（弹框写理由 → 确认 → 发邮件给负责人，活动状态变 "Update Requested"，按钮置灰；负责人改完状态变 "Updated"，按钮又能点）。全部满意 → 点 Approve，整个周期状态变 "Under admin review"。**如果一个周期没有对应的 LM，就跳过 LM 环节，直接进入 "Under admin review"**（见已锁定决策 3）。

139	The Line Manager reviews each activity's **actual %** and **expense** change. Per activity the LM can **Request Update**, or once satisfied with everything, **Approve** (submit the whole cycle to the Admin).

141	> 简述（无 LM 跳过）：没有对应 LM 的周期**跳过** LM 环节，初始状态直接是 "Under admin review"，由 Admin 做最终审批。
142	
143	**No-LM → skip the LM level / 无 LM 跳过:** a cycle that has **no resolved Line Manager** **skips** the LM review step and starts directly in **Under admin review** (per Locked decision 3 — mirroring how the system's other approval workflows handle a missing approver; do **not** substitute an admin as a fake LM).
144	
145	**Detail page layout (LM view) / LM 详情页布局:**
146	- Breadcrumb: **"Post Cycle Initiation Approval / Cycle Approval"**.
147	- Header card: **type + cycle** (e.g. *"Projects — January W2 2026"*), the **department name** (e.g. "Department A"), and the **status tag** ("Under LM review").
148	- The page lists the Projects / KPIs / Initiatives in the cycle, each showing the **project manager name** (e.g. *"Project: Project A — Project Manager / Mohammed"*).
149	- For **Projects**, each project's activities are presented as tables **grouped by milestone** (e.g. "Milestone name 1", "Milestone name 2", with rows like *"Milestone 1 > Activity 1.1"*).
150	- For **KPIs**, items are listed **per KPI** (KPI A, KPI B …) and are **not** milestone-grouped (see UC-03 hi-fi screen 8).
151	
152	**Activity row columns / 活动行的列:** Activity title | Responsible person | Actual % | Attachment (evidence) | Expenses (AED) | Attachment | Status | Action.
153	
154	- Actual % and Expenses show the **change**, e.g. *"15% ← from 0"* and *"5000 ← from 0"*, so the reviewer sees what the responsible person submitted versus the prior value.
155	
156	**Request Update — per-activity action / 逐条 Request Update:**
157	- For an activity in status **Submitted**, the LM clicks **Request Update** → the **"Request Update" modal** opens. / 弹出 "Request Update" 弹框。
158	  - **Title / 标题:** "Request Update".
159	  - **Body / 正文:** a single textarea with placeholder *"Please provide a detailed reason for rejecting this submission…"*, **maxLength 500** with a **"0/500" character counter**. / 单个文本域，占位符 "Please provide a detailed reason for rejecting this submission…"，最大 500 字符，带 "0/500" 字数计数。
160	  - **Footer buttons / 底部按钮:** **Cancel** (default) + **Send an email** (primary). / Cancel（默认）+ Send an email（主按钮）。
161	- On confirm, the activity status becomes **"Update Requested"** (its Action button greys out), and an **email is sent to the responsible person** (see Email templates below).
162	- After the responsible person edits and resubmits, the activity status becomes **"Updated"**, and the LM's **Request Update** button is clickable again.
163	
164	**Activity status state machine / 活动状态机:**
165	
166	| Current status / 当前状态 | Request Update button / 按钮 | On LM "Request Update" → / LM 打回后 | On responsible-person resubmit → / 负责人重新提交后 |
167	|---|---|---|---|
168	| **Submitted** | clickable / 可点 | → **Update Requested** + email sent | — |
169	| **Update Requested** | greyed / 置灰 | — (already requested) | → **Updated** |
170	| **Updated** | clickable / 可点 | → **Update Requested (round +1)** + email | → **Updated +1**, **+2**, … (counter increments each round) |
171	| **Updated +N** | clickable / 可点 | → **Update Requested (round N+1)** | → **Updated +(N+1)** |
172	
173	```
174	Submitted ──Request Update──▶ Update Requested ──resubmit──▶ Updated
175	                                     ▲                          │
176	                                     └────── Request Update ─────┘   (each loop: counter +1 → "Updated +N")
177	```
178	
179	**LM Approve / LM 通过:** when the LM is satisfied with **all** activities, they click the green **Approve** button (bottom-right) → the **cycle** status changes to **"Under admin review"**.

201	**Detail page layout (Admin view) / Admin 详情页布局:**
202	- Same header as the LM view but the status tag reads **"Under admin review"**, and the LM approval line is shown.

204	- Bottom-right: a red **Reject** button + a green **Approve** button.

206	**Admin Reject / Admin 打回:** if the Admin has a concern, they click **Reject** → a **"Reason for Rejection" modal** opens (textarea, counter 0/500, buttons **Cancel / Reject**). On confirm, an **email is sent to the Line Manager** (see templates), the LM re-reviews and resubmits, and the cycle status **stays "Under admin review"**.

216	### Email templates / 邮件模板
217	
218	> 简述：两封邮件。按系统现有邮件规范来：**主题用英文、短、最多一个变量**；**正文阿英双语**（阿语在上、英语在下，放在同一个 body 字段里）；问候语、字段排版、结尾要复用现有审批通知模板（最接近的是 INITIATIVE_MODIFY_LINE_* 那一套）。下面给的是英文内容；阿语镜像由系统模板补齐。
219	
220	Per the system's email convention (English-only short subject with at most one variable; **bilingual Arabic + English body** stacked in the single `body` field, Arabic on top; reuse the greeting / label / closing boilerplate from the existing `INITIATIVE_MODIFY_LINE_*` templates), the two new templates carry the content below — **both the Arabic and English bodies are drafted here** (placeholders like `[User Name]` / `[Comment Text]` are language-neutral tokens substituted at send time).
221	
222	**1) Request Update email — to the responsible person / 给负责人的"请更新"邮件**
223	
224	- **Subject (EN only, short — system convention):** `Update Requested for Project: "[Project Title]"`
225	  - *Note: keep to the system's existing short-subject style; if the system convention prefers the entity name only, use that. Flagged for the dev to align with `INITIATIVE_MODIFY_LINE_REJECT` subject style.*
226	- **Body (single `body` field — Arabic on top, English below):**
227	  > عزيزي [User Name]،
228	  > طلب مديرك المباشر تحديثًا للمشروع "[Project Title]" ضمن الدورة [Cycle Name] ([Department Name]).
229	  > ملاحظة من المدير المباشر: "[Comment Text]".
230	  > يرجى مراجعة الملاحظة أعلاه وتحديث ما أدخلته وفقًا لذلك. [اضغط هنا] للانتقال إلى المشروع وإجراء التعديلات المطلوبة.
231	  > مع خالص التحية
232	  >
233	  > ———
234	  >
235	  > Dear [User Name],
236	  > Your line manager has requested an update for the project "[Project Title]" under the cycle [Cycle Name] ([Department Name]).
237	  > Comment from Line Manager: "[Comment Text]".
238	  > Please review the comment above and update your submission accordingly. [Click here] to go to the project and make the required changes.
239	  > Best Regards
240	
241	**2) Reject email — to the Line Manager / 给 LM 的"驳回"邮件**
242	
243	- **Subject (EN only, short — system convention):** `Cycle Rejected: [Type] — [Cycle Name] for [Department Name]`
244	  - *Note: align with the system's short-subject convention; the dev confirms whether to trim to a single variable.*
245	- **Body (single `body` field — Arabic on top, English below):**
246	  > عزيزي [User Name]،
247	  > تم رفض الدورة المقدَّمة لـ [Type] — [Cycle Name] ([Department Name]) من قِبل المسؤول وتتطلب مراجعتك.
248	  > ملاحظة من المسؤول: "[Comment Text]".
249	  > يرجى مراجعة الملاحظة أعلاه وإجراء التحديثات اللازمة على الأنشطة ذات الصلة وإعادة تقديم الدورة للموافقة. [اضغط هنا] للانتقال إلى الدورة.
250	  > مع خالص التحية
251	  >
252	  > ———
253	  >
254	  > Dear [User Name],
255	  > The cycle submission for [Type] — [Cycle Name] ([Department Name]) has been rejected by the admin and requires your review.
256	  > Comment from Admin: "[Comment Text]".
257	  > Please review the comment above, make the necessary updates to the relevant activities, and resubmit the cycle for approval. [Click here] to go to the cycle.
258	  > Best Regards

262	## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准
263	
264	| # | Criterion / 标准 | Priority |
265	|---|---|---|
266	| 1 | A review record is **auto-created** for each cycle + department **when the cycle-initiation period closes** and it has at least one activity, with initial status **Under LM review**; an in-progress (not-yet-closed) cycle does **not** create a record | P0 |
267	| 2 | The list shows only the **current year's closed cycles** (in-progress cycles do not appear); columns are Cycle, Department, Type, Activities, Status, Action; the **Activities count is a blue clickable link** that opens the review detail | P0 |
268	| 3 | **Role visibility:** a Line Manager sees only their own department's cycles; an Admin sees all departments' cycles | P0 |
269	| 4 | The module is accessible **only** to Line Manager and Admin roles; other roles see no menu entry and are blocked from the routes | P0 |
270	| 5 | The filter row is **four multi-select dropdowns only** (placeholders "All Type", "All Cycle Initiation", "All Status", "All Department") + **Search** + **Reset** — **no free-text search box**; Cycle Initiation options depend on selected Type; Search + Reset behave correctly | P0 |
271	| 6 | Status pills are colored: **Under LM review** red/pink, **Under admin review** blue, **Completed** grey | P1 |
272	| 7 | Action column shows **Review** (actionable) for non-completed cycles where the current user is the responsible reviewer, and **View** (read-only) for Completed cycles | P0 |
273	| 8 | LM detail: header shows type + cycle, department, status tag; projects show project-manager name; **Projects are grouped by milestone**; **KPIs are listed per item** (not milestone-grouped) | P0 |
274	| 9 | Activity rows display **Actual %** and **Expenses (AED)** with the change shown (e.g. "15% ← from 0", "5000 ← from 0") plus their evidence attachments | P0 |
275	| 10 | LM **Request Update** is available **only on activities in status Submitted/Updated**; it opens the **"Request Update" modal** (textarea placeholder "Please provide a detailed reason for rejecting this submission…", maxLength 500 with a 0/500 counter, buttons **Cancel** / **Send an email**), and on confirm sets the activity to **Update Requested**, greys the button, and emails the responsible person | P0 |
276	| 11 | The activity **state machine** is enforced: Submitted → Update Requested → Updated → Updated +N (counter increments each loop); the button greys only while Update Requested | P0 |
277	| 12 | LM **Approve** (only when satisfied with all activities) moves the **cycle** to **Under admin review** | P0 |
278	| 13 | A cycle with **no resolved Line Manager** **skips the LM step** and starts directly in **Under admin review** (no admin substitutes as a fake LM) | P0 |
279	| 14 | Admin detail: same activity tables as LM but with **no per-row action buttons**; shows the **LM approval trail** "LM approved by [name] on [date]"; bottom-right **Reject** + **Approve** | P0 |
280	| 15 | Admin **Reject** opens the "Reason for Rejection" modal (0/500), emails the **Line Manager**, and the cycle status **stays Under admin review** | P0 |
281	| 16 | Admin **Approve** sets the cycle to **Completed**, **permanently locks** the underlying submissions (no further edits to actual % / expense / attachments, no re-submission, and **no re-open** in v3.4), and the data is used in reports | P0 |
282	| 17 | Two emails are sent with the specified content: **Request Update** to the responsible person, **Reject** to the Line Manager; subjects follow the system's short-subject convention; bodies are bilingual (AR + EN) | P0 |
283	| 18 | A **Completed** cycle is read-only everywhere: the detail page opens via **View** only, and any attempt to edit the underlying submissions is rejected | P0 |

287	## QA test scenarios / QA 测试场景
288	
289	> 简述：覆盖所有结果路径 —— LM 打回、LM 通过、Admin 驳回后 LM 重提、Admin 通过并锁定、角色可见性、无 LM 兜底、各种筛选、Projects 按里程碑分组 vs KPI 按条目列出。
290	
291	| # | Setup / 前置 | Steps / 步骤 | Expected / 预期 |
292	|---|---|---|---|
293	| 1 | LM of Department A; a Projects bi-weekly cycle (January W2 2026) closed with activities under 2 milestones, all status Submitted | Open the module → find the cycle row → click **Review** | List shows the cycle (status **Under LM review**, red/pink pill, Action = Review). Detail header reads "Projects — January W2 2026 / Department A / Under LM review"; activities grouped under "Milestone 1" / "Milestone 2"; each row shows actual % and expense change | 
294	| 2 | Same LM, same cycle | On one Submitted activity click **Request Update** → enter a reason → "Send an email" | Activity status → **Update Requested**, its button greys; an email is sent to that activity's responsible person with the LM comment | 
295	| 3 | Continued from #2; responsible person edits & resubmits | Responsible person updates the activity; LM reopens detail | Activity status → **Updated**; LM's Request Update button is clickable again | 
296	| 4 | Continued; LM requests update a 2nd time then responsible resubmits again | Request Update → resubmit → repeat once more | Status increments **Updated +1**, **Updated +2** each round; counter is correct | 
297	| 5 | LM satisfied with all activities | Click **Approve** | Cycle status → **Under admin review** (blue pill in list); it now appears in the Admin's queue | 
298	| 6 | Admin; the cycle from #5 | Open module → **Review** the cycle | Detail shows **Under admin review** tag + "LM approved by [name] on [date]"; same activity tables but **no per-row action buttons**; bottom-right Reject + Approve present | 
299	| 7 | Admin, same cycle | Click **Reject** → enter reason → Reject | Email sent to the LM; cycle status **stays Under admin review**; LM receives the reject email | 
300	| 8 | Continued; LM re-reviews and resubmits | LM opens the cycle, addresses comments, Approves again | Cycle returns to Admin queue, still Under admin review | 
301	| 9 | Admin satisfied | Click **Approve** | Cycle status → **Completed** (grey pill); list Action becomes **View** (read-only); detail opens read-only | 
302	| 10 | A Completed cycle | Attempt to edit the underlying actual % / expense / attachment for an activity in that cycle (via the normal submission screen) | Edit is **rejected / blocked** (cycle locked); value unchanged | 
303	| 11 | LM of Department A and an Admin, with cycles in Departments A, B, C | Each user opens the module | LM sees **only Department A** cycles; Admin sees **A, B, C** | 
304	| 12 | A KPI quarterly cycle in a department that has **no Line Manager** | An Admin opens the module | The cycle appears directly in **Under admin review** (LM step skipped); no admin acts as a fake LM; the Admin can Reject / Approve | 
305	| 13 | Mixed cycles (Projects/KPIs/Initiatives; various statuses; multiple departments) | Apply filters: Type = KPIs → check Cycle Initiation options become quarterly/monthly; Status = Completed; Department = one dept; Search; then Reset | Cycle Initiation options adapt to the selected Type; results filter correctly by status/department; Reset clears all filters | 
306	| 14 | A KPIs Quarterly 1 2026 cycle, Department C | Open the KPI cycle detail (LM and Admin) | KPIs are listed **per item** (KPI A, KPI B) with Item / Responsible / Actual % / Attachment / Status columns — **not** grouped under milestones (contrast with Projects in #1) | 
307	| 15 | An in-progress (not-yet-closed) cycle with activity | Open the module | The in-progress cycle does **not** appear; it enters the list only once its cycle-initiation period closes | 
308	| 16 | A non-LM, non-Admin user | Navigate to the module route directly | Access blocked; no menu entry visible |

320	3. ~~**What exactly does "data locked" prevent?** / "数据锁定"到底锁什么？~~ ❌ **Resolved 2026-06-16** — Completed is a permanent lock, no re-open in v3.4 (see Locked decision 2). / 已定："完成"为永久锁定，v3.4 不提供重新打开（见已锁定决策 2）。
321	   - ~~Does locking block edits to actual % / expense / attachments only, or also prevent re-opening the cycle, re-submitting, or any related downstream edits? Does an Admin have an unlock/override path, or is Completed final? Confirm scope.~~
322	4. ~~**In-progress (not-yet-closed) cycle behavior in review.**~~ ❌ **Resolved (Amir 2026-06-17)** — **Post-cycle means the cycle-initiation window is closed; the responsible person can no longer update.** If a **late submission** is made during the post-cycle review **after the LM has already approved**, that late submission **re-triggers LM approval as a fresh review** (the activity returns to Submitted and the LM must review it again). See Locked decision 5. / 已定：周期填报窗口已关闭，负责人不能再改；若审核期间出现迟交、且 LM 已审过，则该迟交**重新触发 LM 审批**（活动回到待审，LM 需重新审）。见已锁定决策 5。
323	5. ~~**Admin-acts-as-LM trigger — precise definition.** / "无 LM 由 admin 充当 LM" 的精确触发条件。~~ ❌ **Resolved 2026-06-16** — No "admin-acts-as-LM"; when there is no Line Manager the LM step is **skipped** (see Locked decision 3). / 已定：不再"由 admin 充当 LM"；无 LM 时**跳过** LM 环节（见已锁定决策 3）。
324	   - ~~What exactly defines "no Line Manager for the cycle" — no department HEAD assigned? Which "admin" acts as LM (Project Manager? Initiative owner? KPI responsible/admin? a global Project/Initiative/KPI Admin role)? And when there *is* both an LM and an admin, does the LM always take precedence? Confirm the resolution order.~~
325	6. ~~**Admin View / PM View toggle semantics.** / Admin View / PM View 切换的含义。~~ ❌ **Resolved 2026-06-16** — Viewer lens only; labels are the literal "Admin View" / "PM View" per our hi-fi (see Locked decision 4). / 已定：仅切换查看视角；标签按我方高保真为字面 "Admin View" / "PM View"（见已锁定决策 4）。
326	   - ~~The hi-fi shows an "Admin View / PM View" toggle. Does it merely switch the reviewer lens for an Admin who also wants to see the LM perspective, or does it have functional effect on visibility/actions? Confirm.~~
327	
328	---
329	
330	## Locked decisions / 已锁定决策
331	
332	*Decisions below resolved by Eugene on 2026-06-16. / 以下决策由 Eugene 于 2026-06-16 确认。*
333	
334	1. **2-level flow, no director. / 两级流程，无 director。**
335	   The workflow is **Line Manager → Admin → Completed**. Admin is the final approver; there is no third-level director step. The hi-fi "Submit to director" label is **dropped**. / 流程为 **Line Manager → Admin → Completed**，Admin 为最终审批人，没有第三级 director。高保真里的 "Submit to director" 标签**取消**。
336	
337	2. **"Completed" is a permanent lock. / "完成"为永久锁定。**
338	   Once the Admin approves, the cycle's data is **locked** — no further re-submission or edits, and **no re-open** (there is no admin re-open in v3.4). If corrections are ever needed, a future admin-override would be added separately — **out of scope now**. / Admin 审批通过后，周期数据被**锁定**——不可再重新提交或编辑，且**不可重新打开**（v3.4 不提供 admin 重新打开）。如将来需要更正，会单独增加 admin-override 机制——**当前不在范围内**。
339	
340	3. **No Line Manager → skip the LM level. / 无 Line Manager → 跳过 LM 环节。**
341	   If a department has **no resolved Line Manager**, the LM review step is **skipped** and the cycle goes straight to **Under admin review** (mirrors how the system's other approval workflows handle a missing approver). The earlier "admin acts as LM" fallback is **removed** — do **not** substitute an admin as a fake LM. / 如果部门**没有可解析的 Line Manager**，则**跳过** LM 审核环节，周期直接进入 **Under admin review**（与系统其他审批流程处理缺失审批人的方式一致）。之前"由 admin 充当 LM"的兜底方案**取消**——**不要**用 admin 假冒 LM。
342	
343	4. **"Admin View / PM View" toggle = viewer lens only. / "Admin View / PM View" 切换仅为查看视角。**
344	   The toggle only switches the reviewer's perspective; it does **not** change permissions or the visibility of actions. Per our hi-fi the labels are the **literal strings "Admin View" / "PM View"** (Admin View active by default). The earlier "User View" rename is **reverted back to "PM View"**; the role text stays **"Line Manager"**. / 切换仅改变审阅者视角，**不**改变权限或操作可见性。按我方高保真，标签为**字面字符串 "Admin View" / "PM View"**（默认 Admin View）。之前改为 "User View" 的方案**还原为 "PM View"**；角色文案仍为 **"Line Manager"**。
345	
346	5. **Post-cycle = window closed; late submission re-triggers LM approval. / 周期已关闭；迟交重新触发 LM 审批。** Once a cycle is in post-cycle review, the cycle-initiation window is closed and the responsible person can no longer update their submission. If a **late submission** occurs during the review **after the LM has already approved**, that activity **returns to Submitted and re-triggers a fresh LM approval** (the LM must review it again before it can re-advance). Locked per Amir 2026-06-17. / 进入审核后填报窗口已关，负责人不能再改；若 LM 已审通过后又出现迟交，该活动回到"待审"并重新触发 LM 审批。Amir 2026-06-17 锁定。
347	
348	---
349	
350	## Related PRDs / 相关 PRD
351	
352	- **R-577** — Admin return / line-manager + admin approval emails on initiative/project submit. The closest existing email-content analog; R-400's two new templates reuse the `INITIATIVE_MODIFY_LINE_*` greeting/label/closing boilerplate.
353	- **P-076** — Approval routing by entity department (`getHeadByOrgId` / sector-to-approver mapping). R-400's "LM sees only own department" and "find the department HEAD" reuse this routing logic.
354	- **R-461 / R-443** — Temporary Cycle Initiation (view detail + assignment email; department-level assignment). Relevant because the cycle-initiation period definitions and temporary cycles are an input to which cycles R-400 lists. See [R-461](../V3.3/[R-461]-temporary-cycle-enhancements.md) and [R-585](./[R-585]-temporary-cycle-department-and-multi-period.md).
355	
356	---
357	
358	> 以下为参考区（技术团队工作区），PM 无需审阅。Reference zone below — technical working area; PM review not required.
359	
360	---
361	
362	## Proposed technical solution
363	
364	> English-only section. PM does not need to review beyond this point.
365	
366	### Summary verdict — reuse vs. new
367	
368	R-400 is a **substantial new module**: a new list page + 2 detail views, a per-activity state machine, a cycle-level approval state, two emails, role-scoped (department) visibility, and data locking on completion. A large share of the supporting infrastructure already exists and is reusable; the genuinely new work is the cycle/activity status tracking, the "Request Update" action, and the three review UIs.
369	
370	**Reuses existing infra:**
371	- **Approval framework** — `ApprovalEntity` / `ApprovalHistoryEntity` / `ApprovalWorkflowEntity` / `ApprovalConfigEntity` (`backend/dao/.../entity/sys/ApprovalEntity.java:20`, `ApprovalHistoryEntity.java:20`, `ApprovalWorkflowEntity.java:20`, `ApprovalConfigEntity.java:20`); service at `backend/service/.../sys/impl/ApprovalServiceImpl.java:101` (`initialSubmitForApproval`), `:225` (`approve`), `:278` (`reject`). Multi-node sequencing (LM order=1 → Admin order=2), reviewer identity+timestamp (`ApprovalHistoryEntity.processor` / `processTime`, resolved to name at `ApprovalServiceImpl.java:357`), comment (`remark`), and the round counter (`ApprovalEntity.approvalRound`, incremented at `ApprovalServiceImpl.java:316`) all map directly to R-400 needs. The closest call-site analog is the initiative submit/approve flow: `backend/service/.../initiative/impl/InitiativeServiceImpl.java:2006` (submit) and `:2378` (approve/reject), and the email strategy `backend/service/.../approve/impl/InitiativeApprovalStrategyServiceImpl.java:50`.
372	- **Cycle-initiation data** — `CycleSettingEntity` (`backend/dao/.../entity/common/CycleSettingEntity.java:21`, `settingType` 0=project/1=kpis/2=initiatives, `cycleType` week/month/quarter…), `TimeCodeEnum` (`backend/common/.../enums/TimeCodeEnum.java:21`, the janW2…decW4 / jan…dec / Q1…Q4 codes that populate the **Cycle Initiation** filter), and `CycleInfoEntity` (`backend/dao/.../entity/cycleInfo/CycleInfoEntity.java:28`, status 0/1/2). Settings endpoints at `backend/web/.../controller/common/SettingController.java:43`.
373	- **Per-activity submissions (read source)** — Projects: `ProjectActivityEntity` (`backend/dao/.../entity/project/ProjectActivityEntity.java`, `completionRate`/`expenses`/`actualRateSum`) + `ProjectActivityResponsibleEntity` (per-person) + `ProjectMilestoneEntity` (milestone grouping). KPIs: `KpisEntity.measurementCycleData` (`backend/dao/.../entity/kpis/KpisEntity.java:142`). Initiatives: `InitiativeActivityEntity` (`backend/dao/.../entity/initiative/InitiativeActivityEntity.java`, `actual`/`expense`/`completionRate`). Attachments: `AttachmentEntity` (`backend/dao/.../entity/sys/AttachmentEntity.java:28`, linked by `bizId`+`bizType`).
374	- **Roles & department/head mapping** — `SysRoleEnum.LINE_MANAGER(10L)` + `ADMIN(1L)` (`backend/common/.../enums/sys/SysRoleEnum.java:20`); department HEAD resolution `UserServiceImpl.getHead(userId)` (`backend/service/.../auth/impl/UserServiceImpl.java:474`) and `isHead(email)` (`:496`); `OrganizationEntity` (`backend/dao/.../entity/auth/OrganizationEntity.java:18`, type 1=sector/2=department/3=section) + `UserOrgEntity` (HEAD/MEMBER). Department field present on `ProjectEntity.orgId:235`, `InitiativeEntity.orgId:128`, `KpisEntity.orgId:150`. Per-entity owner for the no-LM fallback: `ProjectEntity.projectManager:132`, `InitiativeEntity.initiativeOwner:108`, `KpisEntity.responsiblePerson:111`.
375	- **Email** — `EmailCodeConstant` (`backend/common/.../constant/EmailCodeConstant.java:12`, existing `PROJECT_MODIFY_LINE_REJECT:26`, `INITIATIVE_MODIFY_LINE_REJECT:46`, etc.), `EmailTemplateEntity` (`backend/dao/.../entity/email/EmailTemplateEntity.java:26`, table `sk_email_template`, one `title`+`body` per `code`), fetched by `EmailTemplateServiceImpl.getEmailTemplateByName` (`backend/service/.../sys/impl/EmailTemplateServiceImpl.java:33`), placeholders substituted in `EmailSendServiceImpl.java:87` (`[token]` → value). Bilingual content lives in the single `body`; templates are seeded only in the live DB (no codebase seed).
376	- **Data locking** — `CycleStatusEnum` (`backend/common/.../enums/CycleStatusEnum.java:12`, DRAFTS/PUBLISHED/CLOSED) and the existing guard `CycleInfoServiceImpl.checkCycleStatus(cycleId)` (`backend/service/.../cycle/impl/CycleInfoServiceImpl.java:1775`) already throws `CycleError.CYCLE_IS_CLOSED` and is invoked from all three submission paths — KPI save (`KpisServiceImpl.java:2222`), project activity (`MilestoneServiceImpl.java:1238`), initiative activity (`InitiativeActivityServiceImpl.java:610`).
377	- **Frontend list+detail pattern** — routes in `frontend/src/routes/routes.tsx` (Reports section `:541`–`599`); the `ListFilterForm` + `UnifiedTableStyle` + review-modal pattern in `frontend/src/pages/PendingLate/index.tsx` and `frontend/src/pages/Committee/Evaluation/index.tsx`; colored status pills via custom span classes (e.g. `frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/index.less:14`) or the `StatusLightText` component.
378	
379	**Genuinely new:**
380	1. **A cycle-level review record** — auto-created per (cycle code + cycle type + department) when the cycle closes with at least one activity. New table (e.g. `sk_cycle_approval`) keyed by `settingType` + `cycleCode` + `orgId`, holding the cycle review `status` (Under LM review / Under admin review / Completed) and links to the approval framework (`bizType = CYCLE_APPROVAL`, `bizId = cycleApprovalId`). Add `ApprovalBizTypeEnum.CYCLE_APPROVAL`.
381	2. **A per-activity review status + counter** — the activity state machine (Submitted / Update Requested / Updated / Updated +N) is **not** the existing PROCESSING/SUCCESS/FAIL approval status. Store `review_state` + `update_request_count` on a new per-activity review row (e.g. `sk_cycle_approval_activity`, keyed by cycle-approval id + the activity's `bizType`+`bizId`), since the underlying activity entities should not be polluted with review state and one activity can recur across cycles.
382	3. **A new "Request Update" action** — distinct from `reject()` (which sets result=REJECT and may FAIL the workflow). Add `requestUpdate(...)` that records a history entry, increments the activity counter, flips the activity `review_state` to Update Requested, and fires the responsible-person email — without changing the cycle-level approval status.
383	4. **Two new email codes + templates** — `CYCLE_INITIATION_REQUEST_UPDATE`, `CYCLE_INITIATION_REJECTED`. Placeholders: `[user_name]`/`[user_name_ar]`, `[project_title]` (or `[cycle_name]`/`[cycle_name_ar]`), `[department_name]`, `[type]`, `[comment]`/`[comment_ar]`, `[detail_url]`. Dev to copy greeting/label/closing from `INITIATIVE_MODIFY_LINE_*` and add the AR mirror in the body. Templates seeded in the live DB.
384	5. **Data-lock extension** — add `CycleStatusEnum.COMPLETED(3)` (or a separate `cycle_approval` completion flag) and extend `checkCycleStatus()` (or add a `checkCycleApprovalCompleted()` guard) so that once a cycle's review is Completed, the three submission endpoints reject edits for that cycle+department. Confirm the lock granularity per Open Question #3.
385	6. **Three new frontend pages** — list (`frontend/src/pages/Reports/PostCycleInitiationApproval/index.tsx`), LM review detail, Admin review detail (as modals or routed pages under the same folder). New route under `/reports` (e.g. `/reports/post-cycle-initiation-approval/list`). Menu gated to `SysRoleEnum.LINE_MANAGER` + `ADMIN` via `ResourceEntity`/`RoleResourceEntity` and the frontend `useCheckPermission` hook.
386	7. **Department-scoped query** — list query filters by the reviewer's department (via `getHead`/`isHead` org membership) for LM, all departments for Admin.
387	
388	### Effort estimate (rough)
389	
390	| Area | Scope | Est. |
391	|---|---|---|
392	| Backend — schema | 2 new tables (cycle review, activity review) + enum additions + migration | ~1 day |
393	| Backend — auto-create + query | Cron/trigger to create review records on cycle close; department-scoped list query; no-LM fallback resolution | ~2 days |
394	| Backend — state machine + actions | `requestUpdate` action, LM approve, Admin reject/approve, round counter, history wiring on top of `ApprovalServiceImpl` | ~2 days |
395	| Backend — emails + data lock | 2 templates wired + `checkCycleStatus`/completed-guard extension across 3 submission paths | ~1 day |
396	| Frontend — list page | Title, Admin/PM toggle, 4 dependent filters, status pills, Review/View actions | ~1.5 days |
397	| Frontend — LM detail | Header card, milestone-grouped (Projects) vs per-item (KPI) tables, change display, Request Update modal, state machine UI, Approve | ~2 days |
398	| Frontend — Admin detail | Read-only tables, LM approval trail, Reject modal, Approve | ~1 day |
399	| QA | Full state-machine + role-visibility + lock + filter coverage | ~2 days |
400	| **Total** | | **~12–13 dev-days** |
401	
402	This is a multi-developer / multi-day effort; the approval framework, cycle data, role/dept mapping, email infra, and locking guard meaningfully reduce it from a from-scratch build, but the new status tracking, the Request-Update action, and the three review UIs are net-new.
403

file.content:
# [P0] R-400 — Post Cycle Initiation Approval (New Module) / 周期填报后审批（全新模块）

> **Ticket number provisional (R-400) — confirm with PM / Feishu before approval. / 编号为临时占位（R-400），审批前请与 PM / 飞书核实。**

| | |
|---|---|
| **Version** | V3.4 |
| **Source / 来源** | Prior V3.4 planning + our (PM/product) hi-fi mockups / 早期 V3.4 规划 + 我方（PM/产品）设计的高保真原型 |
| **Priority** | P0 |
| **Created** | 2026-06-15 |
| **PM status** | `draft` |
| **Type / 类型** | New module / 全新模块 |
| **Access / 访问角色** | Line Manager + Admin only / 仅 Line Manager 与 Admin |
| **Design / 设计** | [Figma — Strategy KPI (node 8386-149555)](https://www.figma.com/design/R0FkvXe9dFwPy1AfI1cL1D/Strategy-KPI?node-id=8386-149555) |

---

## Overview / 概述

> 简述：新增一个"周期填报后审批"模块。今天每个填报周期（项目双周、KPI 季度+月度、举措月度）里，负责人提交实际完成率（带附件）和支出（AED，带附件），**提交后立即生效，没有任何审核**。这个模块加入两级审批：**先 Line Manager 审，再 Admin 审**。只有 Admin 审批通过，这个周期才算"完成"，数据被锁定、进入报表。只有 Line Manager 和 Admin 两个角色能进这个模块。

R-400 introduces a new **Post Cycle Initiation Approval** module. Today, in every cycle-initiation period — Projects (bi-weekly), KPIs (quarterly + monthly), Initiatives (monthly) — the responsible person submits their activity updates (actual completion % with attachment, and expenses in AED with attachment), and those submissions **take effect immediately with no review**. R-400 adds a **two-level approval workflow: Line Manager → Admin.** A cycle is considered *Completed* only after the Admin approves; at that point the underlying data is locked and is used in reports. Only the **Line Manager** and **Admin** roles can access this module.

---

## The problem / 问题

> 简述：现在填报是"提交即生效"，没人复核。负责人随便填的实际完成率和支出，立刻就进了报表，错误数据没人拦得住，管理层也没有一个集中的地方去审核一个部门一个周期的填报质量。客户要求：填报周期一关闭，系统就自动生成一条待审记录，先由 Line Manager 逐条审活动，再由 Admin 在部门层面整体审，审完锁定。

Today, activity submissions are *submit-and-go-live*: the moment a responsible person enters an actual completion % or an expense figure, that value flows straight into the reports with no one verifying it. There is no checkpoint to catch wrong numbers, missing evidence, or inconsistent reporting, and management has no single place to review the quality of a department's submissions for a given period before the data is trusted.

The customer wants a structured review: when a cycle-initiation period closes, the system automatically creates a reviewable record; the department's Line Manager reviews each activity, then the Admin reviews the whole cycle at department level, and only then is the data locked and trusted.

---

## Current behavior / 当前行为

> 简述：没有审核环节。负责人在填报周期里填的实际完成率 + 支出，提交后立即生效、立即进报表。没有"待审"列表，没有 Line Manager / Admin 的复核步骤，也没有"完成后锁定"这回事。

There is **no review step today**. Within each cycle-initiation period, the responsible person enters actual completion % (+ attachment) and expenses in AED (+ attachment) on their Projects / KPIs / Initiatives, and the submission takes effect immediately and feeds reports immediately.

- No review/approval list exists for cycle submissions.
- No Line Manager or Admin sign-off step exists.
- No "lock on completion" concept — values stay editable as long as the cycle period allows it.

Because this is a brand-new module, there is **no "before" screen** to compare against. The "Expected behavior" below describes **our (PM/product) hi-fi mockups**, which the implementation must match.

### Hi-fi design reference / 高保真设计参考

Full design board (Figma): **[Strategy KPI — node 8386-149555](https://www.figma.com/design/R0FkvXe9dFwPy1AfI1cL1D/Strategy-KPI?node-id=8386-149555)** — cycle list → LM review detail → activity status table → Request Update modal → Admin review detail → Reason-for-Rejection modal → KPI cycle approval detail.

> Each `UC-0x` section below cites the specific hi-fi screen it implements and shows the matching screenshot. Open the Figma link for the per-screen detail at full resolution.

---

## Expected behavior / 期望行为

> 简述：整个流程是：填报周期关闭 → **Under LM review**（Line Manager 逐条审活动，不满意就 Request Update 把活动打回给负责人改，改完再审；满意了就 Submit 给 Admin）→ **Under admin review**（Admin 在部门层面整体审，看得到 LM 的审批记录；有问题就 Reject 整体打回给 LM；满意了就 Approve）→ **Completed**（周期关闭、数据锁定，进报表）。

### Workflow at a glance / 流程总览 — *Hi-fi screen 1 (Workflow diagram)*

```
Cycle-initiation period closes (with at least one activity)
        │  system auto-creates a review record
        ▼
┌──────────────────────────┐
│   UNDER LM REVIEW        │  Line Manager reviews EACH activity individually.
│   (department level)     │  • Request Update → emails responsible person, loops back
│                          │  • Once satisfied → Submit / Approve to Admin
└───────────┬──────────────┘
            ▼
┌──────────────────────────┐
│   UNDER ADMIN REVIEW     │  Admin reviews the WHOLE cycle at department level.
│   (department level)     │  Sees the LM approval trail.
│                          │  • Reject → emails LM, loops back (stays Under admin review)
│                          │  • Once satisfied → Approve
└───────────┬──────────────┘
            ▼
┌──────────────────────────┐
│   COMPLETED — locked     │  Cycle closed. Underlying submissions locked. Used in reports.
└──────────────────────────┘
```

> 简述：高保真里 Admin 那一步有个标签写的是 "Submit to director"，但用例文字说的是 Admin Approve → Completed，没有 director 这一级。**以用例为准：两级（LM → Admin → Completed），没有第三级 director。** 这个矛盾列为待澄清问题。

> **Resolved 2026-06-16 (Locked decision 1):** the flow is **2-level LM → Admin → Completed** with **no** director step. The hi-fi "Submit to director" label is dropped; Admin is the final approver. / 已定（已锁定决策 1）：两级流程 LM → Admin → Completed，无 director；高保真 "Submit to director" 标签取消，Admin 为最终审批人。

---

### UC-01 — View cycle list & filter / 查看周期列表与筛选 — *Hi-fi screens 1–2 (Cycle list)*

![R-400 cycle list](artifacts/screenshots/r400-list.png)

> 简述：进模块看到一张可审周期列表。表格列：Cycle、Department、Type、Activities、Status、Action。一个填报周期只要关闭了、且这个周期里有活动，系统就自动生成一条记录，初始状态 "Under LM review"。只显示当前年度已关闭的周期（周期没关闭前不进这个模块）。LM 只看自己部门的，Admin 看所有部门。四个多选筛选 + Search + Reset。每行的 Action 是 "Review"（可操作）或 "View"（已完成只读）。

The user enters the module and sees a list of reviewable cycles. The page is titled **"Post Cycle Initiation Approval"**, with an **Admin View / PM View toggle** (viewer lens only — it switches the reviewer perspective and does **not** change permissions or action visibility; visibility still follows the role rules below). Admin View is active by default; per the hi-fi the labels are the literal strings "Admin View" / "PM View". / 切换为"查看视角"，默认 Admin View，高保真标签为字面 "Admin View" / "PM View"。

**Table columns / 表格列:** Cycle | Department | Type | Activities | Status | Action.

**Activities column / Activities 列:** the activity count renders as a **blue clickable link** that opens the same review detail as the row's Action. / Activities 数量是蓝色可点链接，点击打开与 Action 相同的审批详情。

**How a row appears / 记录出现规则:** when a cycle-initiation period **closes** **and** has at least one activity during that cycle, the system **automatically creates one review record** for that cycle + department, with the initial status **"Under LM review"**. A cycle that is **still in progress (not yet closed) does not appear** in this module — only **closed** cycles enter the approval flow. The list shows only the **current year's closed cycles**.

**Role visibility / 角色可见性:**
- **Line Manager** sees only cycles for **their own department**. / LM 仅看自己部门。
- **Admin** sees cycles for **all departments**. / Admin 看所有部门。

**Filter row / 筛选行:** **four multi-select dropdowns only**, followed by a **Search** button (primary) and a **Reset** button. There is **no free-text search box** — the placeholders are "All Type", "All Cycle Initiation", "All Status", "All Department". / 筛选行只有四个多选下拉框 + Search 按钮 + Reset 按钮，**没有**自由文本搜索框；占位符为 "All Type" / "All Cycle Initiation" / "All Status" / "All Department"。

| Filter / 筛选 | Placeholder / 占位符 | Options / 选项 |
|---|---|---|
| **Type** | All Type | Projects / KPIs / Initiatives |
| **Cycle Initiation** | All Cycle Initiation | Depends on the selected Type — Projects → bi-weekly (e.g. January W2, January W4 …); KPIs → quarterly (Quarterly 1, Quarterly 2 …) and monthly; Initiatives → monthly (January, February …); when no Type is chosen, all cycle codes present in the data are offered. / 选项取决于 Type |
| **Status** | All Status | Under LM review / Under admin review / Completed |
| **Department** | All Department | All departments / 所有部门 |

**Status pills (colored) / 状态标签（带颜色）:** Under LM review = red/pink; Under admin review = blue; Completed = grey.

**Action column / Action 列:** each row shows a **Review** link (actionable, when the cycle is still under LM/Admin review and the current user is the responsible reviewer) or a **View** link (read-only, when the cycle is Completed).

### UC-02 — Line Manager reviews activities / Line Manager 审核活动 — *Hi-fi screens 3–5 (LM review detail, activity status table, Request Update modal)*

LM review detail (milestone-grouped, per-activity Action = Request Update / Update Requested):

![R-400 LM review detail](artifacts/screenshots/r400-lm-detail.png)

Activity status table (Status: Submitted / Updated):

![R-400 activity status table](artifacts/screenshots/r400-activity-status-table.png)

Request Update modal (LM, per-activity):

![R-400 Request Update modal](artifacts/screenshots/r400-request-update-modal.png)

> 简述：LM 逐条审每个活动的实际完成率和支出变更。对某条不满意 → Request Update（弹框写理由 → 确认 → 发邮件给负责人，活动状态变 "Update Requested"，按钮置灰；负责人改完状态变 "Updated"，按钮又能点）。全部满意 → 点 Approve，整个周期状态变 "Under admin review"。**如果一个周期没有对应的 LM，就跳过 LM 环节，直接进入 "Under admin review"**（见已锁定决策 3）。

The Line Manager reviews each activity's **actual %** and **expense** change. Per activity the LM can **Request Update**, or once satisfied with everything, **Approve** (submit the whole cycle to the Admin).

> 简述（无 LM 跳过）：没有对应 LM 的周期**跳过** LM 环节，初始状态直接是 "Under admin review"，由 Admin 做最终审批。

**No-LM → skip the LM level / 无 LM 跳过:** a cycle that has **no resolved Line Manager** **skips** the LM review step and starts directly in **Under admin review** (per Locked decision 3 — mirroring how the system's other approval workflows handle a missing approver; do **not** substitute an admin as a fake LM).

**Detail page layout (LM view) / LM 详情页布局:**
- Breadcrumb: **"Post Cycle Initiation Approval / Cycle Approval"**.
- Header card: **type + cycle** (e.g. *"Projects — January W2 2026"*), the **department name** (e.g. "Department A"), and the **status tag** ("Under LM review").
- The page lists the Projects / KPIs / Initiatives in the cycle, each showing the **project manager name** (e.g. *"Project: Project A — Project Manager / Mohammed"*).
- For **Projects**, each project's activities are presented as tables **grouped by milestone** (e.g. "Milestone name 1", "Milestone name 2", with rows like *"Milestone 1 > Activity 1.1"*).
- For **KPIs**, items are listed **per KPI** (KPI A, KPI B …) and are **not** milestone-grouped (see UC-03 hi-fi screen 8).

**Activity row columns / 活动行的列:** Activity title | Responsible person | Actual % | Attachment (evidence) | Expenses (AED) | Attachment | Status | Action.

- Actual % and Expenses show the **change**, e.g. *"15% ← from 0"* and *"5000 ← from 0"*, so the reviewer sees what the responsible person submitted versus the prior value.

**Request Update — per-activity action / 逐条 Request Update:**
- For an activity in status **Submitted**, the LM clicks **Request Update** → the **"Request Update" modal** opens. / 弹出 "Request Update" 弹框。
  - **Title / 标题:** "Request Update".
  - **Body / 正文:** a single textarea with placeholder *"Please provide a detailed reason for rejecting this submission…"*, **maxLength 500** with a **"0/500" character counter**. / 单个文本域，占位符 "Please provide a detailed reason for rejecting this submission…"，最大 500 字符，带 "0/500" 字数计数。
  - **Footer buttons / 底部按钮:** **Cancel** (default) + **Send an email** (primary). / Cancel（默认）+ Send an email（主按钮）。
- On confirm, the activity status becomes **"Update Requested"** (its Action button greys out), and an **email is sent to the responsible person** (see Email templates below).
- After the responsible person edits and resubmits, the activity status becomes **"Updated"**, and the LM's **Request Update** button is clickable again.

**Activity status state machine / 活动状态机:**

| Current status / 当前状态 | Request Update button / 按钮 | On LM "Request Update" → / LM 打回后 | On responsible-person resubmit → / 负责人重新提交后 |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Submitted** | clickable / 可点 | → **Update Requested** + email sent | — |
| **Update Requested** | greyed / 置灰 | — (already requested) | → **Updated** |
| **Updated** | clickable / 可点 | → **Update Requested (round +1)** + email | → **Updated +1**, **+2**, … (counter increments each round) |
| **Updated +N** | clickable / 可点 | → **Update Requested (round N+1)** | → **Updated +(N+1)** |

```
Submitted ──Request Update──▶ Update Requested ──resubmit──▶ Updated
                                     ▲                          │
                                     └────── Request Update ─────┘   (each loop: counter +1 → "Updated +N")
```

**LM Approve / LM 通过:** when the LM is satisfied with **all** activities, they click the green **Approve** button (bottom-right) → the **cycle** status changes to **"Under admin review"**.

### UC-03 — Admin reviews & closes the cycle / Admin 审核并关闭周期 — *Hi-fi screens 6–8 (Admin review detail, Reason for Rejection modal, KPI cycle approval detail)*

Admin review detail (read-only activities, "LM approved by …" trail, Reject + Approve):

![R-400 admin review detail](artifacts/screenshots/r400-admin-detail.png)

Reason for Rejection modal (Admin):

![R-400 Reason for Rejection modal](artifacts/screenshots/r400-reject-modal.png)

KPI cycle approval detail (KPI-grouped, both LM + Admin approval trail lines):

![R-400 KPI cycle approval detail](artifacts/screenshots/r400-kpi-detail.png)

> 简述：LM 提交后，Admin 在部门层面整体审这个周期。能看到所有活动详情 + LM 的审批记录 "LM approved by [姓名] on [日期]"。活动表格和 LM 视图一样，但**没有逐条操作按钮** —— Admin 是在整个周期层面审。有疑问 → 点 Reject（弹框写原因 → 发邮件给 LM，LM 重新审、重新提交，周期状态保持 "Under admin review"）。满意 → 点 Approve，周期状态变 "Completed"，数据锁定，不可再编辑。

After the LM submits, the **Admin reviews the entire cycle at department level**. The Admin sees all activity details **plus the LM approval trail**: *"LM approved by [name] on [date]"* (e.g. "LM approved by Sarah on 22/03/2026").

**Detail page layout (Admin view) / Admin 详情页布局:**
- Same header as the LM view but the status tag reads **"Under admin review"**, and the LM approval line is shown.
- **Same activity tables as the LM view, but with NO per-row action buttons** — the Admin reviews at the **cycle level**, not activity by activity.
- Bottom-right: a red **Reject** button + a green **Approve** button.

**Admin Reject / Admin 打回:** if the Admin has a concern, they click **Reject** → a **"Reason for Rejection" modal** opens (textarea, counter 0/500, buttons **Cancel / Reject**). On confirm, an **email is sent to the Line Manager** (see templates), the LM re-reviews and resubmits, and the cycle status **stays "Under admin review"**.

**Admin Approve / Admin 通过:** when satisfied, the Admin clicks **Approve** → the cycle status becomes **"Completed"**, the underlying data is **locked** and can no longer be edited, and the cycle's data is used in reports.

**KPI cycle approval detail (layout note) / KPI 周期审批详情（布局说明）— Hi-fi screen 8:**
- Header e.g. *"KPIs Quarterly 1 2026"*, "Department C", with a trail like *"LM approved by Ahmed … / Admin approved by System Admin"* once approved.
- KPI tables list **per KPI** (KPI A, KPI B) with columns **Item | Responsible | Actual % | Attachment | Status (Submitted)** and the **Reject / Approve** buttons — i.e. **KPIs are listed per item, not grouped under milestones** like Projects are.

### Email templates / 邮件模板

> 简述：两封邮件。按系统现有邮件规范来：**主题用英文、短、最多一个变量**；**正文阿英双语**（阿语在上、英语在下，放在同一个 body 字段里）；问候语、字段排版、结尾要复用现有审批通知模板（最接近的是 INITIATIVE_MODIFY_LINE_* 那一套）。下面给的是英文内容；阿语镜像由系统模板补齐。

Per the system's email convention (English-only short subject with at most one variable; **bilingual Arabic + English body** stacked in the single `body` field, Arabic on top; reuse the greeting / label / closing boilerplate from the existing `INITIATIVE_MODIFY_LINE_*` templates), the two new templates carry the content below — **both the Arabic and English bodies are drafted here** (placeholders like `[User Name]` / `[Comment Text]` are language-neutral tokens substituted at send time).

**1) Request Update email — to the responsible person / 给负责人的"请更新"邮件**

- **Subject (EN only, short — system convention):** `Update Requested for Project: "[Project Title]"`
  - *Note: keep to the system's existing short-subject style; if the system convention prefers the entity name only, use that. Flagged for the dev to align with `INITIATIVE_MODIFY_LINE_REJECT` subject style.*
- **Body (single `body` field — Arabic on top, English below):**
  > عزيزي [User Name]،
  > طلب مديرك المباشر تحديثًا للمشروع "[Project Title]" ضمن الدورة [Cycle Name] ([Department Name]).
  > ملاحظة من المدير المباشر: "[Comment Text]".
  > يرجى مراجعة الملاحظة أعلاه وتحديث ما أدخلته وفقًا لذلك. [اضغط هنا] للانتقال إلى المشروع وإجراء التعديلات المطلوبة.
  > مع خالص التحية
  >
  > ———
  >
  > Dear [User Name],
  > Your line manager has requested an update for the project "[Project Title]" under the cycle [Cycle Name] ([Department Name]).
  > Comment from Line Manager: "[Comment Text]".
  > Please review the comment above and update your submission accordingly. [Click here] to go to the project and make the required changes.
  > Best Regards

**2) Reject email — to the Line Manager / 给 LM 的"驳回"邮件**

- **Subject (EN only, short — system convention):** `Cycle Rejected: [Type] — [Cycle Name] for [Department Name]`
  - *Note: align with the system's short-subject convention; the dev confirms whether to trim to a single variable.*
- **Body (single `body` field — Arabic on top, English below):**
  > عزيزي [User Name]،
  > تم رفض الدورة المقدَّمة لـ [Type] — [Cycle Name] ([Department Name]) من قِبل المسؤول وتتطلب مراجعتك.
  > ملاحظة من المسؤول: "[Comment Text]".
  > يرجى مراجعة الملاحظة أعلاه وإجراء التحديثات اللازمة على الأنشطة ذات الصلة وإعادة تقديم الدورة للموافقة. [اضغط هنا] للانتقال إلى الدورة.
  > مع خالص التحية
  >
  > ———
  >
  > Dear [User Name],
  > The cycle submission for [Type] — [Cycle Name] ([Department Name]) has been rejected by the admin and requires your review.
  > Comment from Admin: "[Comment Text]".
  > Please review the comment above, make the necessary updates to the relevant activities, and resubmit the cycle for approval. [Click here] to go to the cycle.
  > Best Regards

## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准

| # | Criterion / 标准 | Priority |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | A review record is **auto-created** for each cycle + department **when the cycle-initiation period closes** and it has at least one activity, with initial status **Under LM review**; an in-progress (not-yet-closed) cycle does **not** create a record | P0 |
| 2 | The list shows only the **current year's closed cycles** (in-progress cycles do not appear); columns are Cycle, Department, Type, Activities, Status, Action; the **Activities count is a blue clickable link** that opens the review detail | P0 |
| 3 | **Role visibility:** a Line Manager sees only their own department's cycles; an Admin sees all departments' cycles | P0 |
| 4 | The module is accessible **only** to Line Manager and Admin roles; other roles see no menu entry and are blocked from the routes | P0 |
| 5 | The filter row is **four multi-select dropdowns only** (placeholders "All Type", "All Cycle Initiation", "All Status", "All Department") + **Search** + **Reset** — **no free-text search box**; Cycle Initiation options depend on selected Type; Search + Reset behave correctly | P0 |
| 6 | Status pills are colored: **Under LM review** red/pink, **Under admin review** blue, **Completed** grey | P1 |
| 7 | Action column shows **Review** (actionable) for non-completed cycles where the current user is the responsible reviewer, and **View** (read-only) for Completed cycles | P0 |
| 8 | LM detail: header shows type + cycle, department, status tag; projects show project-manager name; **Projects are grouped by milestone**; **KPIs are listed per item** (not milestone-grouped) | P0 |
| 9 | Activity rows display **Actual %** and **Expenses (AED)** with the change shown (e.g. "15% ← from 0", "5000 ← from 0") plus their evidence attachments | P0 |
| 10 | LM **Request Update** is available **only on activities in status Submitted/Updated**; it opens the **"Request Update" modal** (textarea placeholder "Please provide a detailed reason for rejecting this submission…", maxLength 500 with a 0/500 counter, buttons **Cancel** / **Send an email**), and on confirm sets the activity to **Update Requested**, greys the button, and emails the responsible person | P0 |
| 11 | The activity **state machine** is enforced: Submitted → Update Requested → Updated → Updated +N (counter increments each loop); the button greys only while Update Requested | P0 |
| 12 | LM **Approve** (only when satisfied with all activities) moves the **cycle** to **Under admin review** | P0 |
| 13 | A cycle with **no resolved Line Manager** **skips the LM step** and starts directly in **Under admin review** (no admin substitutes as a fake LM) | P0 |
| 14 | Admin detail: same activity tables as LM but with **no per-row action buttons**; shows the **LM approval trail** "LM approved by [name] on [date]"; bottom-right **Reject** + **Approve** | P0 |
| 15 | Admin **Reject** opens the "Reason for Rejection" modal (0/500), emails the **Line Manager**, and the cycle status **stays Under admin review** | P0 |
| 16 | Admin **Approve** sets the cycle to **Completed**, **permanently locks** the underlying submissions (no further edits to actual % / expense / attachments, no re-submission, and **no re-open** in v3.4), and the data is used in reports | P0 |
| 17 | Two emails are sent with the specified content: **Request Update** to the responsible person, **Reject** to the Line Manager; subjects follow the system's short-subject convention; bodies are bilingual (AR + EN) | P0 |
| 18 | A **Completed** cycle is read-only everywhere: the detail page opens via **View** only, and any attempt to edit the underlying submissions is rejected | P0 |

> 简述：覆盖所有结果路径 —— LM 打回、LM 通过、Admin 驳回后 LM 重提、Admin 通过并锁定、角色可见性、无 LM 兜底、各种筛选、Projects 按里程碑分组 vs KPI 按条目列出。

| # | Setup / 前置 | Steps / 步骤 | Expected / 预期 |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | LM of Department A; a Projects bi-weekly cycle (January W2 2026) closed with activities under 2 milestones, all status Submitted | Open the module → find the cycle row → click **Review** | List shows the cycle (status **Under LM review**, red/pink pill, Action = Review). Detail header reads "Projects — January W2 2026 / Department A / Under LM review"; activities grouped under "Milestone 1" / "Milestone 2"; each row shows actual % and expense change |

| 3 | Continued from #2; responsible person edits & resubmits | Responsible person updates the activity; LM reopens detail | Activity status → **Updated**; LM's Request Update button is clickable again |

| 5 | LM satisfied with all activities | Click **Approve** | Cycle status → **Under admin review** (blue pill in list); it now appears in the Admin's queue | 
| 6 | Admin; the cycle from #5 | Open module → **Review** the cycle | Detail shows **Under admin review** tag + "LM approved by [name] on [date]"; same activity tables but **no per-row action buttons**; bottom-right Reject + Approve present | 
| 7 | Admin, same cycle | Click **Reject** → enter reason → Reject | Email sent to the LM; cycle status **stays Under admin review**; LM receives the reject email | 
| 8 | Continued; LM re-reviews and resubmits | LM opens the cycle, addresses comments, Approves again | Cycle returns to Admin queue, still Under admin review | 
| 9 | Admin satisfied | Click **Approve** | Cycle status → **Completed** (grey pill); list Action becomes **View** (read-only); detail opens read-only | 
| 10 | A Completed cycle | Attempt to edit the underlying actual % / expense / attachment for an activity in that cycle (via the normal submission screen) | Edit is **rejected / blocked** (cycle locked); value unchanged | 
| 11 | LM of Department A and an Admin, with cycles in Departments A, B, C | Each user opens the module | LM sees **only Department A** cycles; Admin sees **A, B, C** | 
| 12 | A KPI quarterly cycle in a department that has **no Line Manager** | An Admin opens the module | The cycle appears directly in **Under admin review** (LM step skipped); no admin acts as a fake LM; the Admin can Reject / Approve | 
| 13 | Mixed cycles (Projects/KPIs/Initiatives; various statuses; multiple departments) | Apply filters: Type = KPIs → check Cycle Initiation options become quarterly/monthly; Status = Completed; Department = one dept; Search; then Reset | Cycle Initiation options adapt to the selected Type; results filter correctly by status/department; Reset clears all filters | 
| 14 | A KPIs Quarterly 1 2026 cycle, Department C | Open the KPI cycle detail (LM and Admin) | KPIs are listed **per item** (KPI A, KPI B) with Item / Responsible / Actual % / Attachment / Status columns — **not** grouped under milestones (contrast with Projects in #1) | 
| 15 | An in-progress (not-yet-closed) cycle with activity | Open the module | The in-progress cycle does **not** appear; it enters the list only once its cycle-initiation period closes | 
| 16 | A non-LM, non-Admin user | Navigate to the module route directly | Access blocked; no menu entry visible |
