# [P1] R-585 — Temporary Cycle: Department-Level Assignment + Multiple Periods / 临时周期：部门级分配 + 多周期

> **Ticket number provisional (R-585) — confirm with PM / Feishu before approval. / 编号为临时占位（R-585），审批前请与 PM / 飞书核实。**

| | |
|---|---|
| **Version** | V3.4 |
| **Source / 来源** | Customer requirement raised at 2026-06-10 V3.4 planning meeting / 2026-06-10 V3.4 规划会议上客户提出的需求 |
| **Priority** | P1 |
| **Created** | 2026-06-15 |
| **PM status** | `draft` |
| **Builds on / 基于** | R-443 (Temporary Cycle Initiation), R-461 (View detail + assignment email) |

---

## Overview / 概述

> 简述：临时周期发起这个功能现在只能一个一个挑人，而且一个临时周期只能选一个上报期。客户希望：(A) 既能一个一个挑人，也能"一次选一整个部门"，把整个部门一次性纳入；(B) 一个临时周期能同时覆盖多个上报期。

The Temporary Cycle Initiation feature (Settings → Cycle Initiation Settings → Temporary Cycle Initiation) lets an admin open an ad-hoc reporting cycle for a chosen set of people. Two limitations surfaced in the 2026-06-10 V3.4 planning meeting:

1. The admin can only assign **individual users one at a time**. There is no way to target a whole department in a single action.
2. A single temporary cycle can only cover **one reporting period**. To open the same cycle across several periods, the admin must create separate records.

The customer asked for two things: **(A)** keep per-user picking *and* add the ability to select an entire department at once; **(B)** allow selecting **multiple periods** within one temporary cycle.

---

## The problem / 问题

> 简述：现在临时周期发起，要给一个部门 30 个人开周期，Admin 得在人员选择器里一个一个点 30 次，慢、容易漏人。而且一个临时周期只能选一个期（比如只能选 Q1），如果要同时覆盖 Q1 和 Q2，就得建两条记录、发两遍邮件、维护两份分配名单。客户的实际场景往往是"整个部门、跨多个期"，现在的工具不匹配。

**Assignee selection is per-user only.** To open a temporary cycle for an entire department of, say, 30 people, the admin must click each of the 30 users individually in the assignee picker. This is slow, error-prone (easy to miss someone), and has to be redone manually whenever the department's membership is referenced again.

**One period per cycle.** A temporary cycle today targets a single period (e.g. only Q1). If the admin needs the same cycle to cover both Q1 and Q2, they must create two separate records — duplicating the name, dates, and the entire assignee list, and triggering two separate assignment emails.

---

## Current behavior / 当前行为

> 简述：人员选择器其实已经是一棵"部门 + 人"的组织树，部门节点是显示出来的，但保存时系统只认到人这一层——选了部门节点不会被正确展开成成员。期目前是单选（项目/倡议是单选下拉，KPI 是单选级联）。

**Assignee selection.** The assignee field is a checkable organisation tree that renders departments as parent nodes and users as leaf nodes under them. The admin expands a department and ticks individual users. Although department nodes are visible in the tree, the system only persists down to the **user level** — selecting a department node does not currently translate into "all users in that department." Each saved assignee becomes one per-user row in the backend; there is no department-scoped assignment.

**Period selection.** The period control is **single-select**, and its type depends on the cycle type:
- Project type → a single-select dropdown of fortnightly options.
- KPI type → a single-select cascader (Quarterly → Q1–Q4, or Monthly → Jan–Dec).
- Initiative type → a single-select dropdown of months.

Even though the underlying storage and the data transfer objects already represent the period as a **list**, the form collects exactly one value and wraps it into a one-element list on save. So in practice one cycle = one period.

---

## Expected behavior / 期望行为

### A. Department + per-user selection / 部门级 + 单人级选择

> 简述：人员选择器要同时支持两种用法：(1) 勾一整个部门 = 把这个部门当前的所有成员一次性纳入；(2) 继续像现在一样单独勾人。两种可以混着用（勾一个部门 + 再单独加几个别的部门的人）。锁定项 1 已定：勾部门 = 按"保存当下"把该部门成员快照展开成一个个人，存的还是一个个人，不是活的部门链接——以后部门加人不会自动进这个已建好的周期。

The assignee picker must support **both** modes in the same field:

1. **Select a whole department** — ticking a department node includes **every member of that department** in one action.
2. **Select individual users** — exactly as today, tick individual people.

The two modes can be **mixed** in a single cycle (e.g. tick Department A as a whole, then additionally tick three named people from Department B).

**What "select a department" means (locked):** ticking a department **snapshot-expands** to that department's current members at save time — each becomes an individual assignee on the record. It is **not** a live link to the department. If the department later gains or loses members, an already-saved cycle is **not** retroactively changed. This keeps the assignee set stable and predictable for a cycle that has already been communicated by email, and matches how the data is stored (per-user rows). A ticked department node is therefore expanded to its member user IDs before save (no department node is ever sent as if it were a single user). / 勾部门 = 保存当下把该部门成员快照成一个个人；不是活链接；建好后部门成员变动不影响已存周期；保存前部门节点先展开成成员 userId。

The view-detail modal (R-461) continues to show the resolved **display names** of all assignees (not raw IDs), whether they were picked individually or expanded from a department.

### B. Multiple periods / 多周期

> 简述：一个临时周期能同时选多个期。比如 KPI 类型可以一次勾 Q1 + Q2 + Q3；倡议类型可以一次勾 Jan + Feb。选出来的多个期都属于同一条记录，共用同一个名称、起止日期、同一份分配名单、发一次邮件。列表"Period"列要把多个期都显示出来。

A single temporary cycle can target **multiple periods** at once:
- KPI type → select multiple quarters and/or months (e.g. Q1 + Q2 + Q3).
- Project type → select multiple fortnightly periods.
- Initiative type → select multiple months.

All selected periods belong to the **same** record — one cycle name, one start/end date pair, one assignee list, and **one** assignment email per assignee (not one email per period). The list page's **Period** column displays all selected periods for the row (e.g. comma-separated), not just the first.

| 变更前 / Before (single-select) | 变更后 / After (multi-select) |
|---|---|
| ![Period single-select](artifacts/screenshots/r585-period-before.png) | ![Period multi-select](artifacts/screenshots/r585-period-after.png) |
| Selecting one period fills the field; choosing another replaces it. / 只能选一个期，选第二个会替换第一个。 | Multiple periods selected as tags (checkboxes in the dropdown); all belong to one cycle. / 多个期以标签形式选中（下拉为复选框），同属一条周期。 |

**Period vs. date range (open):** the cycle still has an overall Start Date / End Date. Whether each selected period needs its own deadline/reminder, or whether all periods share the cycle's single date window, is an open question — see Open questions. The default assumption for this draft is **one shared date window for all selected periods**. / 默认所有期共用周期的一个起止日期窗口；是否每个期单独设截止/提醒为待澄清项。

### Out of scope / 范围外

- A live/dynamic department link that auto-updates a cycle's assignees when department membership changes (this draft uses a save-time snapshot). / 活动态部门链接（本稿用快照）。
- Per-user notification preferences / unsubscribe. / 用户级通知偏好。
- Changing the email template or adding per-period emails (one email per assignee regardless of period count). / 改邮件模板或按期发多封邮件。
- Push / in-app notifications. / 推送或应用内通知。

---

## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准

| # | Criterion / 标准 | Priority |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | The assignee picker supports selecting a **whole department** in one action; ticking a department includes all its current members as assignees | P0 |
| 2 | The assignee picker still supports selecting **individual users** one at a time, exactly as before | P0 |
| 3 | Department and individual selections can be **mixed** in a single cycle | P0 |
| 4 | Selecting a department **snapshot-expands** to its members at save time (stored as per-user assignees); later department membership changes do not alter an already-saved cycle | P0 |
| 5 | A single temporary cycle can target **multiple periods** at once (KPI: quarters/months; Project: fortnights; Initiative: months) | P0 |
| 6 | All selected periods belong to one record sharing one name, one date window, and one assignee list; **one** assignment email per assignee regardless of period count | P0 |
| 7 | The list page **Period** column shows all selected periods for a row, not just the first | P0 |
| 8 | Edit mode repopulates all previously-selected periods and all assignees (resolved display names, not IDs); View mode renders them all read-only | P0 |
| 9 | Selecting a department node expands to its member user IDs on save (never sends a department node as if it were a single user) | P0 |
| 10 | No regression in R-443 create/edit/delete or R-461 view-detail + assignment-email behavior | P0 |
| 11 | English and Arabic both render the picker, period control, list, and modal correctly | P1 |

---

## QA test scenario / QA 测试场景

| Setup | Steps | Expected |
|---|---|---|
| Admin role. A department (e.g. "Strategy Dept") with at least 3 members exists; at least one user belongs to a different department. KPI-type temporary cycle available. | 1. Settings → Cycle Initiation Settings → Temporary Cycle Initiation → Add. 2. Enter name, year, type = KPI, dates. 3. In the assignee picker, tick the whole "Strategy Dept" node, then additionally tick one individual user from another department. 4. In Period, select Q1 + Q2 + Q3 (multiple). 5. Save. 6. Reopen the row in View mode. 7. Reopen the row in Edit mode. 8. Check the list Period column. 9. Switch UI to Arabic and reopen the modal. | Step 3: department expands to all its members + the one extra user. Step 4: multiple periods accepted. Step 5: saved as one record; each assignee gets exactly one email. Step 6 (View): all assignee display names + all 3 periods shown read-only, no Save button. Step 7 (Edit): all assignees and all 3 periods repopulated correctly. Step 8: Period column lists all 3 periods. Step 9: picker, periods, and names render correctly in Arabic. |

---

## Proposed technical solution

> English-only section. PM does not need to review beyond this point.

Key insight from code investigation: **the multi-period change is almost entirely frontend** — the backend already stores periods as a list. The department-select is mostly a **frontend expansion** of an existing tree the picker already renders, plus a small save-path fix. No new tables or DDL are required.

### Reuse existing (no change needed)

- **Backend period storage already supports a list.** `TemporaryCycleEntity.period` is a single `String` column persisting a JSON-serialized list via `JSON.toJSONString(input.getPeriod())` — `service/.../cycle/impl/TemporaryCycleServiceImpl.java:152` (save) and `:171` (edit). Both `TemporaryCycleSaveInput.period` (`bo/input/TemporaryCycleSaveInput.java:33`) and the outputs (`bo/output/TemporaryCycleIDetailOutput.java:33`, `TemporaryCycleIListOutput.java:32`) are already `List<String>`. Detail/list queries already `JSON.parseArray(entity.getPeriod(), String.class)` (`TemporaryCycleServiceImpl.java:95`, `:116`). **No backend change for multi-period.**
- **Assignees already stored as per-user rows.** `sk_temporary_cycle_user` (`dao/.../entity/cycleInfo/TemporaryCycleUserEntity.java`) holds one `user_id` row per assignee; `saveUserList()` batch-inserts them (`TemporaryCycleServiceImpl.java:244`). A department expanded client-side to member user IDs persists with **no backend change**.
- **Org tree already includes departments.** The picker's `treeData` comes from `getUserTreeRequest()` and `transformUserOrgTree()` already builds department nodes (`value: 'dept_<id>'`) with user leaves (`value: <userId>`) — `frontend/src/pages/SystemConfiguration/CycleInitiationSetting/components/TemporaryCycleInitiation/index.tsx:212-231`. Department nodes are already rendered; the gap is purely in how a ticked department node is converted to user IDs on save.
- **R-461 email + view-detail** unchanged; `sendAssignmentEmails()` (`TemporaryCycleServiceImpl.java:219`) fires once per assignee.

### Frontend — new / changed work

File: `frontend/src/pages/SystemConfiguration/CycleInitiationSetting/components/TemporaryCycleInitiation/index.tsx`

1. **Period control → multi-select (section B).**
   - Project type: change the `Select` (`:548`) to `mode="multiple"`.
   - Initiative type: change the `Select` (`:567`) to `mode="multiple"`.
   - KPI type: the `Cascader` (`:559`) needs `multiple` (Arco Cascader supports `mode="multiple"`), or a redesign of the period model into a flat multi-select if mixed quarter+month selection is required (see Open questions).
   - `handleSaveAndEdit` (`:522`) currently wraps the single value: `period: data?.type == Kpi ? data?.period : [data?.period]` — change so the non-KPI branch passes the array directly (the control now yields an array) instead of `[data?.period]`.
   - Detail repopulation (`temporaryCycleDetail` onSuccess, `:486-492`) currently does `period: res?.type == Kpi ? res?.period : res?.period[0]` — change to keep the full list for all types.
   - `getPeriodLabel` (`:254`) and the list Period column (`:350-354`) must render **all** periods (join the list), not just `periods?.[1]` / first element.

2. **Department expansion on save (section A).**
   - Today `handleSaveAndEdit` maps each selected tree value through `getSecondElement = str => str.split('_')[2]` (`:520`, `:525-528`). For a user composite key `user_<dept>_<userId>_<idx>` this yields the userId. For a **department node** `dept_<id>` it yields `undefined`.
   - New logic: when a selected node key starts with `dept_`, walk that department subtree in `orgTreeData` and collect all descendant **user** leaf `userId`s; when it is a `user_` key, extract the userId as today. De-duplicate the union (a user picked both individually and via their department counts once). Send the resulting flat `List<Long>` userIds as `userList` — backend unchanged.
   - This change enables department selection (A) and makes a ticked department node resolve to its members instead of an empty reference.

3. **Translations** — any new helper text (e.g. multi-select placeholders) added to `t_translation` plus fallback JSON `src/locale/en/cycleInitiationSetting.json` + `src/locale/arEG/cycleInitiationSetting.json`.

### Backend — verify only

- Confirm `period` JSON list round-trips for >1 element on save/edit/detail/list (the code already does this; add/confirm a test with multiple periods).
- Confirm `saveUserList` and the edit-time user delta (`TemporaryCycleServiceImpl.java:185-196`) behave correctly when a department expands to many user IDs (it should — it is a plain list).
- No new endpoints, no new tables, no DDL.

### Effort estimate

- Frontend: ~1.5 days (multi-select period controls + period round-trip + display, department-expansion + dedupe on save).
- Backend: ~0.25 day (verification + a multi-period/multi-user test).
- QA: ~0.5 day.
- **Total: ~2.25 dev-days.**

---

## Open questions / 待澄清

1. ~~**Department snapshot vs. live link**~~ — **Resolved (Amir 2026-06-17):** save-time **snapshot** (not a live link). See Locked decision 1.
2. ~~**Mixed department + individual**~~ — **Resolved:** yes, mixing allowed (whole department + extra individuals). See Locked decision 2.
3. ~~**Per-period deadline/reminder**~~ — **Resolved (Amir 2026-06-17):** **one shared date window + one email** per assignee for all selected periods (no per-period deadline/reminder). See Locked decision 4.
4. ~~**KPI cascader multi-select shape**~~ — **Resolved (Amir 2026-06-17):** **mixed granularity is allowed** (e.g. Q1 + Feb in one cycle). The KPI period control must support selecting across quarters and months together. See Locked decision 5.

---

## Locked decisions / 已锁定决策

1. **Department selection = save-time snapshot, not a live link.** Ticking a department expands to its current members at save time; later membership changes do not propagate to an already-saved cycle. Locked (Amir 2026-06-17).
2. **Department-tick and per-user selection are mixable** in one cycle. Locked (Amir 2026-06-17).
3. **A single temporary cycle can target multiple periods at once.** Locked (Amir 2026-06-17).
4. **All selected periods share one date window and one assignment email per assignee** — no per-period deadline/reminder, one email regardless of period count. Locked (Amir 2026-06-17).
5. **Mixed period granularity is allowed** — the admin can combine quarters and months (e.g. Q1 + Feb) in one cycle; the KPI period control supports cross-granularity multi-select. Locked (Amir 2026-06-17).

---

## Related PRDs / 相关 PRD

- **R-443** — original Temporary Cycle Initiation (Settings → Cycle Initiation Settings). Introduced the per-user picker and single-period model this PRD extends.
- [**R-461** Temporary Cycle Initiation — Email + View Detail](../V3.3/[R-461]-temporary-cycle-enhancements.md) — added the assignment email and read-only view modal; both are reused unchanged here.

content.content:
1	# [P2] R-572 — Auto-Save Draft Layer / 自动保存草稿层
2	
3	| | |
4	|---|---|
5	| **Version** | V3.3+hotfix.2 |
6	| **Carried from** | V3.3 (UAT showed partial implementation; this is a redesign, not a continuation) |
7	| **Priority** | P2 |
8	| **Source / 来源** | Customer feedback + V3.3 UAT findings |
9	| **Created** | 2026-06-09 |
10	| **PM status** | `draft` |
11	| **Scope / 范围** | Project + Initiative + KPI — all three create/edit forms |
12	
13	---
14	
15	## The problem / 问题
16	
17	> 简述：今天用户在 Project/Initiative/KPI 编辑表单里填写内容，但系统的保存行为有几个问题:(1) 自动保存直接写到生产数据表上（live record），导致编辑发布过的记录时,用户每打几个字,生产数据就会被改一次,其他人立刻看到部分修改;(2) Project 和 Initiative 的第二/三步只显示"已保存"的假提示,实际并没有保存任何内容;(3) 用户中途关掉浏览器,下次回来找不到自己之前的草稿,因为草稿 ID 存在 sessionStorage 里,关掉标签页就丢了。
18	
19	Auto-save was added in V3.3 to prevent data loss on the 10-minute session timeout. The implementation has four issues that emerged from UAT and code review:
20	
21	1. **Auto-save writes directly to the live record on Initiative and KPI.** When a user opens an existing Published initiative or KPI and types a single character, three seconds later that change is committed to the production table. Other users see partial edits. Reports and KPI calculations include uncommitted data. Cancel cannot undo this.
22	
23	2. **Auto-save indicators on Steps 2 and 3 are fake.** For Project and Initiative, only Step 1 has working auto-save. Steps 2 and 3 render a label that just shows the current clock time as if data had been saved — but nothing is actually written. Closing the browser mid-Step-2 loses all milestone/activity edits.
24	
25	3. **Cross-session resume does not work.** Draft pointers are stored in `sessionStorage`, which is cleared on tab close. The user cannot find their own in-progress work after reopening the system, even on the same device.
26	
27	4. **Abandoned drafts pollute the production tables.** Every aborted "Add" that included even one keystroke leaves a `status = Draft` row in the main entity table. Over time these accumulate and appear in admin filters.
28	
29	The root cause is one architectural decision: auto-save and explicit Save share the same destination (the main table). The fix separates them.
30	
31	**Current state — Project Step 2 today, showing the static fake "Saved" badge that doesn't reflect any real save:**
32	
33	![current](artifacts/screenshots/auto-save/current-project-step2.png)
34	
35	---
36	
37	## Expected behavior / 期望行为
38	
39	> 简述：把自动保存和正式保存彻底分开。用户编辑的时候每隔几秒自动保存到一个独立的草稿层(不是生产表),用户关浏览器、切设备都能恢复;只有点 Save / Submit 按钮才会真正写到生产表,触发审批流。三种用户场景:Add new 中途取消 / Edit 中途取消 / 最终 Save，每种都有清晰的预期行为。
40	
41	The fix is to introduce a **separate draft layer** that auto-save writes to. The live record is only ever modified by explicit Save / Submit clicks, the same as today's manual save behavior. The user does not click any extra buttons — the new layer is invisible to them, but its effects are visible: their work is preserved across sessions and devices, and the live record never shows half-typed content.
42	
43	### Three user scenarios — all must work
44	
45	#### Scenario A — Add new with cancel halfway / 新建中途取消
46	
47	> 简述：用户点 Add 新建一个项目,填了一半,中途点 Cancel 走开了。下次再点 Add 进来,系统会问"你有未保存的修改,要恢复吗?"。点 Restore,之前填的所有内容(不管是第一步、第二步还是第三步)都回到表单里。
48	
49	1. User clicks **Add Project** (or Add Initiative / Add KPI)
50	2. User fills Step 1 fields (name, dates, owner, etc.)
51	3. User goes to Step 2, adds 2 milestones
52	4. User clicks **Cancel** (or just closes the browser tab)
53	5. User comes back later, clicks **Add Project** again
54	6. → System shows modal: **"You have unsaved changes from 6 Jun 2026, 5:07 PM. Would you like to restore them, or discard and start fresh?"**
55	7. User clicks **Restore** → form opens with all earlier content prefilled, on the same step they were last on
56	8. User finishes filling, clicks **Submit** → record is created in the real database, draft cleared
57	
58	If at step 5 the user clicks **Discard** instead → the draft is deleted, an empty new form opens.
59	
60	**Visual — restore prompt on Add new:**
61	
62	![restore modal add](artifacts/screenshots/auto-save/expected-restore-modal-add.png)
63	
64	**Visual — form prefilled after clicking Restore:**
65	
66	![form prefilled](artifacts/screenshots/auto-save/expected-form-prefilled.png)
67	
68	#### Scenario B — Edit existing record with cancel halfway / 编辑中途取消
69	
70	> 简述：用户点 Edit 编辑一个已发布的项目,修改了第一步的描述,然后跳到第二步又改了一个 milestone,然后关掉浏览器(没点 Save)。整个过程中,这个项目的生产数据不会有任何改动 — 别人看到的还是原来的样子。下次用户回来点 Edit,系统问要不要恢复修改。点 Restore,两步的修改都回来。点 Discard,生产版本干干净净显示出来。
71	
72	1. User clicks the Edit pencil on a Published project
73	2. User modifies the description on Step 1
74	3. User goes to Step 2, edits a milestone weight
75	4. User closes the browser tab — **does not click Save**
76	5. During steps 2-4, the live record is **never** touched. Other users / reports / dashboards see the original unchanged data.
77	6. User returns later, clicks the Edit pencil on the **same** project
78	7. → System shows modal: **"You have unsaved changes from 6 Jun 2026, 5:07 PM. Restore / Discard"**
79	8. User clicks **Restore** → form opens with **both** the Step 1 description edit AND the Step 2 milestone edit restored
80	9. User finishes, clicks **Save** → all changes are now committed to the real database
81	
82	If user clicks **Discard** at step 8 → draft is cleared, form opens with the original (untouched) record data, fresh start.
83	
84	**Critical correctness property:** Between step 2 and step 9 (Save click), the live record is never modified. This is the most important behavioral change vs today's broken auto-save.
85	
86	#### Scenario C — Final Save commits everything to the real DB / 最终保存
87	
88	> 简述：用户点了 Save 之后,所有自动保存的内容(无论从哪一步累积来的)一次性写到正式数据表,草稿被清掉。从这一刻起,数据是 official 的,其他人能看到。
89	
90	1. User has been editing — auto-save has been writing to the draft layer in the background
91	2. User clicks **Save** (or **Submit** depending on the step / workflow)
92	3. → System runs validation (existing logic — required fields, business rules, etc.)
93	4. → If validation passes: all draft data is committed to the real database in one atomic operation; the draft row is deleted
94	5. → If validation fails: error markers appear on the bad fields, **the draft row is kept** (user doesn't lose their work because a required field is empty); user fixes and clicks Save again
95	
96	After successful Save, if the user revisits the same record, the restore prompt does not appear — because there is no longer a draft (it was consumed by the Save).
97	
98	---
99	
100	## Per-module behavior / 各模块的差异
101	
102	### Project
103	
104	- 3 steps (Basic info → Milestones → Review)
105	- Auto-save fires on every step including Steps 2/3 (no more fake badges)
106	- Both Step 1 fields AND Step 2 milestones are captured in the draft
107	- Restore brings back data from all 3 steps
108	
109	### Initiative
110	
111	- 3 steps (Basic info → Activities → Review)
112	- Same shape as Project — auto-save on every step, restore covers all steps
113	- Note: editing during Pending Approval is a separate ticket (R-577 Return). The auto-save layer applies independently and works on any editable status.
114	
115	**Visual — restore prompt on Initiative:**
116	
117	![restore modal initiative](artifacts/screenshots/auto-save/expected-restore-modal-initiative.png)
118	
119	### KPI
120	
121	- Single page (form + KPI list table together, no step wizard)
122	- Same draft layer applies — typing triggers auto-save, indicator shows status, restore prompt works the same way
123	- Simpler than Project / Initiative because there's only one screen of data to restore
124	- Editing an existing KPI no longer overwrites the live record during typing — same correctness fix as Initiative
125	
126	---
127	
128	## The status indicator / 保存状态提示
129	
130	> 简述：表单的顶部右边会显示一个状态文字,告诉用户系统的保存状态。"Saving…"表示后台正在保存,"Saved at HH:MM"表示已经保存到草稿层。每个步骤、每个模块的显示位置和格式都一样。
131	
132	A single inline label sits at the top-right of every wizard step (or top-right of the KPI page). Three possible states:
133	
134	| State / 状态 | Display / 显示 | When / 什么时候 |
135	|---|---|---|
136	| Saving | `● Saving…` (grey) | User has typed but the 3-second debounce hasn't fired the save yet |
137	| Saved | `● Saved at HH:MM` (green) | Auto-save succeeded, draft layer has the latest data |
138	| Error | `● Couldn't save — Retry` (red, clickable) | Network drop or backend error; clicking Retry re-attempts |
139	
140	When the user has not touched the form yet (e.g. just opened the page), no indicator shows — the form looks clean.
141	
142	**Visual — indicator during Saving:**
143	
144	![saving](artifacts/screenshots/auto-save/expected-saving.png)
145	
146	**Visual — indicator after Saved:**
147	
148	![saved](artifacts/screenshots/auto-save/expected-saved.png)
149	
150	---
151	
152	## Restore prompt — the only entry point / 草稿入口
153	
154	> 简述：用户不会在列表页看到"我有N个草稿"之类的提示,也没有专门的"草稿"标签页。唯一的入口是:用户再次点 Add / Edit 进入表单时,如果系统在草稿层里发现匹配的草稿(同一个用户,同一个记录),才会弹出"要不要恢复"的弹窗。
155	
156	Drafts are private to the user who created them, and they're only surfaced when the user is about to do the same work again. There is no banner on the list page, no Drafts tab, no notification.
157	
158	The restore prompt:
159	
160	> **Unsaved changes found**
161	>
162	> You have unsaved changes from **6 Jun 2026, 5:07 PM**. Would you like to restore them, or discard and start fresh?
163	>
164	> [Discard]  [Restore]
165	
166	- **Restore** → loads the draft into the form, navigates to the step the user was on
167	- **Discard** → deletes the draft row; opens the form fresh (empty for Add, prefilled from live record for Edit)
168	
169	Lookup key: `(user_id, entity_type, entity_id)`. For Create mode entity_id is null; for Edit mode entity_id is the record's id. So there's one draft slot per user per record, and Add Project drafts don't conflict with Edit Project drafts.
170	
171	Single version per slot — newer auto-save overwrites older. No version history.
172	
173	---
174	
175	## What stays exactly the same / 不变的部分
176	
177	The redesign is purely additive. Everything in the current product behaves identically:
178	
179	| Today's behavior | After change |
180	|---|---|
181	| Save button — runs validation, writes to main table | **Unchanged** |
182	| Submit button — full validation + triggers approval workflow | **Unchanged** |
183	| Cancel button — discards in-form changes | Unchanged (and also deletes the draft row with confirm prompt) |
184	| All status values (Draft, Pending, Published, etc.) | Unchanged |
185	| Approval routing, line manager resolution, emails | Unchanged |
186	| List filters, KPI calculations, dashboards, reports | Unchanged |
187	| Edit-on-Published copy table behavior (Project's `sk_project_copy`) | Unchanged |
188	| Permission checks, role-based visibility | Unchanged |
189	
190	No new statuses. No new approval logic. No new business rules. The user clicks the same buttons in the same places.
191	
192	---
193	
194	## Cleanup rules / 清理规则
195	
196	| Event / 事件 | Draft row / 草稿行 |
197	|---|---|
198	| Auto-save fires successfully | Created (if absent) or updated |
199	| User clicks **Save** and validation passes | **Deleted** (data is in main table) |
200	| User clicks **Submit** and validation passes | **Deleted** (data is in main table, workflow triggered) |
201	| User clicks **Cancel** | **Deleted** (with confirm prompt) |
202	| Save or Submit fails validation | **Kept** — user fixes errors and retries |
203	| User closes browser tab | **Kept** — restorable on next visit |
204	| 60 days idle | Auto-purged by scheduled job |
205	
206	---
207	
208	## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准
209	
210	| # | Criterion | Priority |
211	|---|---|---|
212	| 1 | Auto-save fires 3 seconds after the user stops typing, on every step / every module | P0 |
213	| 2 | Auto-save also fires when user clicks Next / Previous between steps | P0 |
214	| 3 | Auto-save writes only to the draft layer — Project/Initiative/KPI main tables are never modified by auto-save | P0 |
215	| 4 | Editing a Published Initiative or KPI does not change the live record during typing | P0 |
216	| 5 | Status indicator (Saving / Saved at HH:MM / Couldn't save) is visible and accurate on every step | P0 |
217	| 6 | Step 2 and Step 3 of Project and Initiative actually save form changes (no more fake badges) | P0 |
218	| 7 | Closing the browser mid-edit and reopening the same Add/Edit form shows the restore prompt with a timestamp | P0 |
219	| 8 | Restore prefills the form with **all** step data (Step 1 + Step 2 + Step 3 for Project/Initiative, or full form for KPI) | P0 |
220	| 9 | Restore navigates to the step the user was last on | P1 |
221	| 10 | Discard deletes the draft row and opens the form fresh | P0 |
222	| 11 | Save (existing button) commits all draft data to the real database with full validation; draft row deleted on success | P0 |
223	| 12 | Submit (existing button) triggers the existing approval workflow; draft deleted on success | P0 |
224	| 13 | Save / Submit failure due to validation keeps the draft row intact | P0 |
225	| 14 | Cross-device: a draft created on Browser A is restorable from Browser B (different device) | P1 |
226	| 15 | Drafts idle for **60 days** are auto-purged (extended from 30 per Amir 2026-06-17 — the strategy-planning phase runs 1–2 months, during which drafts may sit unsubmitted) | P1 |
227	| 16 | Auto-save events do NOT write to the field-level history log (R-430) — only Save and Submit do | P0 |
228	| 17 | One draft slot per (user, entity_type, entity_id) — newer auto-save overwrites older | P0 |
229	
230	---
231	
232	## QA test scenarios / QA 测试场景
233	
234	**Add new flow — each module**
235	- Open Add Project / Add Initiative / Add KPI
236	- Fill some fields, wait 3 seconds → indicator shows "Saved at HH:MM"
237	- Close browser tab
238	- Reopen Add → restore modal appears with the saved timestamp
239	- Click Restore → form prefilled with what was typed
240	- Click Discard → form opens empty
241	
242	**Edit flow — each module**
243	- Open Edit on a Published Project / Initiative / KPI
244	- Type a change in any field
245	- Close browser without clicking Save
246	- Verify (via DB or another user's view) — the live record is unchanged
247	- Reopen Edit on the same record → restore modal appears
248	- Click Restore → form shows the modified state
249	- Click Save → live record now updated, draft deleted, modal does not appear on next visit
250	
251	**Multi-step coverage (Project/Initiative)**
252	- Add new, fill Step 1, click Next, add 2 milestones on Step 2, click Cancel
253	- Reopen Add → modal appears, click Restore
254	- Verify: form opens on Step 2 (or whichever step was last), Step 1 data is intact, Step 2 milestones are intact
255	
256	**Save / Submit (no regression)**
257	- After auto-save, click Save with valid fields → success, draft deleted, real record updated
258	- After auto-save, click Save with required field empty → validation error, no DB write, draft intact
259	- After auto-save, click Submit → existing approval workflow triggers, status flips, draft deleted
260	
261	**Cross-device**
262	- Auto-save on Browser A (device 1), close tab
263	- Log in on Browser B (device 2), open the same Add/Edit form
264	- Restore modal appears with the draft from device 1
265	
266	**Auto-purge**
267	- Create a draft, leave for 60 days, run purge job → draft deleted
268	
269	**History log coordination (R-430)**
270	- Auto-save fires repeatedly while typing → no new entries in the field-level history log
271	- Click Save → one new entry in the history log for this Save event
272	
273	---
274	
275	## Proposed Technical Solution
276	
277	> English-only section. PM does not need to read past this point.
278	
279	### High-level approach
280	
281	Introduce a single new database table that stores in-flight form snapshots, keyed by user and entity. Three thin endpoints (load / save / delete) for the frontend to call. A shared React hook that wraps the debounce + indicator state. No changes to existing save / submit endpoints, status enums, validation rules, or workflow logic.
282	
283	### Database
284	
285	One new table:
286	
287	```sql
288	CREATE TABLE sk_record_draft (
289	    draft_id      BIGINT      NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
290	    user_id       BIGINT      NOT NULL,
291	    entity_type   VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'PROJECT | INITIATIVE | KPI',
292	    entity_id     BIGINT      DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'NULL for Create, set for Edit',
293	    current_step  INT         DEFAULT 1,
294	    payload_json  JSON        NOT NULL COMMENT 'Full form snapshot — no validation enforced',
295	    created_at    DATETIME    NOT NULL,
296	    updated_at    DATETIME    NOT NULL,
297	    PRIMARY KEY (draft_id),
298	    UNIQUE KEY uk_user_entity (user_id, entity_type, entity_id),
299	    KEY idx_updated_at (updated_at)
300	);
301	```
302	
303	No changes to existing tables. No new columns on `sk_project` / `sk_initiative` / `sk_kpis`.
304	
305	### Backend
306	
307	Three generic endpoints:
308	
309	| Method | Path | Purpose |
310	|---|---|---|
311	| POST | `/api/draft/save` | Upsert draft for current user. Body: `{entity_type, entity_id, current_step, payload_json}`. No validation. |
312	| GET | `/api/draft/load` | Return draft for current user. Query: `?entity_type=...&entity_id=...`. 404 if none. |
313	| DELETE | `/api/draft/delete` | Delete the draft. Called on Save / Submit success and on Cancel confirm. |
314	
315	Lives in `RecordDraftController` + `RecordDraftService` + `RecordDraftEntity`. Plus a `@Scheduled` purge job that deletes rows where `updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 60 DAY`.
316	
317	Existing save endpoints (`/api/project/save`, `/api/initiative/save`, `/api/kpis/saveKpis`, etc.) are **untouched** in their behavior. After this change the `autoSaveFlag` parameter and `isCompleted: false` payload field can be removed from those endpoints — nothing will be calling them in auto-save mode.
318	
319	### Frontend
320	
321	**New shared code** (under `frontend/packages/common/src/`):
322	- `hooks/useAutoSaveDraft.ts` — encapsulates the 3-second debounce, status state, beforeunload guard, and the three new endpoint calls. Mounted once per page; all wizard steps share the same hook instance.
323	- `components/AutoSaveStatus/index.tsx` — the inline indicator.
324	- `components/RestoreDraftModal/index.tsx` — the restore prompt.
325	
326	**Per-module changes** — mostly removals:
327	
328	| Module | Files affected | Change |
329	|---|---|---|
330	| Project | `ProjectsAddOrEdit.tsx`, `ProjectAddForm.tsx`, Step 2/3 components | Remove hardcoded static badges. Remove sessionStorage logic and `isCompleted/autoSaveFlag` from auto-save payloads. Mount the shared hook at page level. |
331	| Initiative | `InitiativesAddOrEdit.tsx`, `InitiativesAddForm.tsx`, Step 2/3 components | Same shape as Project. |
332	| KPI | `AddKpi/index.tsx` | Replace sessionStorage logic. Remove `autoSaveFlag` from save payloads. Use the shared hook. |
333	
334	### Migration
335	
336	None needed. Existing Draft-status rows in the main tables continue to work through the existing flow. The new `sk_record_draft` table starts empty.
337	
338	### Effort estimate
339	
340	- Backend: ~1 day (new entity + service + controller + purge job)
341	- Frontend common: ~1.5 days (hook + status component + restore modal)
342	- Frontend integration: ~2 days (wire into Project / Initiative / KPI — can parallelize)
343	- Cleanup of old sessionStorage / autoSaveFlag code: ~0.5 day
344	- QA pass: ~2 days
345	- **Total: ~7 dev-days**
346	
347	### Edge cases to verify
348	
349	| Case | Expected behavior |
350	|---|---|
351	| User's draft exists but the original record was deleted by an admin | Restore loads the draft. On Save, existing "record not found" error fires; user can discard. Optional follow-up: cascade-delete drafts when entity is deleted. |
352	| Draft is stale relative to the live record (another user edited the original) | Restore loads the draft as-is. On Save, last-write-wins (same as today's edit behavior). |
353	| Two tabs of the same Add/Edit form open at once | Both share the same draft slot (unique by user+entity). Last auto-save wins. No conflict prompt. |
354	| Network drop during auto-save | Indicator shows "Couldn't save — Retry" in red. Hook holds the pending payload and retries on next field change. |
355	| User's role changes between starting and resuming a draft | Draft loads regardless. Save / Submit applies current role permissions — same as today. |
356	
357	---
358	
359	## Open questions / 待澄清
360	
361	None. Design decisions locked by PM (Eugene) on 2026-06-09:
362	
363	- Auto-save destination is a dedicated `sk_record_draft` table (not the main entity tables)
364	- Three-tier model: auto-save → draft layer | Save → main table with Draft status | Submit → main table with Pending Approval (or workflow equivalent)
365	- One draft per user per record, no version history
366	- Restore prompt is the only entry point — no banner on list page, no Drafts tab
367	- 60-day auto-purge for inactive drafts (extended from 30 per Amir 2026-06-17)
368	- All three modules (Project, Initiative, KPI), both Create and Edit modes
369	- Indicator format consistent across all modules and all steps
370

file.content:
# [P2] R-572 — Auto-Save Draft Layer / 自动保存草稿层

| | |
|---|---|
| **Version** | V3.3+hotfix.2 |
| **Carried from** | V3.3 (UAT showed partial implementation; this is a redesign, not a continuation) |
| **Priority** | P2 |
| **Source / 来源** | Customer feedback + V3.3 UAT findings |
| **Created** | 2026-06-09 |
| **PM status** | `draft` |
| **Scope / 范围** | Project + Initiative + KPI — all three create/edit forms |

---

## The problem / 问题

> 简述：今天用户在 Project/Initiative/KPI 编辑表单里填写内容，但系统的保存行为有几个问题:(1) 自动保存直接写到生产数据表上（live record），导致编辑发布过的记录时,用户每打几个字,生产数据就会被改一次,其他人立刻看到部分修改;(2) Project 和 Initiative 的第二/三步只显示"已保存"的假提示,实际并没有保存任何内容;(3) 用户中途关掉浏览器,下次回来找不到自己之前的草稿,因为草稿 ID 存在 sessionStorage 里,关掉标签页就丢了。

Auto-save was added in V3.3 to prevent data loss on the 10-minute session timeout. The implementation has four issues that emerged from UAT and code review:

1. **Auto-save writes directly to the live record on Initiative and KPI.** When a user opens an existing Published initiative or KPI and types a single character, three seconds later that change is committed to the production table. Other users see partial edits. Reports and KPI calculations include uncommitted data. Cancel cannot undo this.

2. **Auto-save indicators on Steps 2 and 3 are fake.** For Project and Initiative, only Step 1 has working auto-save. Steps 2 and 3 render a label that just shows the current clock time as if data had been saved — but nothing is actually written. Closing the browser mid-Step-2 loses all milestone/activity edits.

3. **Cross-session resume does not work.** Draft pointers are stored in `sessionStorage`, which is cleared on tab close. The user cannot find their own in-progress work after reopening the system, even on the same device.

4. **Abandoned drafts pollute the production tables.** Every aborted "Add" that included even one keystroke leaves a `status = Draft` row in the main entity table. Over time these accumulate and appear in admin filters.

The root cause is one architectural decision: auto-save and explicit Save share the same destination (the main table). The fix separates them.

**Current state — Project Step 2 today, showing the static fake "Saved" badge that doesn't reflect any real save:**

![current](artifacts/screenshots/auto-save/current-project-step2.png)

---

## Expected behavior / 期望行为

> 简述：把自动保存和正式保存彻底分开。用户编辑的时候每隔几秒自动保存到一个独立的草稿层(不是生产表),用户关浏览器、切设备都能恢复;只有点 Save / Submit 按钮才会真正写到生产表,触发审批流。三种用户场景:Add new 中途取消 / Edit 中途取消 / 最终 Save，每种都有清晰的预期行为。

The fix is to introduce a **separate draft layer** that auto-save writes to. The live record is only ever modified by explicit Save / Submit clicks, the same as today's manual save behavior. The user does not click any extra buttons — the new layer is invisible to them, but its effects are visible: their work is preserved across sessions and devices, and the live record never shows half-typed content.

### Three user scenarios — all must work

#### Scenario A — Add new with cancel halfway / 新建中途取消

> 简述：用户点 Add 新建一个项目,填了一半,中途点 Cancel 走开了。下次再点 Add 进来,系统会问"你有未保存的修改,要恢复吗?"。点 Restore,之前填的所有内容(不管是第一步、第二步还是第三步)都回到表单里。

1. User clicks **Add Project** (or Add Initiative / Add KPI)
2. User fills Step 1 fields (name, dates, owner, etc.)
3. User goes to Step 2, adds 2 milestones
4. User clicks **Cancel** (or just closes the browser tab)
5. User comes back later, clicks **Add Project** again
6. → System shows modal: **"You have unsaved changes from 6 Jun 2026, 5:07 PM. Would you like to restore them, or discard and start fresh?"**
7. User clicks **Restore** → form opens with all earlier content prefilled, on the same step they were last on
8. User finishes filling, clicks **Submit** → record is created in the real database, draft cleared

If at step 5 the user clicks **Discard** instead → the draft is deleted, an empty new form opens.

**Visual — restore prompt on Add new:**

![restore modal add](artifacts/screenshots/auto-save/expected-restore-modal-add.png)

**Visual — form prefilled after clicking Restore:**

![form prefilled](artifacts/screenshots/auto-save/expected-form-prefilled.png)

#### Scenario B — Edit existing record with cancel halfway / 编辑中途取消

> 简述：用户点 Edit 编辑一个已发布的项目,修改了第一步的描述,然后跳到第二步又改了一个 milestone,然后关掉浏览器(没点 Save)。整个过程中,这个项目的生产数据不会有任何改动 — 别人看到的还是原来的样子。下次用户回来点 Edit,系统问要不要恢复修改。点 Restore,两步的修改都回来。点 Discard,生产版本干干净净显示出来。

1. User clicks the Edit pencil on a Published project
2. User modifies the description on Step 1
3. User goes to Step 2, edits a milestone weight
4. User closes the browser tab — **does not click Save**
5. During steps 2-4, the live record is **never** touched. Other users / reports / dashboards see the original unchanged data.
6. User returns later, clicks the Edit pencil on the **same** project
7. → System shows modal: **"You have unsaved changes from 6 Jun 2026, 5:07 PM. Restore / Discard"**
8. User clicks **Restore** → form opens with **both** the Step 1 description edit AND the Step 2 milestone edit restored
9. User finishes, clicks **Save** → all changes are now committed to the real database

If user clicks **Discard** at step 8 → draft is cleared, form opens with the original (untouched) record data, fresh start.

**Critical correctness property:** Between step 2 and step 9 (Save click), the live record is never modified. This is the most important behavioral change vs today's broken auto-save.

#### Scenario C — Final Save commits everything to the real DB / 最终保存

> 简述：用户点了 Save 之后,所有自动保存的内容(无论从哪一步累积来的)一次性写到正式数据表,草稿被清掉。从这一刻起,数据是 official 的,其他人能看到。

1. User has been editing — auto-save has been writing to the draft layer in the background
2. User clicks **Save** (or **Submit** depending on the step / workflow)
3. → System runs validation (existing logic — required fields, business rules, etc.)
4. → If validation passes: all draft data is committed to the real database in one atomic operation; the draft row is deleted
5. → If validation fails: error markers appear on the bad fields, **the draft row is kept** (user doesn't lose their work because a required field is empty); user fixes and clicks Save again

After successful Save, if the user revisits the same record, the restore prompt does not appear — because there is no longer a draft (it was consumed by the Save).

---

## Per-module behavior / 各模块的差异

### Project

- 3 steps (Basic info → Milestones → Review)
- Auto-save fires on every step including Steps 2/3 (no more fake badges)
- Both Step 1 fields AND Step 2 milestones are captured in the draft
- Restore brings back data from all 3 steps

### Initiative

- 3 steps (Basic info → Activities → Review)
- Same shape as Project — auto-save on every step, restore covers all steps
- Note: editing during Pending Approval is a separate ticket (R-577 Return). The auto-save layer applies independently and works on any editable status.

**Visual — restore prompt on Initiative:**

![restore modal initiative](artifacts/screenshots/auto-save/expected-restore-modal-initiative.png)

### KPI

- Single page (form + KPI list table together, no step wizard)
- Same draft layer applies — typing triggers auto-save, indicator shows status, restore prompt works the same way
- Simpler than Project / Initiative because there's only one screen of data to restore
- Editing an existing KPI no longer overwrites the live record during typing — same correctness fix as Initiative

---

## The status indicator / 保存状态提示

> 简述：表单的顶部右边会显示一个状态文字,告诉用户系统的保存状态。"Saving…"表示后台正在保存,"Saved at HH:MM"表示已经保存到草稿层。每个步骤、每个模块的显示位置和格式都一样。

A single inline label sits at the top-right of every wizard step (or top-right of the KPI page). Three possible states:

| State / 状态 | Display / 显示 | When / 什么时候 |
|---|---|---|
| Saving | `● Saving…` (grey) | User has typed but the 3-second debounce hasn't fired the save yet |
| Saved | `● Saved at HH:MM` (green) | Auto-save succeeded, draft layer has the latest data |
| Error | `● Couldn't save — Retry` (red, clickable) | Network drop or backend error; clicking Retry re-attempts |

When the user has not touched the form yet (e.g. just opened the page), no indicator shows — the form looks clean.

**Visual — indicator during Saving:**

![saving](artifacts/screenshots/auto-save/expected-saving.png)

**Visual — indicator after Saved:**

![saved](artifacts/screenshots/auto-save/expected-saved.png)

---

## Restore prompt — the only entry point / 草稿入口

> 简述：用户不会在列表页看到"我有N个草稿"之类的提示,也没有专门的"草稿"标签页。唯一的入口是:用户再次点 Add / Edit 进入表单时,如果系统在草稿层里发现匹配的草稿(同一个用户,同一个记录),才会弹出"要不要恢复"的弹窗。

Drafts are private to the user who created them, and they're only surfaced when the user is about to do the same work again. There is no banner on the list page, no Drafts tab, no notification.

The restore prompt:

> **Unsaved changes found**
>
> You have unsaved changes from **6 Jun 2026, 5:07 PM**. Would you like to restore them, or discard and start fresh?
>
> [Discard]  [Restore]

- **Restore** → loads the draft into the form, navigates to the step the user was on
- **Discard** → deletes the draft row; opens the form fresh (empty for Add, prefilled from live record for Edit)

Lookup key: `(user_id, entity_type, entity_id)`. For Create mode entity_id is null; for Edit mode entity_id is the record's id. So there's one draft slot per user per record, and Add Project drafts don't conflict with Edit Project drafts.

Single version per slot — newer auto-save overwrites older. No version history.

---

## What stays exactly the same / 不变的部分

The redesign is purely additive. Everything in the current product behaves identically:

| Today's behavior | After change |
|---|---|
| Save button — runs validation, writes to main table | **Unchanged** |
| Submit button — full validation + triggers approval workflow | **Unchanged** |
| Cancel button — discards in-form changes | Unchanged (and also deletes the draft row with confirm prompt) |
| All status values (Draft, Pending, Published, etc.) | Unchanged |
| Approval routing, line manager resolution, emails | Unchanged |
| List filters, KPI calculations, dashboards, reports | Unchanged |
| Edit-on-Published copy table behavior (Project's `sk_project_copy`) | Unchanged |
| Permission checks, role-based visibility | Unchanged |

No new statuses. No new approval logic. No new business rules. The user clicks the same buttons in the same places.

---

## Cleanup rules / 清理规则

| Event / 事件 | Draft row / 草稿行 |
|---|---|
| Auto-save fires successfully | Created (if absent) or updated |
| User clicks **Save** and validation passes | **Deleted** (data is in main table) |
| User clicks **Submit** and validation passes | **Deleted** (data is in main table, workflow triggered) |
| User clicks **Cancel** | **Deleted** (with confirm prompt) |
| Save or Submit fails validation | **Kept** — user fixes errors and retries |
| User closes browser tab | **Kept** — restorable on next visit |
| 60 days idle | Auto-purged by scheduled job |

---

## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准

| # | Criterion | Priority |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Auto-save fires 3 seconds after the user stops typing, on every step / every module | P0 |
| 2 | Auto-save also fires when user clicks Next / Previous between steps | P0 |
| 3 | Auto-save writes only to the draft layer — Project/Initiative/KPI main tables are never modified by auto-save | P0 |
| 4 | Editing a Published Initiative or KPI does not change the live record during typing | P0 |
| 5 | Status indicator (Saving / Saved at HH:MM / Couldn't save) is visible and accurate on every step | P0 |
| 6 | Step 2 and Step 3 of Project and Initiative actually save form changes (no more fake badges) | P0 |
| 7 | Closing the browser mid-edit and reopening the same Add/Edit form shows the restore prompt with a timestamp | P0 |
| 8 | Restore prefills the form with **all** step data (Step 1 + Step 2 + Step 3 for Project/Initiative, or full form for KPI) | P0 |
| 9 | Restore navigates to the step the user was last on | P1 |
| 10 | Discard deletes the draft row and opens the form fresh | P0 |
| 11 | Save (existing button) commits all draft data to the real database with full validation; draft row deleted on success | P0 |
| 12 | Submit (existing button) triggers the existing approval workflow; draft deleted on success | P0 |
| 13 | Save / Submit failure due to validation keeps the draft row intact | P0 |
| 14 | Cross-device: a draft created on Browser A is restorable from Browser B (different device) | P1 |
| 15 | Drafts idle for **60 days** are auto-purged (extended from 30 per Amir 2026-06-17 — the strategy-planning phase runs 1–2 months, during which drafts may sit unsubmitted) | P1 |
| 16 | Auto-save events do NOT write to the field-level history log (R-430) — only Save and Submit do | P0 |
| 17 | One draft slot per (user, entity_type, entity_id) — newer auto-save overwrites older | P0 |

---

## QA test scenarios / QA 测试场景

**Add new flow — each module**
- Open Add Project / Add Initiative / Add KPI
- Fill some fields, wait 3 seconds → indicator shows "Saved at HH:MM"
- Close browser tab
- Reopen Add → restore modal appears with the saved timestamp
- Click Restore → form prefilled with what was typed
- Click Discard → form opens empty

**Edit flow — each module**
- Open Edit on a Published Project / Initiative / KPI
- Type a change in any field
- Close browser without clicking Save
- Verify (via DB or another user's view) — the live record is unchanged
- Reopen Edit on the same record → restore modal appears
- Click Restore → form shows the modified state
- Click Save → live record now updated, draft deleted, modal does not appear on next visit

**Multi-step coverage (Project/Initiative)**
- Add new, fill Step 1, click Next, add 2 milestones on Step 2, click Cancel
- Reopen Add → modal appears, click Restore
- Verify: form opens on Step 2 (or whichever step was last), Step 1 data is intact, Step 2 milestones are intact

**Save / Submit (no regression)**
- After auto-save, click Save with valid fields → success, draft deleted, real record updated
- After auto-save, click Save with required field empty → validation error, no DB write, draft intact
- After auto-save, click Submit → existing approval workflow triggers, status flips, draft deleted

**Cross-device**
- Auto-save on Browser A (device 1), close tab
- Log in on Browser B (device 2), open the same Add/Edit form
- Restore modal appears with the draft from device 1

**Auto-purge**
- Create a draft, leave for 60 days, run purge job → draft deleted

**History log coordination (R-430)**
- Auto-save fires repeatedly while typing → no new entries in the field-level history log
- Click Save → one new entry in the history log for this Save event

---

## Proposed Technical Solution

> English-only section. PM does not need to read past this point.

### High-level approach

Introduce a single new database table that stores in-flight form snapshots, keyed by user and entity. Three thin endpoints (load / save / delete) for the frontend to call. A shared React hook that wraps the debounce + indicator state. No changes to existing save / submit endpoints, status enums, validation rules, or workflow logic.

### Database

One new table:

```sql
CREATE TABLE sk_record_draft (
    draft_id      BIGINT      NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    user_id       BIGINT      NOT NULL,
    entity_type   VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'PROJECT | INITIATIVE | KPI',
    entity_id     BIGINT      DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'NULL for Create, set for Edit',
    current_step  INT         DEFAULT 1,
    payload_json  JSON        NOT NULL COMMENT 'Full form snapshot — no validation enforced',
    created_at    DATETIME    NOT NULL,
    updated_at    DATETIME    NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (draft_id),
    UNIQUE KEY uk_user_entity (user_id, entity_type, entity_id),
    KEY idx_updated_at (updated_at)
);
```

No changes to existing tables. No new columns on `sk_project` / `sk_initiative` / `sk_kpis`.

### Backend

Three generic endpoints:

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| POST | `/api/draft/save` | Upsert draft for current user. Body: `{entity_type, entity_id, current_step, payload_json}`. No validation. |
| GET | `/api/draft/load` | Return draft for current user. Query: `?entity_type=...&entity_id=...`. 404 if none. |
| DELETE | `/api/draft/delete` | Delete the draft. Called on Save / Submit success and on Cancel confirm. |

Lives in `RecordDraftController` + `RecordDraftService` + `RecordDraftEntity`. Plus a `@Scheduled` purge job that deletes rows where `updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 60 DAY`.

Existing save endpoints (`/api/project/save`, `/api/initiative/save`, `/api/kpis/saveKpis`, etc.) are **untouched** in their behavior. After this change the `autoSaveFlag` parameter and `isCompleted: false` payload field can be removed from those endpoints — nothing will be calling them in auto-save mode.

### Frontend

**New shared code** (under `frontend/packages/common/src/`):
- `hooks/useAutoSaveDraft.ts` — encapsulates the 3-second debounce, status state, beforeunload guard, and the three new endpoint calls. Mounted once per page; all wizard steps share the same hook instance.
- `components/AutoSaveStatus/index.tsx` — the inline indicator.
- `components/RestoreDraftModal/index.tsx` — the restore prompt.

**Per-module changes** — mostly removals:

| Module | Files affected | Change |
|---|---|---|
| Project | `ProjectsAddOrEdit.tsx`, `ProjectAddForm.tsx`, Step 2/3 components | Remove hardcoded static badges. Remove sessionStorage logic and `isCompleted/autoSaveFlag` from auto-save payloads. Mount the shared hook at page level. |
| Initiative | `InitiativesAddOrEdit.tsx`, `InitiativesAddForm.tsx`, Step 2/3 components | Same shape as Project. |
| KPI | `AddKpi/index.tsx` | Replace sessionStorage logic. Remove `autoSaveFlag` from save payloads. Use the shared hook. |

### Migration

None needed. Existing Draft-status rows in the main tables continue to work through the existing flow. The new `sk_record_draft` table starts empty.

### Effort estimate

- Backend: ~1 day (new entity + service + controller + purge job)
- Frontend common: ~1.5 days (hook + status component + restore modal)
- Frontend integration: ~2 days (wire into Project / Initiative / KPI — can parallelize)
- Cleanup of old sessionStorage / autoSaveFlag code: ~0.5 day
- QA pass: ~2 days
- **Total: ~7 dev-days**

### Edge cases to verify

| Case | Expected behavior |
|---|---|
| User's draft exists but the original record was deleted by an admin | Restore loads the draft. On Save, existing "record not found" error fires; user can discard. Optional follow-up: cascade-delete drafts when entity is deleted. |
| Draft is stale relative to the live record (another user edited the original) | Restore loads the draft as-is. On Save, last-write-wins (same as today's edit behavior). |
| Two tabs of the same Add/Edit form open at once | Both share the same draft slot (unique by user+entity). Last auto-save wins. No conflict prompt. |
| Network drop during auto-save | Indicator shows "Couldn't save — Retry" in red. Hook holds the pending payload and retries on next field change. |
| User's role changes between starting and resuming a draft | Draft loads regardless. Save / Submit applies current role permissions — same as today. |

---

## Open questions / 待澄清

None. Design decisions locked by PM (Eugene) on 2026-06-09:

- Auto-save destination is a dedicated `sk_record_draft` table (not the main entity tables)
- Three-tier model: auto-save → draft layer | Save → main table with Draft status | Submit → main table with Pending Approval (or workflow equivalent)
- One draft per user per record, no version history
- Restore prompt is the only entry point — no banner on list page, no Drafts tab
- 60-day auto-purge for inactive drafts (extended from 30 per Amir 2026-06-17)
- All three modules (Project, Initiative, KPI), both Create and Edit modes
- Indicator format consistent across all modules and all steps

content.content:
1	# [P2] R-578 — Replace "Link KPI" with a Type-Aware Add KPI Flow / 用先选类型的 Add KPI 取代 Link KPI
2	
3	| | |
4	|---|---|
5	| **Version** | V3.4 |
6	| **Source / 来源** | Customer requirement raised at 2026-06-10 V3.4 planning meeting / 2026-06-10 V3.4 规划会议上客户提出的需求 |
7	| **Priority** | P2 |
8	| **Created** | 2026-06-12 |
9	| **PM status** | `draft` |
10	| **Related / 关联** | [R-579](./[R-579]-committee-add-kpi-form-fields.md) — Add KPI form field changes (the form that opens after this flow's type dropdown) / R-579 改的是本流程选完类型后打开的那个表单 |
11	
12	---
13	
14	## The problem / 问题
15	
16	> 简述：今天团队详情页的 KPI 区头部并排放着两个按钮 —— "+"（直接打开 Add KPI 表单）和"Link KPI"（锁链图标，用来把以前从团队解绑的 KPI 重新挂回来）。客户现在不用 Link KPI 这个功能了。同时客户希望点 "+" 的时候先选好 KPI 类型（Individual / Team / Admin）再进表单，而不是进了表单再在一堆字段里选类型。
17	
18	The team detail KPI section currently has two side-by-side buttons in its header:
19	
20	- **+** (Add KPI) — opens the Add KPI form directly
21	- **🔗** (Link KPI) — opens a dropdown to re-link previously-unlinked team KPIs
22	
23	The customer no longer uses Link KPI. And on the Add KPI side, picking the KPI Type inside the form (after the form is already open) is awkward — the admin already knows which type they want before they click. The customer wants the type chosen up front, right when they click + Add KPI.
24	
25	---
26	
27	## Current behavior / 当前行为
28	
29	> 简述：头部有 "+" 和"Link KPI"两个按钮。"+" 直接打开 Add KPI 表单。"Link KPI" 点了先弹一个三选一（Team / Individual / Admin），再打开"挑选已有 KPI"的弹窗。
30	
31	| Current state (live) / 当前 |
32	|---|
33	| ![current](artifacts/screenshots/add-kpi-redesign/current-team-kpi-section.png) |
34	
35	> Team detail KPI section today — `+` (Add KPI) and `🔗` (Link KPI) icons sit side-by-side next to the `KPI (N)` header. Captured from the live system on 2026-06-12.
36	
37	The KPI section header renders two buttons:
38	
39	| Button / 按钮 | Icon / 图标 | What it does today / 当前行为 |
40	|---|---|---|
41	| Add KPI | **+** | Opens the Add KPI form directly. Admin then picks KPI Type as one of many fields inside the form. / 直接打开 Add KPI 表单，类型在表单里再选 |
42	| Link KPI | **🔗** (chain link) | Opens a dropdown with three sub-options — Link Team KPI / Link Individual KPI / Link Admin KPI — each of which opens a picker modal to attach existing KPIs to the team. / 先弹三选一下拉，选完再打开"挑选已有 KPI"的弹窗 |
43	
44	---
45	
46	## Expected behavior / 期望行为
47	
48	> 简述：把"Link KPI"按钮整个删掉，只留 "+"。点 "+" 之后弹一个挂在按钮上的下拉菜单，列三个选项：Individual KPI / Team KPI / Admin KPI（仅是显示顺序，本阶段不涉及权重）。选一个 → Add KPI 表单立即打开（类型已经内部带入，表单里不再让用户选类型，详见 R-579）。除了这个"先选类型"的入口，Add KPI 的流程跟现在完全一样。
49	
50	| Aspect / 方面 | Before / 之前 | After / 之后 |
51	|---|---|---|
52	| Header buttons / 头部按钮 | **+** and **🔗** (Link KPI) side by side | Only **+** remains; **🔗** Link KPI button + dropdown deleted entirely / 只留 + 按钮，Link KPI 整个删掉 |
53	| Click on **+** / 点击 + 按钮 | Opens Add KPI form directly | Opens a small dropdown menu attached to the + button / 在 + 按钮上弹出下拉 |
54	| Dropdown contents / 下拉内容 | (didn't exist on + before) | Three items, in order: **Individual KPI → Team KPI → Admin KPI** |
55	| After picking a type / 选完类型 | (didn't exist) | Add KPI form opens with the chosen type already set (the in-form KPI Type field is removed — see [R-579](./[R-579]-committee-add-kpi-form-fields.md)) / 表单打开，类型已带入 |
56	| Click outside / 点空白处 | (n/a) | Dropdown closes silently; no form opens, no KPI created / 关闭，不开表单 |
57	| Link KPI flow / Link KPI 流程 | Available via 🔗 button | **Removed entirely** — function deprecated by customer / 整个删除 |
58	| Everything else in Add KPI / Add KPI 其余流程 | — | Unchanged — same form, same fields (except the R-579 changes), same save / 其余不变 |
59	
60	### Dropdown menu specifics / 下拉菜单细节
61	
62	| Property / 属性 | Value / 值 |
63	|---|---|
64	| Trigger / 触发 | Click on `+ Add KPI` button in the team detail KPI section header |
65	| Container / 容器 | Arco `Dropdown` menu anchored to the + button (same component family as the removed Link KPI dropdown — visually consistent with what the customer is already used to) |
66	| Options / 选项 | Three menu items, plain text labels: `Individual KPI`, `Team KPI`, `Admin KPI` |
67	| Option order / 选项顺序 | **Individual → Team → Admin** — display order only; no weighting is involved at this stage / 仅是下拉的显示顺序，本阶段不涉及任何权重 |
68	| Close behavior / 关闭行为 | Click an option → dropdown closes and form opens. Click outside / press Esc → dropdown closes silently, no form opens. |
69	
70	The three options map 1:1 to the existing `KpiLinkTypeEnum` (`Individual = 0`, `Team = 1`, `AdminKpi = 2`) — no new enum needed.
71	
72	| Expected — clicking + Add KPI opens the type dropdown / 期望 — 点 + 弹出类型下拉 |
73	|---|
74	| ![expected](artifacts/screenshots/add-kpi-redesign/expected-add-kpi-type-dropdown.png) |
75	
76	> Clicking **+ Add KPI** opens a dropdown with the three types in order Individual → Team → Admin. Selecting one opens the Add KPI form with that type pre-set. (Captured from the local prototype on 2026-06-15.)
77	
78	### Type tag on the KPI card / KPI 卡片上的类型标签
79	
80	The card on the team detail KPI tab already renders a type tag today, with existing visuals for `Individual KPI` / `Team KPI` / `Admin KPI`. **R-578 does NOT change the tag visuals** — after save, the new KPI displays whichever tag already corresponds to the chosen type. / 卡片上的类型标签视觉沿用现有的，不改。
81	
82	### Card "Cancel Link" option → "Delete" / 卡片"解除关联"改为"删除"
83	
84	> 简述：每张团队 KPI 卡片的三点菜单里现在有一个"Cancel Link（解除关联）"选项 —— 把 KPI 从团队解绑、退回到可重新关联的池子。既然 Link KPI 功能被整个删掉了，没有池子可退回，"解除关联"就没意义了。改成"Delete（删除）"：直接把这条 KPI 从团队移除。
85	
86	Because the Link KPI function is removed, the card's existing **"Cancel Link"** option (which unlinked a KPI from the team and returned it to a re-link pool) no longer makes sense — there is no pool to return it to. It is **renamed to "Delete"** and now simply removes the KPI from the team.
87	
88	| Aspect / 方面 | Before / 之前 | After / 之后 |
89	|---|---|---|
90	| Card 3-dot menu option / 卡片三点菜单选项 | "Cancel Link" (unlink, returns to link pool) | **"Delete"** (removes the KPI from the team) |
91	| Applies to / 适用于 | — | **Manually-added** team KPI cards. R-580 auto-generated KPIs do NOT support manual remove (no Delete option — see R-580). / 仅手动添加的卡片；R-580 自动生成的不支持手动删除 |
92	| Confirm dialog / 确认弹窗 | "Are you sure you want to cancel this kpi link?" | Reworded to a delete confirmation (e.g. "Are you sure you want to delete this KPI?") / 改成删除确认文案 |
93	
94	Code touch-point: `handleKpiCancelLink` + the `cancelLink` / `confirmDeleteKpi` locale keys in [KpiColumn/index.tsx](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx) — rename the action label and reword the confirm text; the underlying remove call is unchanged.
95	
96	---
97	
98	## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准
99	
100	| # | Criterion / 验收项 | Priority |
101	|---|---|---|
102	| 1 | The Link KPI chain-link button and its dropdown menu are removed from the team detail KPI column header. Only the + Add KPI button remains. / 锁链按钮和下拉从头部完全移除，只剩 + 按钮 | P0 |
103	| 2 | Clicking + Add KPI opens a small dropdown menu anchored to the + button, with exactly three options in this order: **Individual KPI → Team KPI → Admin KPI**. The form does not open at this step. / 点 + 按钮弹三选一下拉（Individual → Team → Admin），表单不在这一步打开 | P0 |
104	| 3 | Clicking any of the three options closes the dropdown and opens the Add KPI form with the chosen type pre-set. / 选完类型，下拉关闭，表单打开且类型已带入 | P0 |
105	| 4 | Clicking outside the dropdown or pressing Esc closes it without creating any KPI. / 点空白或按 Esc 关闭，不建 KPI | P0 |
106	| 5 | After save, the new KPI card appears on the team detail KPI tab using the existing type tag visual (no tag color or layout change). / 保存后卡片用现有类型标签视觉，不改样式 | P0 |
107	| 6 | The R-458 type ring on the team detail correctly counts the newly-added KPI under its chosen type. / R-458 三个环按类型正确计数 | P0 |
108	| 7 | Apart from the new type-first entry point, the Add KPI flow is unchanged — same form, same save path, same team-scoping (per R-446). / 除了先选类型的入口，Add KPI 流程其余不变 | P0 |
109	| 8 | Existing KPIs already attached to teams retain their type tag and continue to display correctly; no data migration is required. / 现存团队 KPI 标签照常显示，无需数据迁移 | P0 |
110	| 9 | Bilingual labels: the dropdown menu items render correctly in EN and AR. / 下拉菜单项中英阿正常显示 | P0 |
111	| 10 | Permission gate `committee::team::kpi::add` still controls visibility of the + Add KPI button (unchanged from R-446). The removed Link KPI permission, if any, is not referenced anywhere after this change. / 加 KPI 权限位沿用 R-446，Link KPI 权限位不再被引用 | P0 |
112	| 11 | The KPI card 3-dot menu option "Cancel Link" is renamed to **"Delete"** with a delete-style confirm dialog; it removes the KPI from the team. Applies to **manually-added** team KPI cards (R-580 auto-generated cards have no Delete option). / 卡片"解除关联"改为"删除"；仅适用于手动添加的卡片 | P0 |
113	
114	---
115	
116	## QA test scenario / QA 测试场景
117	
118	| Setup / 前置 | Steps / 步骤 | Expected / 期望 |
119	|---|---|---|
120	| Admin role logged in. A committee team exists with team dates and at least one member who can be the Responsible Person. | 1. Open the team detail → KPI tab. 2. Confirm the header shows only **+ Add KPI** (no chain-link icon, no Link KPI menu). 3. Click + Add KPI → confirm a dropdown appears with exactly three options in order **Individual KPI / Team KPI / Admin KPI**. 4. Click outside the dropdown → confirm it closes, no form opens, no KPI created. 5. Click + Add KPI → click **Individual KPI** → confirm the Add KPI form opens. 6. Fill the form and Save → confirm the new KPI card appears on the team detail with the existing Individual KPI tag. 7. Repeat choosing **Team KPI**, then **Admin KPI**. 8. After all three, confirm the R-458 ring count reflects +1 Individual / +1 Team / +1 Admin. 9. Switch UI to Arabic → re-open the dropdown → confirm the three labels render in Arabic. | Step 2: only the + button is visible; chain-link gone. Step 3: dropdown shows three options in order Individual → Team → Admin. Step 4: click-outside closes cleanly, no side effects. Step 5: form opens. Step 6/7: three KPIs created, each with the existing tag visual. Step 8: ring counts increment correctly. Step 9: AR labels render correctly. |
121	
122	---
123	
124	## Proposed technical solution
125	
126	> English-only section. PM does not need to review beyond this point.
127	
128	### Frontend
129	
130	Work concentrates in [`frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx`](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx).
131	
132	1. **Remove** the chain-link `Dropdown` + `Button` block at [KpiColumn/index.tsx:707-714](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx#L707-L714) (the `IconLink` dropdown trigger and its `linkKpiDropList` content at [lines 576-640](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx#L576-L640)).
133	2. **Remove** the `addKpiVisible` Link-KPI modal block at [lines 833-956](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx#L833-L956), the `getKpiList2` callback at [lines 482-511](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx#L482-L511), and the `selectedRowKeys` + `handleKpiSave` plumbing dedicated to it.
134	3. **Add a chosen-type state** alongside the existing `addNewKpiVisible` state:
135	   ```tsx
136	   const [chosenKpiType, setChosenKpiType] = useState<KpiLinkTypeEnum | null>(null)
137	   ```
138	4. **Wrap the + Add KPI button in a Dropdown** (same Arco component family as the removed Link KPI dropdown). The dropdown's `droplist` contains three menu items in Individual → Team → Admin order:
139	   ```tsx
140	   const addKpiDropList = (
141	     <Menu onClickMenuItem={(key) => {
142	       setChosenKpiType(Number(key) as KpiLinkTypeEnum)
143	       setAddNewKpiVisible(true)
144	     }}>
145	       <Menu.Item key={String(KpiLinkTypeEnum.Individual)}>{t('committeeTeam:teams.detail.indKpi')}</Menu.Item>
146	       <Menu.Item key={String(KpiLinkTypeEnum.Team)}>{t('committeeTeam:teams.detail.teamKpi')}</Menu.Item>
147	       <Menu.Item key={String(KpiLinkTypeEnum.AdminKpi)}>{t('committeeTeam:teams.detail.adminKpi')}</Menu.Item>
148	     </Menu>
149	   )
150	   ```
151	5. **Pass `chosenKpiType` into `<AddCommitteeKpiModal>`** so the modal uses it as the initial KPI type (and the in-form KPI Type field is removed per R-579). Reset `chosenKpiType` to `null` when the modal closes.
152	
153	**Locales:** the three type labels already exist (`committeeTeam:teams.detail.indKpi`, `.teamKpi`, `.adminKpi`). No new locale keys needed for R-578.
154	
155	### Backend
156	
157	No new endpoints. The Add KPI save path already accepts the KPI type on the payload; the frontend just supplies it from the dropdown choice instead of a form field.
158	
159	### Database
160	
161	No schema changes.
162	
163	### Effort estimate
164	
165	- Frontend: ~0.5 day (remove Link KPI plumbing + dropdown on + button)
166	- Backend: ~0 day
167	- QA: ~0.5 day
168	- **Total: ~1 dev-day** (combined with R-579, ~1.5 dev-days total)
169	
170	---
171	
172	## Screenshots / 截图
173	
174	- **BEFORE (current state, from live system):** embedded in the Current behavior section above.
175	- **EXPECTED (local prototype):** embedded in the Expected behavior section above — the type dropdown on + Add KPI.
176	
177	---
178	
179	## Open questions / 待澄清
180	
181	None. All design decisions locked with Eugene on 2026-06-12 — see Locked decisions.
182	
183	---
184	
185	## Locked decisions / 已锁定决策
186	
187	1. **Three KPI types: Individual / Team / Admin.** Same trio as [R-447](../V3.3/[R-447]-committee-kpi-weight-distribution.md) and [R-458](../V3.3/[R-458]-team-detail-kpi-type-rings.md). No new types. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.
188	
189	2. **Type chooser is a dropdown menu attached to the + Add KPI button, NOT a modal.** Same UX as the current Link KPI dropdown being replaced — fast, click-outside to close. The admin must pick a type before the form opens. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.
190	
191	3. **Option order: Individual → Team → Admin** — this is purely the display order of the dropdown items. No weighting is attached to the order at this stage. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-15.
192	
193	4. **Type tags on KPI cards are unchanged** — reuse the existing tag visuals. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.
194	
195	5. **Link KPI function is fully removed — not hidden, not feature-flagged.** Button, dropdown, Link KPI modal, and `getKpiList2` plumbing all deleted. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.
196	
197	6. **Apart from the type-first entry, the Add KPI flow is unchanged** — same form and save path (except the field changes in R-579). Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.
198	
199	7. **No data migration for existing KPIs.** Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.
200	
201	8. **Card "Cancel Link" → "Delete".** With Link removed, the card's unlink option becomes Delete (removes the KPI from the team), with a delete-style confirm. Applies to **manually-added** team KPI cards only — R-580 auto-generated KPIs have no Delete option (removed only by the system on member-removal / team-deletion). Locked by Eugene 2026-06-15.
202	
203	---
204	
205	## Related PRDs / 相关 PRD

208	- [R-447 Committee KPI Weight Distribution](../V3.3/[R-447]-committee-kpi-weight-distribution.md) — defines the three KPI types used in the dropdown

# [P2] R-578 — Replace "Link KPI" with a Type-Aware Add KPI Flow / 用先选类型的 Add KPI 取代 Link KPI

| | |
|---|---|
| **Version** | V3.4 |
| **Source / 来源** | Customer requirement raised at 2026-06-10 V3.4 planning meeting / 2026-06-10 V3.4 规划会议上客户提出的需求 |
| **Priority** | P2 |
| **Created** | 2026-06-12 |
| **PM status** | `draft` |
| **Related / 关联** | [R-579](./[R-579]-committee-add-kpi-form-fields.md) — Add KPI form field changes (the form that opens after this flow's type dropdown) / R-579 改的是本流程选完类型后打开的那个表单 |

---

## The problem / 问题

> 简述：今天团队详情页的 KPI 区头部并排放着两个按钮 —— "+"（直接打开 Add KPI 表单）和"Link KPI"（锁链图标，用来把以前从团队解绑的 KPI 重新挂回来）。客户现在不用 Link KPI 这个功能了。同时客户希望点 "+" 的时候先选好 KPI 类型（Individual / Team / Admin）再进表单，而不是进了表单再在一堆字段里选类型。

The team detail KPI section currently has two side-by-side buttons in its header:

- **+** (Add KPI) — opens the Add KPI form directly
- **🔗** (Link KPI) — opens a dropdown to re-link previously-unlinked team KPIs

The customer no longer uses Link KPI. And on the Add KPI side, picking the KPI Type inside the form (after the form is already open) is awkward — the admin already knows which type they want before they click. The customer wants the type chosen up front, right when they click + Add KPI.

---

## Current behavior / 当前行为

> 简述：头部有 "+" 和"Link KPI"两个按钮。"+" 直接打开 Add KPI 表单。"Link KPI" 点了先弹一个三选一（Team / Individual / Admin），再打开"挑选已有 KPI"的弹窗。

| Current state (live) / 当前 |
|---|
| ![current](artifacts/screenshots/add-kpi-redesign/current-team-kpi-section.png) |

> Team detail KPI section today — `+` (Add KPI) and `🔗` (Link KPI) icons sit side-by-side next to the `KPI (N)` header. Captured from the live system on 2026-06-12.

The KPI section header renders two buttons:

| Button / 按钮 | Icon / 图标 | What it does today / 当前行为 |
|---|---|---|
| Add KPI | **+** | Opens the Add KPI form directly. Admin then picks KPI Type as one of many fields inside the form. / 直接打开 Add KPI 表单，类型在表单里再选 |
| Link KPI | **🔗** (chain link) | Opens a dropdown with three sub-options — Link Team KPI / Link Individual KPI / Link Admin KPI — each of which opens a picker modal to attach existing KPIs to the team. / 先弹三选一下拉，选完再打开"挑选已有 KPI"的弹窗 |

---

## Expected behavior / 期望行为

> 简述：把"Link KPI"按钮整个删掉，只留 "+"。点 "+" 之后弹一个挂在按钮上的下拉菜单，列三个选项：Individual KPI / Team KPI / Admin KPI（仅是显示顺序，本阶段不涉及权重）。选一个 → Add KPI 表单立即打开（类型已经内部带入，表单里不再让用户选类型，详见 R-579）。除了这个"先选类型"的入口，Add KPI 的流程跟现在完全一样。

| Aspect / 方面 | Before / 之前 | After / 之后 |
|---|---|---|
| Header buttons / 头部按钮 | **+** and **🔗** (Link KPI) side by side | Only **+** remains; **🔗** Link KPI button + dropdown deleted entirely / 只留 + 按钮，Link KPI 整个删掉 |
| Click on **+** / 点击 + 按钮 | Opens Add KPI form directly | Opens a small dropdown menu attached to the + button / 在 + 按钮上弹出下拉 |
| Dropdown contents / 下拉内容 | (didn't exist on + before) | Three items, in order: **Individual KPI → Team KPI → Admin KPI** |
| After picking a type / 选完类型 | (didn't exist) | Add KPI form opens with the chosen type already set (the in-form KPI Type field is removed — see [R-579](./[R-579]-committee-add-kpi-form-fields.md)) / 表单打开，类型已带入 |
| Click outside / 点空白处 | (n/a) | Dropdown closes silently; no form opens, no KPI created / 关闭，不开表单 |
| Link KPI flow / Link KPI 流程 | Available via 🔗 button | **Removed entirely** — function deprecated by customer / 整个删除 |
| Everything else in Add KPI / Add KPI 其余流程 | — | Unchanged — same form, same fields (except the R-579 changes), same save / 其余不变 |

### Dropdown menu specifics / 下拉菜单细节

| Property / 属性 | Value / 值 |
|---|---|
| Trigger / 触发 | Click on `+ Add KPI` button in the team detail KPI section header |
| Container / 容器 | Arco `Dropdown` menu anchored to the + button (same component family as the removed Link KPI dropdown — visually consistent with what the customer is already used to) |
| Options / 选项 | Three menu items, plain text labels: `Individual KPI`, `Team KPI`, `Admin KPI` |
| Option order / 选项顺序 | **Individual → Team → Admin** — display order only; no weighting is involved at this stage / 仅是下拉的显示顺序，本阶段不涉及任何权重 |
| Close behavior / 关闭行为 | Click an option → dropdown closes and form opens. Click outside / press Esc → dropdown closes silently, no form opens. |

The three options map 1:1 to the existing `KpiLinkTypeEnum` (`Individual = 0`, `Team = 1`, `AdminKpi = 2`) — no new enum needed.

| Expected — clicking + Add KPI opens the type dropdown / 期望 — 点 + 弹出类型下拉 |
|---|
| ![expected](artifacts/screenshots/add-kpi-redesign/expected-add-kpi-type-dropdown.png) |

> Clicking **+ Add KPI** opens a dropdown with the three types in order Individual → Team → Admin. Selecting one opens the Add KPI form with that type pre-set. (Captured from the local prototype on 2026-06-15.)

### Type tag on the KPI card / KPI 卡片上的类型标签

The card on the team detail KPI tab already renders a type tag today, with existing visuals for `Individual KPI` / `Team KPI` / `Admin KPI`. **R-578 does NOT change the tag visuals** — after save, the new KPI displays whichever tag already corresponds to the chosen type. / 卡片上的类型标签视觉沿用现有的，不改。

### Card "Cancel Link" option → "Delete" / 卡片"解除关联"改为"删除"

> 简述：每张团队 KPI 卡片的三点菜单里现在有一个"Cancel Link（解除关联）"选项 —— 把 KPI 从团队解绑、退回到可重新关联的池子。既然 Link KPI 功能被整个删掉了，没有池子可退回，"解除关联"就没意义了。改成"Delete（删除）"：直接把这条 KPI 从团队移除。

Because the Link KPI function is removed, the card's existing **"Cancel Link"** option (which unlinked a KPI from the team and returned it to a re-link pool) no longer makes sense — there is no pool to return it to. It is **renamed to "Delete"** and now simply removes the KPI from the team.

| Aspect / 方面 | Before / 之前 | After / 之后 |
|---|---|---|
| Card 3-dot menu option / 卡片三点菜单选项 | "Cancel Link" (unlink, returns to link pool) | **"Delete"** (removes the KPI from the team) |
| Applies to / 适用于 | — | **Manually-added** team KPI cards. R-580 auto-generated KPIs do NOT support manual remove (no Delete option — see R-580). / 仅手动添加的卡片；R-580 自动生成的不支持手动删除 |
| Confirm dialog / 确认弹窗 | "Are you sure you want to cancel this kpi link?" | Reworded to a delete confirmation (e.g. "Are you sure you want to delete this KPI?") / 改成删除确认文案 |

Code touch-point: `handleKpiCancelLink` + the `cancelLink` / `confirmDeleteKpi` locale keys in [KpiColumn/index.tsx](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx) — rename the action label and reword the confirm text; the underlying remove call is unchanged.

---

|---|---|---|
