| 2 | Clicking + Add KPI opens a small dropdown menu anchored to the + button, with exactly three options in this order: **Individual KPI → Team KPI → Admin KPI**. The form does not open at this step. / 点 + 按钮弹三选一下拉（Individual → Team → Admin），表单不在这一步打开 | P0 |
| 3 | Clicking any of the three options closes the dropdown and opens the Add KPI form with the chosen type pre-set. / 选完类型，下拉关闭，表单打开且类型已带入 | P0 |
| 4 | Clicking outside the dropdown or pressing Esc closes it without creating any KPI. / 点空白或按 Esc 关闭，不建 KPI | P0 |
| 5 | After save, the new KPI card appears on the team detail KPI tab using the existing type tag visual (no tag color or layout change). / 保存后卡片用现有类型标签视觉，不改样式 | P0 |
| 6 | The R-458 type ring on the team detail correctly counts the newly-added KPI under its chosen type. / R-458 三个环按类型正确计数 | P0 |
| 7 | Apart from the new type-first entry point, the Add KPI flow is unchanged — same form, same save path, same team-scoping (per R-446). / 除了先选类型的入口，Add KPI 流程其余不变 | P0 |
| 8 | Existing KPIs already attached to teams retain their type tag and continue to display correctly; no data migration is required. / 现存团队 KPI 标签照常显示，无需数据迁移 | P0 |

| 10 | Permission gate `committee::team::kpi::add` still controls visibility of the + Add KPI button (unchanged from R-446). The removed Link KPI permission, if any, is not referenced anywhere after this change. / 加 KPI 权限位沿用 R-446，Link KPI 权限位不再被引用 | P0 |
| 11 | The KPI card 3-dot menu option "Cancel Link" is renamed to **"Delete"** with a delete-style confirm dialog; it removes the KPI from the team. Applies to **manually-added** team KPI cards (R-580 auto-generated cards have no Delete option). / 卡片"解除关联"改为"删除"；仅适用于手动添加的卡片 | P0 |

## QA test scenario / QA 测试场景

| Setup / 前置 | Steps / 步骤 | Expected / 期望 |
|---|---|---|
| Admin role logged in. A committee team exists with team dates and at least one member who can be the Responsible Person. | 1. Open the team detail → KPI tab. 2. Confirm the header shows only **+ Add KPI** (no chain-link icon, no Link KPI menu). 3. Click + Add KPI → confirm a dropdown appears with exactly three options in order **Individual KPI / Team KPI / Admin KPI**. 4. Click outside the dropdown → confirm it closes, no form opens, no KPI created. 5. Click + Add KPI → click **Individual KPI** → confirm the Add KPI form opens. 6. Fill the form and Save → confirm the new KPI card appears on the team detail with the existing Individual KPI tag. 7. Repeat choosing **Team KPI**, then **Admin KPI**. 8. After all three, confirm the R-458 ring count reflects +1 Individual / +1 Team / +1 Admin. 9. Switch UI to Arabic → re-open the dropdown → confirm the three labels render in Arabic. | Step 2: only the + button is visible; chain-link gone. Step 3: dropdown shows three options in order Individual → Team → Admin. Step 4: click-outside closes cleanly, no side effects. Step 5: form opens. Step 6/7: three KPIs created, each with the existing tag visual. Step 8: ring counts increment correctly. Step 9: AR labels render correctly. |

---

## Proposed technical solution

> English-only section. PM does not need to review beyond this point.

### Frontend

Work concentrates in [`frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx`](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx).

1. **Remove** the chain-link `Dropdown` + `Button` block at [KpiColumn/index.tsx:707-714](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx#L707-L714) (the `IconLink` dropdown trigger and its `linkKpiDropList` content at [lines 576-640](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx#L576-L640)).
2. **Remove** the `addKpiVisible` Link-KPI modal block at [lines 833-956](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx#L833-L956), the `getKpiList2` callback at [lines 482-511](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx#L482-L511), and the `selectedRowKeys` + `handleKpiSave` plumbing dedicated to it.
3. **Add a chosen-type state** alongside the existing `addNewKpiVisible` state:
   ```tsx
   const [chosenKpiType, setChosenKpiType] = useState<KpiLinkTypeEnum | null>(null)
   ```
4. **Wrap the + Add KPI button in a Dropdown** (same Arco component family as the removed Link KPI dropdown). The dropdown's `droplist` contains three menu items in Individual → Team → Admin order:
   ```tsx
   const addKpiDropList = (
     <Menu onClickMenuItem={(key) => {
       setChosenKpiType(Number(key) as KpiLinkTypeEnum)
       setAddNewKpiVisible(true)
     }}>
       <Menu.Item key={String(KpiLinkTypeEnum.Individual)}>{t('committeeTeam:teams.detail.indKpi')}</Menu.Item>
       <Menu.Item key={String(KpiLinkTypeEnum.Team)}>{t('committeeTeam:teams.detail.teamKpi')}</Menu.Item>
       <Menu.Item key={String(KpiLinkTypeEnum.AdminKpi)}>{t('committeeTeam:teams.detail.adminKpi')}</Menu.Item>
     </Menu>
   )
   ```
5. **Pass `chosenKpiType` into `<AddCommitteeKpiModal>`** so the modal uses it as the initial KPI type (and the in-form KPI Type field is removed per R-579). Reset `chosenKpiType` to `null` when the modal closes.

**Locales:** the three type labels already exist (`committeeTeam:teams.detail.indKpi`, `.teamKpi`, `.adminKpi`). No new locale keys needed for R-578.

### Backend

No new endpoints. The Add KPI save path already accepts the KPI type on the payload; the frontend just supplies it from the dropdown choice instead of a form field.

### Database

No schema changes.

### Effort estimate

- Frontend: ~0.5 day (remove Link KPI plumbing + dropdown on + button)
- Backend: ~0 day
- QA: ~0.5 day
- **Total: ~1 dev-day** (combined with R-579, ~1.5 dev-days total)

---

## Screenshots / 截图

- **BEFORE (current state, from live system):** embedded in the Current behavior section above.
- **EXPECTED (local prototype):** embedded in the Expected behavior section above — the type dropdown on + Add KPI.

---

## Open questions / 待澄清

None. All design decisions locked with Eugene on 2026-06-12 — see Locked decisions.

---

## Locked decisions / 已锁定决策

1. **Three KPI types: Individual / Team / Admin.** Same trio as [R-447](../V3.3/[R-447]-committee-kpi-weight-distribution.md) and [R-458](../V3.3/[R-458]-team-detail-kpi-type-rings.md). No new types. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.

2. **Type chooser is a dropdown menu attached to the + Add KPI button, NOT a modal.** Same UX as the current Link KPI dropdown being replaced — fast, click-outside to close. The admin must pick a type before the form opens. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.

3. **Option order: Individual → Team → Admin** — this is purely the display order of the dropdown items. No weighting is attached to the order at this stage. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-15.

4. **Type tags on KPI cards are unchanged** — reuse the existing tag visuals. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.

5. **Link KPI function is fully removed — not hidden, not feature-flagged.** Button, dropdown, Link KPI modal, and `getKpiList2` plumbing all deleted. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.

6. **Apart from the type-first entry, the Add KPI flow is unchanged** — same form and save path (except the field changes in R-579). Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.

7. **No data migration for existing KPIs.** Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.

8. **Card "Cancel Link" → "Delete".** With Link removed, the card's unlink option becomes Delete (removes the KPI from the team), with a delete-style confirm. Applies to **manually-added** team KPI cards only — R-580 auto-generated KPIs have no Delete option (removed only by the system on member-removal / team-deletion). Locked by Eugene 2026-06-15.

---

## Related PRDs / 相关 PRD

- [R-446 Add KPI from Team Detail](../V3.3/[R-446]-add-kpi-from-team-detail.md) — original team-scoped Add KPI + Link KPI flow that R-578 supersedes
- [R-447 Committee KPI Weight Distribution](../V3.3/[R-447]-committee-kpi-weight-distribution.md) — defines the three KPI types used in the dropdown
- [R-458 Team Detail KPI Type Rings](../V3.3/[R-458]-team-detail-kpi-type-rings.md) — existing tag colors on KPI cards
- [R-579 Add KPI Form Field Changes](./[R-579]-committee-add-kpi-form-fields.md) — the form opened after this dropdown; removes the KPI Type field, adds Monthly cycle, defaults Counted-in-Stats
- [R-580 Auto-Generate Individual KPIs on Team Creation](./[R-580]-committee-team-auto-kpi-generation.md) — auto-generated KPIs bypass this dropdown (created by the system)

# Strategy KPI V3.4 — Amir's Review of Nikki's PRD Decisions

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Date** | 2026-06-17 |
| **Reviewer** | Amir |
| **Author of decisions** | Nikki |
| **Scope** | 13 PRDs |
| **Final** | ✅ Approve with conditions (45 approved · 10 approved with comments · 2 rejected) |

> Below: each V3.4 requirement, what it's about, Nikki's drafted decisions, and Amir's verdict on each. Comments are Amir's notes.

---

## R-400 — Post Cycle Initiation Approval (P1)

**Background.** New post-cycle review workflow. After a cycle initiation closes, submitted data goes through Line Manager review then Admin review before it's locked. Today there is no formal post-cycle review.

| # | Nikki's Decision | Amir | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|
| Q1 | 2-level approval flow: LM → Admin → Completed (no third director level) | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q2 | "Completed" is a permanent lock — no re-submit / edit / re-open in v3.4 | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q3 | Departments with no Line Manager skip LM and go straight to Admin review | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q4 | "Admin View / PM View" toggle is a viewer lens only (no permission change) | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q5 | (open) In-progress cycle behavior during review — can user keep submitting? | 💡 PM proposal | Post cycle = initiation setting is over, user cannot update. If late submission during "post-cycle review" and LM already approved, late-submit should re-trigger LM approval as a fresh review. |

---

## R-434 — Chairman Dashboard Interactive Charts (P1)

**Background.** Make all four Chairman Dashboard charts (Completion Rate bars, Performance rings, Budget card, Completion-Progress arc) interactive — clicking a sector drills into a detail modal.

| # | Nikki's Decision | Amir | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|
| Q1 | Chart interactions scope to current ongoing cycle + clicked sector only | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q2 | Reuse existing KPI popup style for Project / Initiative popups | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q3 | All detail views use Arco Table Modals; no inline expand | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q4 | Add Responsible Person column to completion-item list | ✅ Approve | — |

---

## R-450 — Initiative "Exclude from Statistics" (P2)

**Background.** Mirror the existing KPI "Exclude from Statistics" field on Initiatives — let users flag specific initiatives so they don't count toward performance scoring.

| # | Nikki's Decision | Amir | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|
| Q1 | Plain general-purpose field; NOT tied to carry-over auto-detection | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q2 | All existing initiatives backfill to "Counted in Stats" | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q3 | Excluded initiative removed from BOTH numerator AND weight base | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q4 | Score-only exclusion — still counted in budgets, lists, late-submission, reminder emails | ⏸️ Defer | About budget not sure — it might be using last year's budget; need to confirm. |
| Q5 | List marker matches existing KPI marker style | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q6 | All initiative editors can set the flag (not admin-only) | ✅ Approve | — |

---

## R-572 — Auto-Save Draft Layer (P0)

**Background.** Auto-save user input to a separate draft layer (not the live record), so users don't lose work across sessions or devices and so half-typed content never lands in production data.

| # | Nikki's Decision | Amir | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|
| Q1 | Separate draft layer (sk_record_draft) from live record | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q2 | Restore prompt is the only entry point (no banner, no Drafts tab, no history) | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q3 | Three-tier save: auto-save → draft / Save → Draft status / Submit → Pending Approval | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q4 | 30-day auto-purge for inactive drafts; no admin manual purge tool | ⏸️ Defer | Maybe longer — their strategy planning phase is 1-2 months, during which they might create many drafts but not submit. |
| Q5 | No changes to existing save/submit/approval/permission logic — purely additive | ✅ Approve | — |

---

## R-578 — Replace "Link KPI" with Type-Aware Add Flow (P1)

**Background.** Remove the existing "Link KPI" button on committee team detail. Replace with a type-aware "+ Add KPI" dropdown (Individual / Team / Admin) — same KPI type trio as R-447/R-458.

| # | Nikki's Decision | Amir | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|
| Q1 | Three KPI types: Individual / Team / Admin | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q2 | Type dropdown attached to + button (not modal); form opens with type pre-set | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q3 | Link KPI function fully REMOVED (button + modal + plumbing all deleted) | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q4 | Card "Cancel Link" → "Delete" (manual cards only; auto-gen cards no Delete option) | ✅ Approve | — |

---

## R-579 — Committee Add KPI Form Changes (P1)

**Background.** Update the Committee Add KPI form: add Monthly to Measurement Cycle options, remove the KPI Type field (handled by R-578 dropdown), default Counted in Statistics.

| # | Nikki's Decision | Amir | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|
| Q1 | Measurement Cycle adds Monthly (Annual / Semi-Annual / Quarterly / Monthly), unconditional | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q2 | KPI Type field removed from UI (type comes from R-578 dropdown; payload still carries type) | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q3 | Counted in Statistics visible; defaults to "Counted in Stats"; admin can change before save | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q4 | All other fields, validation, layout unchanged; Responsible Person not restricted by KPI type | ✅ Approve | — |

---

## R-580 — Auto-Generate Individual KPIs on Team Creation (P1)

**Background.** When a committee team is created, automatically generate Individual KPIs for each member. Data flows from MoM and Actions in real time.

| # | Nikki's Decision | Amir | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|
| Q1 | Auto-generate only TWO per-member Individual KPIs (Attendance 20% + On-Time Task 80%) | ❌ Reject | Need **3 KPIs**: (1) Attendance, (2) Task, (3) **Overall** = Attendance + Task. Third Overall KPI is the aggregated score combining the other two — the headline number managers care about. Sub-weights (20% / 80%) likely become the weights inside the Overall calculation; confirm naming and weight split for the new Overall KPI. |
| Q2 | NO backfill for pre-existing teams — only teams created after v3.4 release | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q3 | KPI names match customer PPTX exactly in EN/AR (no member name in KPI title) | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q4 | All fields fully locked on auto-gen KPIs — no admin override (read-only end to end) | ✅ Approve | — |

---

## R-581 — Team Card Quick Completion-Rate Input (P1)

**Background.** On committee team detail, clicking a KPI card opens a quick-input popup (reuses existing `ActualValueModal`) for recording the completion rate. Avoids navigating into KPI detail edit for a simple number update.

| # | Nikki's Decision | Amir | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|
| Q1 | Reuse existing ActualValueModal (same as standalone KPI list "Completion Rate" action) | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q2 | Quick number/percentage input only inside popup — NOT the full KPI edit form | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q3 | Auto-generated KPI cards (R-580) excluded — click routes to read-only Detail | ✅ Approve | — |

---

## R-582 — Person Percentage Column on Member Evaluation (P1)

**Background.** Add a "Person Percentage" column to committee Member Evaluation form — a manager-entered qualitative score that sits alongside the auto-calculated Attendance and On-Time Task Completion columns.

| # | Nikki's Decision | Amir | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|
| Q1 | Person Percentage is manager-input (manual), non-mandatory | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q2 | Attendance and On-Time Task Completion remain auto-calculated, read-only | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q3 | Reuse existing evaluation edit permission — no new permission key | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q4 | Weighting in final composite score | ✅ Approve | Confirm per PPTX. |
| Q5 | Empty Person Percentage → ignore + re-normalize | ❌ Reject | Treat empty as 0 (more punitive — managers who skip the field score that member 0 for that component). |

---

## R-583 — Action Completion Date + Status Redesign (P1)

**Background.** Two-part change. **Part A:** clicking Complete on a committee action opens a date-input popup (no more auto-stamp), allowing backdate to true completion date. **Part B:** visual status redesign — Postpone dot orange, "Overdue" as a derived visual only, "Completed (late)" treatment for delayed actions.

| # | Nikki's Decision | Amir | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|
| Q1 (Part A) | Complete opens date-input popup; default today, editable to earlier (backdate) | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q2 (Part A) | Completion remains terminal — no reopen. Admin can correct date later (no reopen) | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q3 (Part B) | Postpone status dot = orange #F78956 (distinct from Complete green) | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q4 (Part B) | "Overdue" = derived visual only (no stored status, no new buttons, no new permissions) | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q5 (Part B) | "Completed (late)" = orange label; consolidates completed-after-target OR any postpone history | ⚠ Approve with comments | Treat both as "late" but **split into two sub-types**: **(1) Overdue** = completed past target with NO postpone history (just slipped); **(2) Postpone** = completed with postpone history (officially deferred and completed after). Both share the orange visual, but use distinct labels (e.g. "Completed (overdue)" vs "Completed (postponed)") — don't collapse into one "late" since user intent differs. |

---

## R-584 — Role Management: Search by Member (P2)

**Background.** Add a search box on Role Management page — type a member's name to see all roles that user belongs to. Helps admins audit which roles a person has across the system.

| # | Nikki's Decision | Amir | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|
| Q1 | Search is by MEMBER name, returns the role(s) that user belongs to | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q2 | Match by member NAME only (not email, not department, not role name) | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q3 | Member highlight in role's paginated member list = required, in scope | ✅ Approve | Required — keep in scope. |

---

## R-585 — Temporary Cycle: Department + Multi-Period (P1)

**Background.** Two enhancements to the existing Temporary Cycle feature. **(1)** Assignee picker supports both department-level tick and per-user selection (mixable). **(2)** A single temp cycle can target multiple periods at once (e.g. Q1 + Q2 + Q3 for KPI type).

| # | Nikki's Decision | Amir | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|
| Q1 | Assignee picker supports BOTH department-tick AND per-user; mixable in one cycle | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q2 | Snapshot expansion at save time — NOT live link to department membership changes | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q3 | Single temp cycle targets MULTIPLE periods at once (one name, one window, ONE email per assignee) | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q4 | Snapshot confirmed (not live link) | ✅ Approve | Snapshot confirmed. |
| Q5 | Per-period vs shared window? | ✅ Approve | One shared window + email. |
| Q6 | Mix granularities (Q1 + Feb) or same-granularity only? | ✅ Approve | Allow mixed (Q1 + Feb). |

---

## R-586 — Committee Dashboard First Chart Click (P2)

**Background.** Make the first chart on the Committee Dashboard (Committee Performance Trend) interactive — clicking a team's bar navigates to that team's detail page. Same destination as Committee → Teams → (team).

| # | Nikki's Decision | Amir | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|
| Q1 | Click team's bar on Committee Performance Trend chart → team detail page | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q2 | First chart ONLY in scope — other committee charts unchanged | ✅ Approve | — |
| Q3 | Other charts clickable in a later ticket? | ✅ Approve (follow-up ticket) | Just create demo using AI and make all clickable. Any UI is fine. |

---

## Overall

✅ **Approve with conditions.**

### Items rejected (Amir disagreed with Nikki's decision)

| # | What changed |
|---|---|
| R-580-Q1 | Scope: 2 KPIs → **3 KPIs**. Need (1) Attendance, (2) Task, (3) **Overall** = Attendance + Task. The third Overall KPI is the aggregated headline number managers care about. |
| R-582-Q5 | Empty Person Percentage → **treat as 0** (not ignore + re-normalize). |

### Items approved with comments (10)

| # | Item | Amir's note |
|---|---|---|
| R-400-Q5 | In-progress cycle behavior (PM proposal for open question) | Post cycle = initiation closed, user cannot update. Late submission during post-cycle review re-triggers LM approval as fresh review (if LM already approved). |
| R-450-Q4 | Budget rollup for excluded initiatives | Might be using last year's budget — need to confirm. |
| R-572-Q4 | 30-day auto-purge for drafts | Extend — planning phase is 1-2 months. Recommend 60-day minimum. |
| R-582-Q4 | Person Percentage weighting | Confirm per customer PPTX. |
| R-583-Q5 | "Completed (late)" wording | Use **"postpone"** instead of **"late"** for accuracy. |
| R-584-Q3 | Member highlight in paginated list | Required — keep in scope, not a fast-follow. |
| R-585-Q5 | Per-period vs shared window? | One shared window + one email per assignee. |
| R-585-Q6 | Mix granularities? | Allow mixed (e.g. Q1 + Feb). |
| R-586-Q3 | Other charts clickable later? | Yes — follow-up ticket. Create AI demo, all charts clickable, any UI acceptable. |
| R-582-Q4 (duplicate) | (see above) | — |

### Follow-up ticket Amir requested

| # | Item |
|---|---|
| R-586 follow-up | Make all committee-dashboard charts clickable (KPI Breakdown, MoM Compliance, Outstanding Actions). PM provides AI-generated demo prototype; any UI acceptable. |

---

## History

| Date | Pass | ✅ Approved | ⚠ With comments | ❌ Rejected |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 2026-06-17 | Round 1 (full) | 37 baseline | 4 (incl. defers) | 1 |
| 2026-06-17 | Round 2 (pending) | 9 | 6 | 0 |
| 2026-06-17 | R-580 revision | -1 from ✅ | 0 | +1 to ❌ |
| 2026-06-17 | **Final** | **45** | **10** | **2** |

content.content:
1	# [P2] R-579 — Add KPI Form Field Changes (Committee) / 委员会 Add KPI 表单字段调整
2	
3	| | |
4	|---|---|
5	| **Version** | V3.4 |
6	| **Source / 来源** | Customer requirement raised at 2026-06-10 V3.4 planning meeting / 2026-06-10 V3.4 规划会议上客户提出的需求 |
7	| **Priority** | P2 |
8	| **Created** | 2026-06-12 |
9	| **PM status** | `draft` |
10	| **Related / 关联** | [R-578](./[R-578]-committee-remove-link-kpi-add-type-dropdown.md) — the type-first dropdown that opens this form / R-578 是打开本表单前的"先选类型"入口 |
11	
12	---
13	
14	## The problem / 问题
15	
16	> 简述：委员会的 Add KPI 表单（点 "+" 选完类型后打开的那个）有三处要调整：① Measurement Cycle 下拉没有 Monthly 选项，但客户的评估是月度的；② 表单里还有一个 KPI Type 字段，跟 R-578 第一步选的类型重复了，要删掉；③ Counted in Statistics 字段在委员会这个表单里没显示出来、也没默认值，客户希望默认就是"计入统计"。除这三处外，表单其余字段全部保持不变。
17	
18	The committee Add KPI form (the one that opens after the R-578 type dropdown) needs three field-level changes. Everything else in the form stays exactly as it is today.
19	
20	- The **Measurement Cycle** dropdown does not include Monthly — but the customer's committee evaluation cadence is monthly.
21	- The form still contains a **KPI Type** field that is now redundant with R-578's type-first dropdown.
22	- The **Counted in Statistics** setting is not surfaced in the committee form and has no default — the customer wants it defaulted to "Counted in Stats".
23	
24	---
25	
26	## Current behavior / 当前行为
27	
28	> 简述：表单里有 KPI Type 必填下拉（Strategic / Operational / Process / Enabler）。Measurement Cycle 下拉只有 Annual / Semi-Annual / Quarterly，没有 Monthly（Monthly 在系统枚举里已存在，只是这个表单屏蔽了）。Counted in Statistics 在委员会这个表单里根本没显示，存数据时靠后端兜底。
29	
30	| Current Add KPI form (live) / 当前 Add KPI 表单 |
31	|---|
32	| ![current-form](artifacts/screenshots/add-kpi-redesign/current-add-kpi-form.png) |
33	
34	> The Add KPI form today (captured from the live system on 2026-06-12).
35	
36	| Field / 字段 | Current state / 当前状态 |
37	|---|---|
38	| KPI Type / KPI 类型 | Required dropdown inside the form (Strategic / Operational / Process / Enabler) — admin must pick on every save. |
39	| Measurement Cycle / 测量周期 | Dropdown lists Annual / Semi-Annual / Quarterly. **Monthly is missing.** The value `measurementCycleEnum.Monthly = 3` exists at [strategicKpis.ts:1-6](../../../frontend/src/constants/strategicKpis.ts#L1-L6) but is filtered out by the gate at [KpiForm.tsx:320-343](../../../frontend/src/pages/StrategicKpis/KpisManagement/AddKpi/components/KpiForm.tsx#L320-L343). |
40	| Counted in Statistics (labeled **"Type"** in the form) / 是否计入统计（表单里叫 "Type"） | Rendered in the form (the `type` field, options Counted in Stats / Excluded from Stats via `strategyApiTypeEnum`), but has **no committee default** — the admin must pick it each time, and if left untouched the value falls through to the backend default. |
41	
42	---
43	
44	## Expected behavior / 期望行为
45	
46	> 简述：三个字段一次性改 —— ① Measurement Cycle 加 Monthly，不被任何条件屏蔽；② KPI Type 字段从表单删掉（类型由 R-578 第一步带入，保存时仍随请求带上）；③ Counted in Statistics 在表单里显示出来，默认"计入统计"，用户不动也能保存，需要时可改成"不计入"。表单其他字段不动。
47	
48	| # | Field / 字段 | Change / 变更 | Before / 之前 | After / 之后 |
49	|---|---|---|---|---|
50	| 1 | **Measurement Cycle** | Add Monthly as an unconditionally selectable option, alongside Annual / Semi-Annual / Quarterly, not gated by any other field. / 加 Monthly，不被联动屏蔽 | Annual / Semi-Annual / Quarterly | **Annual / Semi-Annual / Quarterly / Monthly** |
51	| 2 | **KPI Type** | Remove the field from the form UI. The type comes from R-578's dropdown choice and is set internally; the save payload still carries it. / 表单里删掉，类型由 R-578 带入，保存仍带 | Required dropdown inside the form | **Field removed from UI** |
52	| 3 | **Counted in Statistics** (the field labeled **"Type"** in the form — Counted in Stats / Excluded from Stats) | Default it to "Counted in Stats" when `fromTeam`. The field already renders in the form today but had no committee default; now it is pre-set to Counted. Admin can still switch to "Excluded from Stats". The form is valid without the admin touching it. / 给这个字段（表单里叫 "Type"）设默认值"计入统计"，可改不计入 | Rendered, no committee default | **Defaults to Counted in Stats, changeable to Excluded** |
53	
54	> Note on naming: in the live form the field labeled **"Type"** is the Counted-in-Statistics selector (Counted / Excluded), and the field labeled **"KPI Type"** is the Strategic/Operational/Process/Enabler classification. Change #2 removes **"KPI Type"**; change #3 defaults **"Type"**. / 表单里"Type"是"是否计入统计"，"KPI Type"才是 Strategic/Operational/... 那个分类。#2 删的是 KPI Type，#3 给 Type 设默认。
55	
56	**All other form fields are unchanged** — name (EN/AR), description, formula description, duration (still constrained by team dates per R-446), responsible person, measurement type, assembly method, measurement mechanism, measurement unit, target performance. Same labels, same validation, same save path. **The whole form keeps the live layout** — same section grouping (General Info / KPI Info / Measurement Information), same field order, same two-column arrangement; the only differences are the three changes above. / 其余字段全部不变，整个表单的分区、分组、字段顺序、两列布局全部沿用线上的样子，只有上面三处不同。
57	
58	| Expected — Add KPI form (KPI Type removed, "Type" defaults to Counted In Stats, live layout preserved) / 期望 — Add KPI 表单 |
59	|---|
60	| ![expected-form](artifacts/screenshots/add-kpi-redesign/expected-add-kpi-form.png) |
61	
62	| Expected — Measurement Cycle now includes Monthly (enabled after Start + End dates are set) / 期望 — Measurement Cycle 含 Monthly |
63	|---|
64	| ![expected-cycle](artifacts/screenshots/add-kpi-redesign/expected-measurement-cycle-monthly.png) |
65	
66	> Note: the Measurement Cycle dropdown is disabled until both Start Date and End Date are filled (existing system behavior — the cycle drives the period table, which needs the date range). Once both dates are set, the dropdown enables and Monthly is selectable. / 注意：Measurement Cycle 在填好开始和结束日期之前是禁用的（现有逻辑，周期要依赖日期范围），填好日期后即可选，Monthly 就在里面。
67	
68	### Responsible Person — no per-type restriction / 责任人 —— 不按类型限制
69	
70	> 简述：现在加 KPI 要先选类型（R-578），那责任人下拉要不要按类型限制？决策：不限制。三种类型的责任人下拉都一样 —— 显示该团队的全部成员（沿用 R-446 现有逻辑：经理 + 协调员 + 内部成员 + 适用的外部成员）。不针对 Admin / Team / Individual 做不同的责任人范围。
71	
72	The Responsible Person dropdown lists **all team members** (manager + coordinator + internal members + applicable external members — the existing R-446 scope) **regardless of which KPI type was chosen** in the R-578 dropdown. There is no per-type restriction:
73	
74	| KPI type (from R-578) / 类型 | Responsible Person options / 责任人选项 |
75	|---|---|
76	| Individual KPI | All team members / 全部团队成员 |
77	| Team KPI | All team members / 全部团队成员 |
78	| Admin KPI | All team members / 全部团队成员 |
79	
80	Rationale: the team-members-only scope (already enforced by R-446) is the meaningful restriction; adding per-type rules would over-constrain a human judgment the manager should make. Note: this is the manual Add KPI flow — R-580's auto-generated Individual KPIs separately fix the responsible person to the member themselves, but that is auto-generation, not this form. / 团队成员范围已经是合理的限制；按类型再细分会限制经理本该自主的判断。R-580 自动生成的 KPI 责任人固定为成员本人，那是自动生成，不是这个手动表单。
81	
82	### Final Add KPI form field list / 改造后表单字段清单
83	
84	| Field / 字段 | Required / 必填 | Default / 默认 | Change / 变更 |
85	|---|---|---|---|
86	| KPI Name (EN) | Yes | — | Unchanged |
87	| KPI Name (AR) | Yes | — | Unchanged |
88	| Description | No | — | Unchanged |
89	| Measurement Formulas Description | No | — | Unchanged |
90	| Duration (start + end date) | Yes | — | Unchanged (constrained by team dates per R-446) |
91	| ~~KPI Type~~ | — | — | **Removed (change #2)** |
92	| Responsible Person | Yes | — | Unchanged |
93	| Measurement Cycle | Yes | — | **Monthly added (change #1)** |
94	| Measurement Type | Yes | — | Unchanged |
95	| Assembly Method | Yes | — | Unchanged |
96	| Measurement Mechanism | Yes | — | Unchanged |
97	| Measurement Unit | Yes | — | Unchanged |
98	| Target Performance | Yes | — | Unchanged |
99	| Counted in Statistics | Yes | **Counted in Stats** | **Added with default (change #3)** |
100	
101	---
102	
103	## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准
104	
105	| # | Criterion / 验收项 | Priority |
106	|---|---|---|
107	| 1 | The Measurement Cycle dropdown includes Monthly as a selectable option, alongside Quarterly, Semi-Annual, and Annual. Selection is not gated by any other field. / Measurement Cycle 有 Monthly，不被联动屏蔽 | P0 |
108	| 2 | The Add KPI form no longer renders the KPI Type field as a user-facing control; the save payload still carries the type chosen in the R-578 dropdown. / 表单不显示 KPI Type 字段，保存仍带类型 | P0 |
109	| 3 | The Counted in Statistics field is visible in the committee Add KPI form, defaults to "Counted in Stats", and the form is valid without the admin touching it. / Counted in Statistics 显示，默认计入，不动也能存 | P0 |
110	| 4 | The admin can change Counted in Statistics to "Excluded from Stats" before save, and the choice persists. / 可改为 Excluded，保存生效 | P0 |
111	| 5 | All other form fields (name, description, duration, responsible person, measurement type/assembly/mechanism/unit, target) are unchanged in label, validation, and behavior. / 其余字段不变 | P0 |
112	| 6 | Bilingual labels: the Measurement Cycle Monthly option and the Counted in Statistics field render correctly in EN and AR. / Monthly 选项和 Counted in Statistics 字段中英阿正常 | P0 |
113	
114	---
115	
116	## QA test scenario / QA 测试场景
117	
118	| Setup / 前置 | Steps / 步骤 | Expected / 期望 |
119	|---|---|---|
120	| Admin role; on the committee team detail, the Add KPI form is open (via the R-578 type dropdown, any type). | 1. Confirm the form does NOT show a KPI Type field. 2. Open the Measurement Cycle dropdown → confirm Monthly is listed alongside Quarterly / Semi-Annual / Annual. 3. Confirm Counted in Statistics is pre-set to "Counted in Stats" and the form is valid without touching it. 4. Fill the remaining required fields, select Measurement Cycle = Monthly, leave Counted in Statistics at default, and Save. 5. Reopen Add KPI, this time flip Counted in Statistics to "Excluded from Stats", Save. 6. Switch UI to Arabic, reopen the form. | Step 1: KPI Type field absent. Step 2: Monthly selectable for any type. Step 3: Counted in Stats pre-selected; form passes validation untouched. Step 4: KPI created with Monthly cycle + Counted flag. Step 5: KPI created with the Excluded flag (round-trips on reload). Step 6: Monthly option and Counted-in-Stats field render correctly in Arabic. |
121	
122	---
123	
124	## Proposed technical solution
125	
126	> English-only section. PM does not need to review beyond this point.
127	
128	### Frontend
129	
130	Changes apply inside the committee Add KPI form (`AddCommitteeKpiModal`, opened from [`KpiColumn/index.tsx`](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx)).
131	
132	1. **Change #1 — Monthly in Measurement Cycle:** ensure the form's Measurement Cycle options include Monthly (`measurementCycleEnum.Monthly = 3`). If the modal reuses `KpiForm.tsx`, add a `fromCommittee` prop that bypasses the Strategic/Enabler gating at [KpiForm.tsx:320-343](../../../frontend/src/pages/StrategicKpis/KpisManagement/AddKpi/components/KpiForm.tsx#L320-L343).
133	2. **Change #2 — Remove KPI Type field:** remove the form item. The type is supplied from `chosenKpiType` (passed in by R-578) and included in the save payload.
134	3. **Change #3 — Surface Counted in Statistics with default Counted:** add a Counted-in-Statistics `FormItem` to the committee form (currently absent). Set initial value to `strategyApiTypeEnum['Counted in Stats'] = 0`. Normal Select — admin can switch to `Excluded from Stats` (value `1`).
135	
136	**Locales:** add an EN + AR entry under `committeeTeam:teams.detail.countedInStats` for the new Counted/Excluded field label. The Monthly option label already exists in the measurement-cycle enum locale.
137	
138	### Backend
139	
140	No new endpoints. The Add KPI save path already accepts `type` (Counted / Excluded). **Verify** the create payload accepts `measurementCycle = 3` (Monthly) for committee KPIs; if currently rejected, lift the restriction (committee KPI types are independent of the Strategic/Operational/Process/Enabler dimension the Monthly gate keys on).
141	
142	### Database
143	
144	No schema changes.
145	
146	### Effort estimate
147	
148	- Frontend: ~0.5 day (Monthly enabling + remove KPI Type field + Counted-in-Stats field + locale)
149	- Backend: ~0 day (verification only)
150	- QA: ~0.5 day
151	- **Total: ~0.5 dev-day** (combined with R-578, ~1.5 dev-days total)
152	
153	---
154	
155	## Screenshots / 截图
156	
157	- **BEFORE (current state, from live system):** embedded in the Current behavior section above.
158	- **EXPECTED (mock):** to be captured from a local frontend mock and embedded later.
159	
160	---
161	
162	## Open questions / 待澄清
163	
164	None. All design decisions locked with Eugene on 2026-06-12 — see Locked decisions.
165	
166	---

168	## Locked decisions / 已锁定决策
169	
170	1. **Monthly added to Measurement Cycle, unconditionally selectable** in the committee Add KPI form. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.
171	
172	2. **KPI Type field removed from the form** — the type comes from the R-578 dropdown. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.
173	
174	3. **Counted in Statistics defaults to Counted**, surfaced in the form, changeable to Excluded. Form is valid without the admin touching it. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.
175	
176	4. **All other form fields unchanged** — only these three changes; the rest of the Add KPI form stays exactly as today, keeping the live layout (section grouping, field order, two-column arrangement). Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.
177	
178	5. **Responsible Person is not restricted by KPI type** — all three types show the full team-member list (existing R-446 scope). No per-type restriction. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-15.
