file.content:
# [P2] R-579 — Add KPI Form Field Changes (Committee) / 委员会 Add KPI 表单字段调整

| | |
|---|---|
| **Version** | V3.4 |
| **Source / 来源** | Customer requirement raised at 2026-06-10 V3.4 planning meeting / 2026-06-10 V3.4 规划会议上客户提出的需求 |
| **Priority** | P2 |
| **Created** | 2026-06-12 |
| **PM status** | `draft` |
| **Related / 关联** | [R-578](./[R-578]-committee-remove-link-kpi-add-type-dropdown.md) — the type-first dropdown that opens this form / R-578 是打开本表单前的"先选类型"入口 |

---

## The problem / 问题

> 简述：委员会的 Add KPI 表单（点 "+" 选完类型后打开的那个）有三处要调整：① Measurement Cycle 下拉没有 Monthly 选项，但客户的评估是月度的；② 表单里还有一个 KPI Type 字段，跟 R-578 第一步选的类型重复了，要删掉；③ Counted in Statistics 字段在委员会这个表单里没显示出来、也没默认值，客户希望默认就是"计入统计"。除这三处外，表单其余字段全部保持不变。

The committee Add KPI form (the one that opens after the R-578 type dropdown) needs three field-level changes. Everything else in the form stays exactly as it is today.

- The **Measurement Cycle** dropdown does not include Monthly — but the customer's committee evaluation cadence is monthly.
- The form still contains a **KPI Type** field that is now redundant with R-578's type-first dropdown.
- The **Counted in Statistics** setting is not surfaced in the committee form and has no default — the customer wants it defaulted to "Counted in Stats".

---

## Current behavior / 当前行为

> 简述：表单里有 KPI Type 必填下拉（Strategic / Operational / Process / Enabler）。Measurement Cycle 下拉只有 Annual / Semi-Annual / Quarterly，没有 Monthly（Monthly 在系统枚举里已存在，只是这个表单屏蔽了）。Counted in Statistics 在委员会这个表单里根本没显示，存数据时靠后端兜底。

| Current Add KPI form (live) / 当前 Add KPI 表单 |
|---|
| ![current-form](artifacts/screenshots/add-kpi-redesign/current-add-kpi-form.png) |

> The Add KPI form today (captured from the live system on 2026-06-12).

| Field / 字段 | Current state / 当前状态 |
|---|---|
| KPI Type / KPI 类型 | Required dropdown inside the form (Strategic / Operational / Process / Enabler) — admin must pick on every save. |
| Measurement Cycle / 测量周期 | Dropdown lists Annual / Semi-Annual / Quarterly. **Monthly is missing.** The value `measurementCycleEnum.Monthly = 3` exists at [strategicKpis.ts:1-6](../../../frontend/src/constants/strategicKpis.ts#L1-L6) but is filtered out by the gate at [KpiForm.tsx:320-343](../../../frontend/src/pages/StrategicKpis/KpisManagement/AddKpi/components/KpiForm.tsx#L320-L343). |
| Counted in Statistics (labeled **"Type"** in the form) / 是否计入统计（表单里叫 "Type"） | Rendered in the form (the `type` field, options Counted in Stats / Excluded from Stats via `strategyApiTypeEnum`), but has **no committee default** — the admin must pick it each time, and if left untouched the value falls through to the backend default. |

---

## Expected behavior / 期望行为

> 简述：三个字段一次性改 —— ① Measurement Cycle 加 Monthly，不被任何条件屏蔽；② KPI Type 字段从表单删掉（类型由 R-578 第一步带入，保存时仍随请求带上）；③ Counted in Statistics 在表单里显示出来，默认"计入统计"，用户不动也能保存，需要时可改成"不计入"。表单其他字段不动。

| # | Field / 字段 | Change / 变更 | Before / 之前 | After / 之后 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Measurement Cycle** | Add Monthly as an unconditionally selectable option, alongside Annual / Semi-Annual / Quarterly, not gated by any other field. / 加 Monthly，不被联动屏蔽 | Annual / Semi-Annual / Quarterly | **Annual / Semi-Annual / Quarterly / Monthly** |
| 2 | **KPI Type** | Remove the field from the form UI. The type comes from R-578's dropdown choice and is set internally; the save payload still carries it. / 表单里删掉，类型由 R-578 带入，保存仍带 | Required dropdown inside the form | **Field removed from UI** |
| 3 | **Counted in Statistics** (the field labeled **"Type"** in the form — Counted in Stats / Excluded from Stats) | Default it to "Counted in Stats" when `fromTeam`. The field already renders in the form today but had no committee default; now it is pre-set to Counted. Admin can still switch to "Excluded from Stats". The form is valid without the admin touching it. / 给这个字段（表单里叫 "Type"）设默认值"计入统计"，可改不计入 | Rendered, no committee default | **Defaults to Counted in Stats, changeable to Excluded** |

> Note on naming: in the live form the field labeled **"Type"** is the Counted-in-Statistics selector (Counted / Excluded), and the field labeled **"KPI Type"** is the Strategic/Operational/Process/Enabler classification. Change #2 removes **"KPI Type"**; change #3 defaults **"Type"**. / 表单里"Type"是"是否计入统计"，"KPI Type"才是 Strategic/Operational/... 那个分类。#2 删的是 KPI Type，#3 给 Type 设默认。

**All other form fields are unchanged** — name (EN/AR), description, formula description, duration (still constrained by team dates per R-446), responsible person, measurement type, assembly method, measurement mechanism, measurement unit, target performance. Same labels, same validation, same save path. **The whole form keeps the live layout** — same section grouping (General Info / KPI Info / Measurement Information), same field order, same two-column arrangement; the only differences are the three changes above. / 其余字段全部不变，整个表单的分区、分组、字段顺序、两列布局全部沿用线上的样子，只有上面三处不同。

| Expected — Add KPI form (KPI Type removed, "Type" defaults to Counted In Stats, live layout preserved) / 期望 — Add KPI 表单 |
|---|
| ![expected-form](artifacts/screenshots/add-kpi-redesign/expected-add-kpi-form.png) |

| Expected — Measurement Cycle now includes Monthly (enabled after Start + End dates are set) / 期望 — Measurement Cycle 含 Monthly |
|---|
| ![expected-cycle](artifacts/screenshots/add-kpi-redesign/expected-measurement-cycle-monthly.png) |

> Note: the Measurement Cycle dropdown is disabled until both Start Date and End Date are filled (existing system behavior — the cycle drives the period table, which needs the date range). Once both dates are set, the dropdown enables and Monthly is selectable. / 注意：Measurement Cycle 在填好开始和结束日期之前是禁用的（现有逻辑，周期要依赖日期范围），填好日期后即可选，Monthly 就在里面。

### Responsible Person — no per-type restriction / 责任人 —— 不按类型限制

> 简述：现在加 KPI 要先选类型（R-578），那责任人下拉要不要按类型限制？决策：不限制。三种类型的责任人下拉都一样 —— 显示该团队的全部成员（沿用 R-446 现有逻辑：经理 + 协调员 + 内部成员 + 适用的外部成员）。不针对 Admin / Team / Individual 做不同的责任人范围。

The Responsible Person dropdown lists **all team members** (manager + coordinator + internal members + applicable external members — the existing R-446 scope) **regardless of which KPI type was chosen** in the R-578 dropdown. There is no per-type restriction:

| KPI type (from R-578) / 类型 | Responsible Person options / 责任人选项 |
|---|---|
| Individual KPI | All team members / 全部团队成员 |
| Team KPI | All team members / 全部团队成员 |
| Admin KPI | All team members / 全部团队成员 |

Rationale: the team-members-only scope (already enforced by R-446) is the meaningful restriction; adding per-type rules would over-constrain a human judgment the manager should make. Note: this is the manual Add KPI flow — R-580's auto-generated Individual KPIs separately fix the responsible person to the member themselves, but that is auto-generation, not this form. / 团队成员范围已经是合理的限制；按类型再细分会限制经理本该自主的判断。R-580 自动生成的 KPI 责任人固定为成员本人，那是自动生成，不是这个手动表单。

### Final Add KPI form field list / 改造后表单字段清单

| Field / 字段 | Required / 必填 | Default / 默认 | Change / 变更 |
|---|---|---|---|
| KPI Name (EN) | Yes | — | Unchanged |
| KPI Name (AR) | Yes | — | Unchanged |
| Description | No | — | Unchanged |
| Measurement Formulas Description | No | — | Unchanged |
| Duration (start + end date) | Yes | — | Unchanged (constrained by team dates per R-446) |
| ~~KPI Type~~ | — | — | **Removed (change #2)** |
| Responsible Person | Yes | — | Unchanged |
| Measurement Cycle | Yes | — | **Monthly added (change #1)** |
| Measurement Type | Yes | — | Unchanged |
| Assembly Method | Yes | — | Unchanged |
| Measurement Mechanism | Yes | — | Unchanged |
| Measurement Unit | Yes | — | Unchanged |
| Target Performance | Yes | — | Unchanged |
| Counted in Statistics | Yes | **Counted in Stats** | **Added with default (change #3)** |

---

## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准

| # | Criterion / 验收项 | Priority |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | The Measurement Cycle dropdown includes Monthly as a selectable option, alongside Quarterly, Semi-Annual, and Annual. Selection is not gated by any other field. / Measurement Cycle 有 Monthly，不被联动屏蔽 | P0 |
| 2 | The Add KPI form no longer renders the KPI Type field as a user-facing control; the save payload still carries the type chosen in the R-578 dropdown. / 表单不显示 KPI Type 字段，保存仍带类型 | P0 |
| 3 | The Counted in Statistics field is visible in the committee Add KPI form, defaults to "Counted in Stats", and the form is valid without the admin touching it. / Counted in Statistics 显示，默认计入，不动也能存 | P0 |
| 4 | The admin can change Counted in Statistics to "Excluded from Stats" before save, and the choice persists. / 可改为 Excluded，保存生效 | P0 |
| 5 | All other form fields (name, description, duration, responsible person, measurement type/assembly/mechanism/unit, target) are unchanged in label, validation, and behavior. / 其余字段不变 | P0 |
| 6 | Bilingual labels: the Measurement Cycle Monthly option and the Counted in Statistics field render correctly in EN and AR. / Monthly 选项和 Counted in Statistics 字段中英阿正常 | P0 |

---

## QA test scenario / QA 测试场景

| Setup / 前置 | Steps / 步骤 | Expected / 期望 |
|---|---|---|
| Admin role; on the committee team detail, the Add KPI form is open (via the R-578 type dropdown, any type). | 1. Confirm the form does NOT show a KPI Type field. 2. Open the Measurement Cycle dropdown → confirm Monthly is listed alongside Quarterly / Semi-Annual / Annual. 3. Confirm Counted in Statistics is pre-set to "Counted in Stats" and the form is valid without touching it. 4. Fill the remaining required fields, select Measurement Cycle = Monthly, leave Counted in Statistics at default, and Save. 5. Reopen Add KPI, this time flip Counted in Statistics to "Excluded from Stats", Save. 6. Switch UI to Arabic, reopen the form. | Step 1: KPI Type field absent. Step 2: Monthly selectable for any type. Step 3: Counted in Stats pre-selected; form passes validation untouched. Step 4: KPI created with Monthly cycle + Counted flag. Step 5: KPI created with the Excluded flag (round-trips on reload). Step 6: Monthly option and Counted-in-Stats field render correctly in Arabic. |

---

## Proposed technical solution

> English-only section. PM does not need to review beyond this point.

### Frontend

Changes apply inside the committee Add KPI form (`AddCommitteeKpiModal`, opened from [`KpiColumn/index.tsx`](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx)).

1. **Change #1 — Monthly in Measurement Cycle:** ensure the form's Measurement Cycle options include Monthly (`measurementCycleEnum.Monthly = 3`). If the modal reuses `KpiForm.tsx`, add a `fromCommittee` prop that bypasses the Strategic/Enabler gating at [KpiForm.tsx:320-343](../../../frontend/src/pages/StrategicKpis/KpisManagement/AddKpi/components/KpiForm.tsx#L320-L343).
2. **Change #2 — Remove KPI Type field:** remove the form item. The type is supplied from `chosenKpiType` (passed in by R-578) and included in the save payload.
3. **Change #3 — Surface Counted in Statistics with default Counted:** add a Counted-in-Statistics `FormItem` to the committee form (currently absent). Set initial value to `strategyApiTypeEnum['Counted in Stats'] = 0`. Normal Select — admin can switch to `Excluded from Stats` (value `1`).

**Locales:** add an EN + AR entry under `committeeTeam:teams.detail.countedInStats` for the new Counted/Excluded field label. The Monthly option label already exists in the measurement-cycle enum locale.

### Backend

No new endpoints. The Add KPI save path already accepts `type` (Counted / Excluded). **Verify** the create payload accepts `measurementCycle = 3` (Monthly) for committee KPIs; if currently rejected, lift the restriction (committee KPI types are independent of the Strategic/Operational/Process/Enabler dimension the Monthly gate keys on).

### Database

No schema changes.

### Effort estimate

- Frontend: ~0.5 day (Monthly enabling + remove KPI Type field + Counted-in-Stats field + locale)
- Backend: ~0 day (verification only)
- QA: ~0.5 day
- **Total: ~0.5 dev-day** (combined with R-578, ~1.5 dev-days total)

---

## Screenshots / 截图

- **BEFORE (current state, from live system):** embedded in the Current behavior section above.
- **EXPECTED (mock):** to be captured from a local frontend mock and embedded later.

---

## Open questions / 待澄清

None. All design decisions locked with Eugene on 2026-06-12 — see Locked decisions.

---

## Locked decisions / 已锁定决策

1. **Monthly added to Measurement Cycle, unconditionally selectable** in the committee Add KPI form. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.

2. **KPI Type field removed from the form** — the type comes from the R-578 dropdown. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.

3. **Counted in Statistics defaults to Counted**, surfaced in the form, changeable to Excluded. Form is valid without the admin touching it. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.

4. **All other form fields unchanged** — only these three changes; the rest of the Add KPI form stays exactly as today, keeping the live layout (section grouping, field order, two-column arrangement). Locked by Eugene 2026-06-12.

5. **Responsible Person is not restricted by KPI type** — all three types show the full team-member list (existing R-446 scope). No per-type restriction. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-15.

---

## Related PRDs / 相关 PRD

- [R-578 Replace Link KPI with Type-Aware Add KPI Flow](./[R-578]-committee-remove-link-kpi-add-type-dropdown.md) — the type-first dropdown that opens this form and supplies the KPI type
- [R-446 Add KPI from Team Detail](../V3.3/[R-446]-add-kpi-from-team-detail.md) — original team-scoped Add KPI form; duration is still constrained by team dates per R-446

content.content:
1	# [P2] R-580 — Auto-Generate Individual KPIs (Attendance + Task Completion) per Member on Team Creation / 创建团队时为每个成员自动生成两条 Individual KPI（出勤 + 任务完成）
2	
3	| | |
4	|---|---|
5	| **Version** | V3.4 |
6	| **Source / 来源** | Customer requirement raised at 2026-06-10 V3.4 planning meeting / 2026-06-10 V3.4 规划会议上客户提出的需求 |
7	| **Priority** | P2 |
8	| **Created** | 2026-06-12 |
9	| **PM status** | `draft` |
10	| **Spec source for formulas / 公式来源** | [`reference/client-docs/KPI Template for committee calculation performance.pptx`](../../../reference/client-docs/KPI%20Template%20for%20committee%20calculation%20performance.pptx) — Member Evaluation section (PPTX slide 4) is the canonical formula source for the two auto-generated KPIs / 客户提供的模板第 4 页是这两条自动生成 KPI 的公式依据 |
11	
12	---
13	
14	## The problem / 问题
15	
16	> 简述：现在创建新的委员会团队的时候，团队 KPI 标签页是空的。要让团队能跑评估，Admin 必须手动给每个成员加两条 Individual KPI —— 出勤、任务完成。每个团队、每个成员都要重复同样的设置，慢、容易漏，而且全公司不同的 Admin 加出来的格式还不统一。客户要求：创建团队的时候系统自动给每个成员生成这两条 Individual KPI，公式按客户给的模板算，数据从现有的 MoM、Actions 模块自动拉。其他类型的 KPI（Team KPI、Admin KPI）如果团队需要，Admin 还是手动加。
17	
18	When a committee team is created today, the team detail → KPI tab is empty. To make the team functional for evaluation, an admin must manually add two Individual KPIs per member — Attendance and On-Time Task Completion. Every team repeats the same setup, and every admin in the organisation may format these slightly differently, creating inconsistency across teams.
19	
20	The customer wants the system to **auto-generate these two Individual KPIs per member at team creation time** — no manual setup, formulas come from the customer's PPTX template, values are auto-calculated from existing MoM and Actions data.
21	
22	**Out of scope:** Team KPIs (work plan, outputs, meetings held, budget, reports, etc.) and Admin KPIs are **not** auto-generated. If the team needs any of these, the admin adds them manually via the R-578 / R-579 Add KPI flow. This keeps R-580 focused on the universally-needed per-member baseline; richer team-level metrics stay opt-in.
23	
24	---
25	
26	## Current behavior / 当前行为
27	
28	> 简述：创建团队 → 团队详情 → KPI 标签页是空的。每个成员的出勤 + 任务完成 KPI 都要 Admin 手动一个一个加，3 个成员就要加 6 条。
29	
30	After creating a committee team with N members:
31	
32	- The team detail → KPI tab is **empty** — no KPIs of any type are attached.
33	- To make the team evaluable, the admin opens the Add KPI flow (per R-578 / R-579) and manually creates 2 Individual KPIs **per member** — Attendance + Task Completion — for a total of `2N` KPIs.
34	- For a 3-member team, that's 6 manual KPI creations, each requiring the admin to enter the name, type, formula, target, and Responsible Person individually.
35	
36	| Before (current) / 当前 |
37	|---|
38	| ![current](artifacts/screenshots/auto-kpi-on-team-creation/current.png) |
39	
40	> Team detail KPI tab is empty immediately after team creation. The admin would now need to manually create 2 Individual KPIs per member. / 团队创建之后，KPI 标签页是空的。Admin 必须手动给每个成员加两条 Individual KPI。
41	
42	---
43	
44	## Expected behavior / 期望行为
45	
46	> 简述：创建团队 → 系统自动给每个成员生成两条 Individual KPI（出勤 + 任务完成）。3 个成员 → 自动生成 6 条 KPI，Admin 不用动手。公式、目标值、Responsible Person 都按预设来。值自动从 MoM、Actions 拉。Team KPI / Admin KPI 如果需要就 Admin 手动加，自动生成的不动它们。
47	
48	When a committee team is created (via the existing Add Team flow):
49	
50	- The system **automatically generates 2 Individual KPIs per member** at the moment of team creation.
51	- For a team with N members → `2N` Individual KPIs auto-created with no admin action required.
52	- Each auto-generated KPI's name, type, formula, target, sub-weight, and Responsible Person are pre-set per the spec below.
53	- KPI values are auto-calculated from existing module data (MoM for attendance, Actions for task completion) — admin does not enter values manually.
54	
55	### The two auto-generated KPIs per member / 每个成员生成的两条 KPI
56	
57	KPI names match the customer PPTX exactly — metric-only, no member name in the title. Each member gets one copy of each KPI; the **Responsible Person** field is what distinguishes "Member A's Attendance" from "Member B's Attendance" in the team's KPI list (same convention as existing team-scoped KPIs per R-446).
58	
59	| KPI name (EN) / 英文名 | KPI name (AR) / 阿语名 | Type / 类型 | Formula / 公式 | Target / 目标 | Responsible Person / 责任人 | Sub-weight inside Individual KPI / 子权重 |
60	|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
61	| Attendance Adherence Rate | نسبة الالتزام بحضور الاجتماعات | Individual KPI | (meetings attended ÷ total meetings held during measurement period) × 100 | 100% | The member themselves / 成员本人 | 20% |
62	| On-Time Task Completion Rate | نسبة الالتزام بتنفيذ التوصيات والتكليفات في الوقت المحدد | Individual KPI | (tasks completed on time ÷ total tasks assigned during measurement period) × 100 | 100% | The member themselves / 成员本人 | 80% |
63	
64	For a 3-member team you end up with 6 KPIs total — two `Attendance Adherence Rate` rows (one per member, distinguished by Responsible Person), two `On-Time Task Completion Rate` rows, etc.
65	
66	Sub-weights (20% / 80%) come from the customer PPTX, slide 4 (Member Evaluation section). They define how the two KPIs combine into the member's overall Individual KPI score; the Individual KPI score then contributes 20% to the team's final evaluation per R-447.
67	
68	> **On Amir's "add a 3rd Overall KPI" (R-580-Q1, 2026-06-17):** the aggregate (`Attendance×20% + Task×80%` = the calculator's "Member Score / الدرجة") is **NOT** auto-generated here as a third KPI card. R-580 stays at **two** auto KPIs (the components). The **Overall Score** aggregate is surfaced where it belongs — as a read-only **"Overall Score" column in Member Evaluation (see [R-582](./[R-582]-committee-member-evaluation-person-percentage.md))** — since that's the per-member evaluation screen. This delivers the "headline aggregate" Amir wanted without adding a third card to the team KPI tab. / Amir 要的"总体分"不在这里作为第三条 KPI；R-580 保持两条组件 KPI，汇总分作为 Member Evaluation 的只读 "Overall Score" 列在 R-582 实现。
69	
70	### How the completion ratio is calculated / 完成率怎么算
71	
72	> 简述：这两条 KPI 的完成率不是人填的，是系统按现有数据自动算的。出勤率 = 这个成员在衡量期内实际参加的会议数 ÷ 该团队在衡量期内召开的会议总数 × 100；任务完成率 = 这个成员在衡量期内按时完成的任务数 ÷ 分配给他的任务总数 × 100。会议数据来自 MoM 模块（会议的出席记录），任务数据来自 Actions 模块（行动项的负责人 + 完成状态 + 是否按时）。卡片上显示的完成率就是当前衡量周期下算出来的这个值，底层数据一变（比如又开了一次会、又完成了一个任务），完成率跟着自动更新。
73	
74	The completion ratio shown on each auto-generated KPI card is **computed by the system from existing module data** — never entered by a person. For a given member over the current measurement period:
75	
76	| KPI | Completion ratio formula | Numerator source | Denominator source |
77	|---|---|---|---|
78	| **Attendance Adherence Rate** | (meetings the member attended ÷ total meetings the team held in the period) × 100 | MoM module — per-meeting attendance records for this member | MoM module — count of meetings held by this team in the period |
79	| **On-Time Task Completion Rate** | (tasks the member completed on time ÷ total tasks assigned to the member in the period) × 100 | Actions module — action items where this member is the owner, status = Completed, and completed on or before the target date | Actions module — count of action items assigned to this member in the period |
80	
81	- **Measurement period** = the KPI's cycle window (per the cycle assigned at generation; aligns with the team's reporting cycle). Only meetings / tasks falling inside the current period count.
82	- **"On time"** for the task ratio follows the same rule the committee evaluation already uses (R-456 §AC): a postponed or past-target completion does not count as on-time.
83	- The card's percentage = this computed value for the current period. When the underlying data changes (a new meeting is held, a task is completed), the ratio updates automatically on the next read — there is no manual entry and no manual refresh.
84	- This reuses the existing committee Individual-KPI aggregation that already powers attendance / task figures elsewhere (e.g. the Members Evaluation auto columns) — R-580 does not invent a new calculation, it just attaches these two standing KPIs to it.
85	
86	### Member lifecycle / 成员变更生命周期
87	
88	| Event / 事件 | Behavior / 行为 |
89	|---|---|
90	| Team is created with N members / 创建团队（N 个成员） | System creates `2N` Individual KPIs at the moment of creation / 创建瞬间生成 2N 条 |
91	| New member added to existing team / 给现有团队添加新成员 | System creates 2 Individual KPIs for the new member at the moment they're added / 新成员加入时立刻补上他的两条 |
92	| Member removed from team / 从团队移除成员 | The removed member's 2 KPIs are soft-deleted; historical data is preserved (visible on completed cycles) but excluded from the current cycle's calculation / 软删除，历史保留 |
93	| Team is deleted / 团队被删除 | All auto-generated KPIs cascade-soft-delete (same rule as R-446 manual team-scoped KPIs) / 级联软删除（沿用 R-446） |
94	
95	### Editability of auto-generated KPIs / 自动生成 KPI 的可编辑性
96	
97	These KPIs **auto-update in real time** from MoM (attendance) and Actions (task completion) data. There is no human input involved in calculating the value, so admin edits would be immediately overwritten by the next sync. For that reason, **all fields are locked** for auto-generated KPIs:
98	
99	- Name / 名称
100	- Type / 类型
101	- Formula / 公式
102	- Target / 目标
103	- Sub-weight / 子权重
104	- Responsible Person / 责任人
105	- Actual value (the % shown on the card) / 实际值
106	
107	Admins **can**:
108	
109	- View the KPI on the team detail KPI tab. The Individual ring (per R-458) will count all 2N auto-generated KPIs.
110	- Click into the KPI to see the live computed value and drill into source data (MoM attendance records, Actions records).
111	- Add **additional** KPIs using the R-578 / R-579 Add KPI flow — those follow normal manual rules and remain fully editable / removable.
112	
113	### Auto-generated KPIs do NOT support manual remove / 自动生成的 KPI 不支持手动移除
114	
115	> 简述：手动添加的团队 KPI 卡片有"删除"操作（R-578 把原来的"解除关联"改成了"删除"）。但自动生成的这两条 KPI **不支持手动删除/移除** —— 卡片上没有删除入口。它们跟成员绑定：成员加入团队时自动生成，成员被移出团队时自动软删除，团队删除时级联软删除。Admin 不能单独手动删掉某个成员的自动 KPI，否则评估口径就乱了。
116	
117	Manually-added team KPI cards have a **Delete** action (R-578 renames the old "Cancel Link" to "Delete"). **Auto-generated KPIs do NOT** — their 3-dot menu offers **no Delete / remove option**. They are bound to team membership and are removed only by the system:
118	
119	| Removal trigger / 移除触发 | Behavior / 行为 |
120	|---|---|
121	| Member removed from team / 成员被移出团队 | That member's 2 auto-generated KPIs are soft-deleted automatically / 自动软删除 |
122	| Team deleted / 团队被删除 | All auto-generated KPIs cascade-soft-delete / 级联软删除 |
123	| Admin manual action / Admin 手动操作 | **Not allowed** — no Delete/remove option on auto-generated cards / 不允许，卡片上没有删除入口 |
124	
125	Rationale: these are the standard committee-evaluation baseline tied to each member; letting an admin manually delete one member's attendance/task KPI would break the evaluation consistency. They come and go only with team membership. (The R-578 Delete action applies to manually-added KPIs, not these.)
126	
127	### Visual marker / 视觉标记
128	
129	Each auto-generated KPI card shows a small **"Auto-generated" tag** next to the KPI name — a standard Arco `Tag` (neutral/grey, same component family as the existing KPI-type tags on the card), **no emoji / no icon**. Hovering shows the tooltip: *"This KPI updates automatically from MoM attendance and Actions data and cannot be edited." / "此 KPI 根据会议出席和任务完成数据实时自动更新，不可编辑。"* The system has no existing "auto" tag style, so this reuses the standard `Tag` styling already used on these cards.
130	
131	| After (expected) / 修复后 |
132	|---|
133	| ![expected](artifacts/screenshots/auto-kpi-on-team-creation/expected.png) |
134	
135	> Same team after R-580 ships — the moment the team is created, `2N` Individual KPIs are visible on the KPI tab (Attendance + Task Completion per member), each marked with the auto-generated badge. Admin did nothing to create them. / R-580 上线后同一个团队 —— 创建瞬间 2N 条 Individual KPI 自动出现在 KPI tab，每条带"自动生成"标志，Admin 没动手。
136	
137	---
138	
139	## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准
140	
141	| # | Criterion | Priority |
142	|---|---|---|
143	| 1 | On team creation with N members, the system auto-generates exactly `2N` Individual KPIs (Attendance Adherence Rate + On-Time Task Completion Rate per member) | P0 |
144	| 2 | Each auto-generated KPI's name matches the customer PPTX exactly — EN: `Attendance Adherence Rate` / `On-Time Task Completion Rate`; AR: `نسبة الالتزام بحضور الاجتماعات` / `نسبة الالتزام بتنفيذ التوصيات والتكليفات في الوقت المحدد`. No member name embedded in the KPI name. | P0 |
145	| 3 | Each auto-generated KPI has type = Individual KPI, target = 100%, and Responsible Person set to the corresponding team member. The 2N KPIs are distinguished by Responsible Person in the team's KPI list. | P0 |
146	| 4 | Formulas match the PPTX exactly — Attendance uses (meetings attended ÷ total meetings held) × 100; Task Completion uses (tasks completed on time ÷ total assigned tasks) × 100 | P0 |
147	| 5 | KPI values are auto-calculated in real time from MoM (attendance) and Actions (task completion) — no manual value entry, no admin intervention | P0 |
148	| 6 | Adding a new member to an existing team automatically creates that member's 2 Individual KPIs at the moment they are added | P0 |
149	| 7 | Removing a member from a team soft-deletes that member's 2 Individual KPIs; historical data on completed cycles is preserved | P0 |
150	| 8 | Deleting a team soft-deletes all auto-generated KPIs (matches R-446 cascade) | P0 |
151	| 9 | All fields on auto-generated KPIs are fully locked (name, type, formula, target, sub-weight, Responsible Person, actual value) — the API rejects any edit attempt with a clear error. There is no admin override. | P0 |
152	| 10 | Each auto-generated KPI card shows an **"Auto-generated" tag** (standard Arco Tag, no emoji/icon) next to the name, with a hover tooltip explaining the real-time auto-update behavior | P0 |
153	| 11 | Auto-generated KPI cards offer **no Delete / remove option** — they are removed only by the system (member removed → soft-delete that member's 2 KPIs; team deleted → cascade). Admin cannot manually delete an auto-generated KPI. | P0 |
154	| 12 | The completion ratio on each card is computed automatically (Attendance = attended ÷ meetings held; Task = on-time ÷ assigned, per period) from MoM / Actions data — no manual entry; it updates when the underlying data changes | P0 |
155	| 13 | Admins can still add additional Team / Admin / Individual KPIs manually via R-578 / R-579 — those operate independently and remain fully editable | P0 |
156	| 14 | Auto-generated KPIs are counted on the team detail's Individual KPI ring (per R-458 layout) | P0 |
157	
158	---
159	
160	## QA test scenario / QA 测试场景
161	
162	| Setup | Steps | Expected |
163	|---|---|---|
164	| Admin can create teams. Test members A / B / C exist with both EN and AR names. A separate test member D exists with EN name only (no AR name). | 1. Create a new team with 3 members (A, B, C). 2. Open the team detail → KPI tab. 3. Inspect the auto-generated KPIs (count, names, types, formulas, Responsible Person). 4. Click into one KPI and verify the computed value is sourced from MoM / Actions data (not manual). 5. Add member D to the team. 6. Re-inspect — confirm D's 2 KPIs are present + the soft warning about D's missing AR name appears. 7. Remove member B from the team. 8. Re-inspect — B's 2 KPIs are soft-deleted; A, C, D still have theirs; B's historical data on past cycles is preserved. 9. Try to edit one of the auto-generated KPI names via the Add KPI edit modal — confirm the system rejects the change. 10. Add an extra Team KPI to the team via the R-578 / R-579 flow — confirm it sits alongside the auto-generated set without interference. 11. Delete the team and verify all auto-generated KPIs cascade-soft-delete. 12. Switch UI to Arabic and reload one of the team detail pages — confirm the Arabic-named members' KPIs render in Arabic. | Step 3: 6 KPIs visible — A/B/C × Attendance + Task Completion. Each has the correct name, type, target 100%, Responsible Person = the member, and a visible auto-generated badge. Step 4: KPI value pulls live from MoM / Actions. Step 6: 8 KPIs — D's two are added; soft warning displayed. Step 8: 6 KPIs — A, C, D each retain theirs; B's are gone but historical visibility on closed cycles is preserved. Step 9: edit attempt rejected with a clear error. Step 10: extra Team KPI coexists, editable as normal. Step 11: all auto-generated KPIs cascade. Step 12: Arabic names render correctly. |
165	
166	---
167	
168	## Proposed technical solution
169	
170	> English-only section. PM does not need to review beyond this point.
171	
172	### Backend
173	
174	1. **New service method:** `CommitteeTeamService.autoGenerateMemberKpis(Long teamId, List<Long> memberIds)`. Invoked from:
175	   - The team-creation handler (post-save, after `team_members` rows are inserted).
176	   - The add-member handler (per-member, after the new `team_members` row is inserted).
177	
178	2. **Add a `is_auto_generated boolean` column** to the team-scoped KPI table (`committee_kpi` or equivalent — the same table used by R-446 for team-scoped KPI storage). Migration: backfill existing rows with `is_auto_generated = false`.
179	
180	3. **Auto-generation logic** — for each member, insert two `committee_kpi` rows:
181	   - `name = `<member.name> — Attendance`` (EN) / `<member.nameAr> — الالتزام بحضور الاجتماعات` (AR)
182	   - `kpi_type = INDIVIDUAL`
183	   - `formula = MEETING_ATTENDANCE_RATIO` (existing formula enum from MoM module, if available; else a new enum value)
184	   - `target = 100`
185	   - `sub_weight = 20`
186	   - `responsible_person_id = member_id`
187	   - `is_auto_generated = true`
188	   - Then the same for Task Completion with `formula = TASK_ON_TIME_COMPLETION_RATIO`, `sub_weight = 80`.
189	
190	4. **Value computation** — both KPIs use existing aggregation logic from R-447's Individual KPI auto-calc. No new aggregation code needed; just wire the new KPI rows to consume the existing computed values from MoM / Actions.
191	
192	5. **Cascade on member removal** — in the team-member removal handler, soft-delete the member's 2 auto-generated Individual KPIs (`is_deleted = true`, `deleted_at = NOW()`). Do not hard-delete — historical cycles must remain queryable.
193	
194	6. **Cascade on team deletion** — existing R-446 cascade already soft-deletes team-scoped KPIs; verify the auto-generated set is included (it is, since they share the `committee_kpi` table).
195	
196	7. **Read-only enforcement** — in the KPI edit endpoint, reject updates to `name / kpi_type / formula / target / sub_weight / responsible_person_id` when `is_auto_generated = true`. Return a clear business error like "This KPI is auto-generated and its core fields cannot be edited."
197	
198	### Frontend
199	
200	1. **Team detail → KPI tab:** auto-generated KPIs render with a small **"Auto-generated" Arco `Tag`** (neutral/grey, no emoji/icon) next to the name. Hovering shows a tooltip explaining the read-only behavior.
201	2. **Edit + remove actions on auto-generated KPI cards:** the pencil / edit icon is hidden (or disabled with the tooltip), and the card exposes **no Delete / remove option** (suppress the `handleKpiCancelLink` / Delete action for rows where `is_auto_generated = true`). Auto-gen rows are removed only by the member-removal and team-deletion handlers. (The R-578 "Cancel Link → Delete" change applies to manually-added cards.)
202	3. **R-458 type-ring counts** include the auto-generated KPIs — the Individual ring shows `2N`.
203	
204	### Database
205	
206	- One new column on the `committee_kpi` table: `is_auto_generated boolean not null default false`.
207	- No new tables.
208	
209	### Effort estimate
210	
211	- Backend: ~1 day (auto-gen logic + cascade hooks + read-only enforcement)
212	- Frontend: ~0.5 day (badge / lock icon on auto-generated cards)
213	- QA: ~0.5 day
214	- **Total: ~2 dev-days**
215	
216	---
217	
218	## Open questions / 待澄清
219	
220	None. All design questions have been locked in the conversation with Eugene on 2026-06-12 — see Locked decisions.
221	
222	---
223	
224	## Locked decisions / 已锁定决策
225	
226	1. **Scope: only the two per-member Individual KPIs are auto-generated** — Attendance Adherence Rate + On-Time Task Completion Rate. Anything else a team needs is added manually via R-578 / R-579. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12.
227	
228	2. **No backfill for pre-existing teams.** The new behavior triggers only for teams created on or after the v3.4 release. Pre-existing teams keep their manually-added KPIs as-is. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12.
229	
230	3. **KPI names follow the customer PPTX exactly** — `Attendance Adherence Rate` / `نسبة الالتزام بحضور الاجتماعات` and `On-Time Task Completion Rate` / `نسبة الالتزام بتنفيذ التوصيات والتكليفات في الوقت المحدد`. No member name in the KPI title; the Responsible Person field is what distinguishes per-member KPIs in the team list. Same convention as existing team-scoped KPIs (R-446). Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12.
231	
232	4. **"Auto-generated" tag on every auto-gen KPI card — a plain Arco `Tag`, no emoji/icon** (the system has no existing "auto" badge, so reuse the standard tag style already on these cards). Hover shows the explanation. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-15.
233	
234	5. **All fields fully locked on auto-generated KPIs — no admin override.** Auto-gen KPIs update in real time from MoM and Actions data; admin edits would be overwritten on the next sync, so editing is disabled entirely (name, type, formula, target, weight, Responsible Person, and the actual value are all read-only). Admins can still add new manual KPIs alongside via R-578 / R-579. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12.
235	
236	6. **Completion ratio is auto-calculated from MoM / Actions data, not entered.** Attendance = (attended ÷ meetings held in period) × 100; On-Time Task Completion = (on-time ÷ assigned in period) × 100. Reuses the existing committee Individual-KPI aggregation. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-15.
237	
238	7. **Auto-generated KPIs do not support manual remove/delete.** Their 3-dot menu has no Delete option. They are removed only by the system (member removed from team → soft-delete; team deleted → cascade). The R-578 "Cancel Link → Delete" change applies to manually-added team KPIs, not auto-generated ones. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-15.
239	
240	---
241	
242	## Related PRDs / 相关 PRD
243	
244	- [R-446 Add KPI from Team Detail](../V3.3/[R-446]-add-kpi-from-team-detail.md) — team-scoped KPI storage and cascade rules; R-580 auto-generated KPIs reuse the same storage path
245	- R-447 — committee weight distribution (Individual 20% / Team 60% / Admin 20%) — the auto-generated Individual KPIs contribute to the 20% Individual component
246	- [R-458 Team Detail KPI Type Rings](../V3.3/[R-458]-team-detail-kpi-type-rings.md) — Individual ring counts include the auto-generated KPIs
247	- R-578 / R-579 (this same v3.4) — Add KPI redesign with type selector; admins use this flow to add Team / Admin KPIs on top of the auto-generated Individual baseline
248

file.content:
# [P2] R-580 — Auto-Generate Individual KPIs (Attendance + Task Completion) per Member on Team Creation / 创建团队时为每个成员自动生成两条 Individual KPI（出勤 + 任务完成）

| | |
|---|---|
| **Version** | V3.4 |
| **Source / 来源** | Customer requirement raised at 2026-06-10 V3.4 planning meeting / 2026-06-10 V3.4 规划会议上客户提出的需求 |
| **Priority** | P2 |
| **Created** | 2026-06-12 |
| **PM status** | `draft` |
| **Spec source for formulas / 公式来源** | [`reference/client-docs/KPI Template for committee calculation performance.pptx`](../../../reference/client-docs/KPI%20Template%20for%20committee%20calculation%20performance.pptx) — Member Evaluation section (PPTX slide 4) is the canonical formula source for the two auto-generated KPIs / 客户提供的模板第 4 页是这两条自动生成 KPI 的公式依据 |

---

## The problem / 问题

> 简述：现在创建新的委员会团队的时候，团队 KPI 标签页是空的。要让团队能跑评估，Admin 必须手动给每个成员加两条 Individual KPI —— 出勤、任务完成。每个团队、每个成员都要重复同样的设置，慢、容易漏，而且全公司不同的 Admin 加出来的格式还不统一。客户要求：创建团队的时候系统自动给每个成员生成这两条 Individual KPI，公式按客户给的模板算，数据从现有的 MoM、Actions 模块自动拉。其他类型的 KPI（Team KPI、Admin KPI）如果团队需要，Admin 还是手动加。

When a committee team is created today, the team detail → KPI tab is empty. To make the team functional for evaluation, an admin must manually add two Individual KPIs per member — Attendance and On-Time Task Completion. Every team repeats the same setup, and every admin in the organisation may format these slightly differently, creating inconsistency across teams.

The customer wants the system to **auto-generate these two Individual KPIs per member at team creation time** — no manual setup, formulas come from the customer's PPTX template, values are auto-calculated from existing MoM and Actions data.

**Out of scope:** Team KPIs (work plan, outputs, meetings held, budget, reports, etc.) and Admin KPIs are **not** auto-generated. If the team needs any of these, the admin adds them manually via the R-578 / R-579 Add KPI flow. This keeps R-580 focused on the universally-needed per-member baseline; richer team-level metrics stay opt-in.

---

## Current behavior / 当前行为

> 简述：创建团队 → 团队详情 → KPI 标签页是空的。每个成员的出勤 + 任务完成 KPI 都要 Admin 手动一个一个加，3 个成员就要加 6 条。

After creating a committee team with N members:

- The team detail → KPI tab is **empty** — no KPIs of any type are attached.
- To make the team evaluable, the admin opens the Add KPI flow (per R-578 / R-579) and manually creates 2 Individual KPIs **per member** — Attendance + Task Completion — for a total of `2N` KPIs.
- For a 3-member team, that's 6 manual KPI creations, each requiring the admin to enter the name, type, formula, target, and Responsible Person individually.

| Before (current) / 当前 |
|---|
| ![current](artifacts/screenshots/auto-kpi-on-team-creation/current.png) |

> Team detail KPI tab is empty immediately after team creation. The admin would now need to manually create 2 Individual KPIs per member. / 团队创建之后，KPI 标签页是空的。Admin 必须手动给每个成员加两条 Individual KPI。

---

## Expected behavior / 期望行为

> 简述：创建团队 → 系统自动给每个成员生成两条 Individual KPI（出勤 + 任务完成）。3 个成员 → 自动生成 6 条 KPI，Admin 不用动手。公式、目标值、Responsible Person 都按预设来。值自动从 MoM、Actions 拉。Team KPI / Admin KPI 如果需要就 Admin 手动加，自动生成的不动它们。

When a committee team is created (via the existing Add Team flow):

- The system **automatically generates 2 Individual KPIs per member** at the moment of team creation.
- For a team with N members → `2N` Individual KPIs auto-created with no admin action required.
- Each auto-generated KPI's name, type, formula, target, sub-weight, and Responsible Person are pre-set per the spec below.
- KPI values are auto-calculated from existing module data (MoM for attendance, Actions for task completion) — admin does not enter values manually.

### The two auto-generated KPIs per member / 每个成员生成的两条 KPI

KPI names match the customer PPTX exactly — metric-only, no member name in the title. Each member gets one copy of each KPI; the **Responsible Person** field is what distinguishes "Member A's Attendance" from "Member B's Attendance" in the team's KPI list (same convention as existing team-scoped KPIs per R-446).

| KPI name (EN) / 英文名 | KPI name (AR) / 阿语名 | Type / 类型 | Formula / 公式 | Target / 目标 | Responsible Person / 责任人 | Sub-weight inside Individual KPI / 子权重 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Attendance Adherence Rate | نسبة الالتزام بحضور الاجتماعات | Individual KPI | (meetings attended ÷ total meetings held during measurement period) × 100 | 100% | The member themselves / 成员本人 | 20% |
| On-Time Task Completion Rate | نسبة الالتزام بتنفيذ التوصيات والتكليفات في الوقت المحدد | Individual KPI | (tasks completed on time ÷ total tasks assigned during measurement period) × 100 | 100% | The member themselves / 成员本人 | 80% |

For a 3-member team you end up with 6 KPIs total — two `Attendance Adherence Rate` rows (one per member, distinguished by Responsible Person), two `On-Time Task Completion Rate` rows, etc.

Sub-weights (20% / 80%) come from the customer PPTX, slide 4 (Member Evaluation section). They define how the two KPIs combine into the member's overall Individual KPI score; the Individual KPI score then contributes 20% to the team's final evaluation per R-447.

> **On Amir's "add a 3rd Overall KPI" (R-580-Q1, 2026-06-17):** the aggregate (`Attendance×20% + Task×80%` = the calculator's "Member Score / الدرجة") is **NOT** auto-generated here as a third KPI card. R-580 stays at **two** auto KPIs (the components). The **Overall Score** aggregate is surfaced where it belongs — as a read-only **"Overall Score" column in Member Evaluation (see [R-582](./[R-582]-committee-member-evaluation-person-percentage.md))** — since that's the per-member evaluation screen. This delivers the "headline aggregate" Amir wanted without adding a third card to the team KPI tab. / Amir 要的"总体分"不在这里作为第三条 KPI；R-580 保持两条组件 KPI，汇总分作为 Member Evaluation 的只读 "Overall Score" 列在 R-582 实现。

### How the completion ratio is calculated / 完成率怎么算

> 简述：这两条 KPI 的完成率不是人填的，是系统按现有数据自动算的。出勤率 = 这个成员在衡量期内实际参加的会议数 ÷ 该团队在衡量期内召开的会议总数 × 100；任务完成率 = 这个成员在衡量期内按时完成的任务数 ÷ 分配给他的任务总数 × 100。会议数据来自 MoM 模块（会议的出席记录），任务数据来自 Actions 模块（行动项的负责人 + 完成状态 + 是否按时）。卡片上显示的完成率就是当前衡量周期下算出来的这个值，底层数据一变（比如又开了一次会、又完成了一个任务），完成率跟着自动更新。

The completion ratio shown on each auto-generated KPI card is **computed by the system from existing module data** — never entered by a person. For a given member over the current measurement period:

| KPI | Completion ratio formula | Numerator source | Denominator source |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Attendance Adherence Rate** | (meetings the member attended ÷ total meetings the team held in the period) × 100 | MoM module — per-meeting attendance records for this member | MoM module — count of meetings held by this team in the period |
| **On-Time Task Completion Rate** | (tasks the member completed on time ÷ total tasks assigned to the member in the period) × 100 | Actions module — action items where this member is the owner, status = Completed, and completed on or before the target date | Actions module — count of action items assigned to this member in the period |

- **Measurement period** = the KPI's cycle window (per the cycle assigned at generation; aligns with the team's reporting cycle). Only meetings / tasks falling inside the current period count.
- **"On time"** for the task ratio follows the same rule the committee evaluation already uses (R-456 §AC): a postponed or past-target completion does not count as on-time.
- The card's percentage = this computed value for the current period. When the underlying data changes (a new meeting is held, a task is completed), the ratio updates automatically on the next read — there is no manual entry and no manual refresh.
- This reuses the existing committee Individual-KPI aggregation that already powers attendance / task figures elsewhere (e.g. the Members Evaluation auto columns) — R-580 does not invent a new calculation, it just attaches these two standing KPIs to it.

### Member lifecycle / 成员变更生命周期

| Event / 事件 | Behavior / 行为 |
|---|---|
| Team is created with N members / 创建团队（N 个成员） | System creates `2N` Individual KPIs at the moment of creation / 创建瞬间生成 2N 条 |
| New member added to existing team / 给现有团队添加新成员 | System creates 2 Individual KPIs for the new member at the moment they're added / 新成员加入时立刻补上他的两条 |
| Member removed from team / 从团队移除成员 | The removed member's 2 KPIs are soft-deleted; historical data is preserved (visible on completed cycles) but excluded from the current cycle's calculation / 软删除，历史保留 |
| Team is deleted / 团队被删除 | All auto-generated KPIs cascade-soft-delete (same rule as R-446 manual team-scoped KPIs) / 级联软删除（沿用 R-446） |

### Editability of auto-generated KPIs / 自动生成 KPI 的可编辑性

These KPIs **auto-update in real time** from MoM (attendance) and Actions (task completion) data. There is no human input involved in calculating the value, so admin edits would be immediately overwritten by the next sync. For that reason, **all fields are locked** for auto-generated KPIs:

- Name / 名称
- Type / 类型
- Formula / 公式
- Target / 目标
- Sub-weight / 子权重
- Responsible Person / 责任人
- Actual value (the % shown on the card) / 实际值

Admins **can**:

- View the KPI on the team detail KPI tab. The Individual ring (per R-458) will count all 2N auto-generated KPIs.
- Click into the KPI to see the live computed value and drill into source data (MoM attendance records, Actions records).
- Add **additional** KPIs using the R-578 / R-579 Add KPI flow — those follow normal manual rules and remain fully editable / removable.

### Auto-generated KPIs do NOT support manual remove / 自动生成的 KPI 不支持手动移除

> 简述：手动添加的团队 KPI 卡片有"删除"操作（R-578 把原来的"解除关联"改成了"删除"）。但自动生成的这两条 KPI **不支持手动删除/移除** —— 卡片上没有删除入口。它们跟成员绑定：成员加入团队时自动生成，成员被移出团队时自动软删除，团队删除时级联软删除。Admin 不能单独手动删掉某个成员的自动 KPI，否则评估口径就乱了。

Manually-added team KPI cards have a **Delete** action (R-578 renames the old "Cancel Link" to "Delete"). **Auto-generated KPIs do NOT** — their 3-dot menu offers **no Delete / remove option**. They are bound to team membership and are removed only by the system:

| Removal trigger / 移除触发 | Behavior / 行为 |
|---|---|
| Member removed from team / 成员被移出团队 | That member's 2 auto-generated KPIs are soft-deleted automatically / 自动软删除 |
| Team deleted / 团队被删除 | All auto-generated KPIs cascade-soft-delete / 级联软删除 |
| Admin manual action / Admin 手动操作 | **Not allowed** — no Delete/remove option on auto-generated cards / 不允许，卡片上没有删除入口 |

Rationale: these are the standard committee-evaluation baseline tied to each member; letting an admin manually delete one member's attendance/task KPI would break the evaluation consistency. They come and go only with team membership. (The R-578 Delete action applies to manually-added KPIs, not these.)

### Visual marker / 视觉标记

Each auto-generated KPI card shows a small **"Auto-generated" tag** next to the KPI name — a standard Arco `Tag` (neutral/grey, same component family as the existing KPI-type tags on the card), **no emoji / no icon**. Hovering shows the tooltip: *"This KPI updates automatically from MoM attendance and Actions data and cannot be edited." / "此 KPI 根据会议出席和任务完成数据实时自动更新，不可编辑。"* The system has no existing "auto" tag style, so this reuses the standard `Tag` styling already used on these cards.

| After (expected) / 修复后 |
|---|
| ![expected](artifacts/screenshots/auto-kpi-on-team-creation/expected.png) |

> Same team after R-580 ships — the moment the team is created, `2N` Individual KPIs are visible on the KPI tab (Attendance + Task Completion per member), each marked with the auto-generated badge. Admin did nothing to create them. / R-580 上线后同一个团队 —— 创建瞬间 2N 条 Individual KPI 自动出现在 KPI tab，每条带"自动生成"标志，Admin 没动手。

---

## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准

| # | Criterion | Priority |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | On team creation with N members, the system auto-generates exactly `2N` Individual KPIs (Attendance Adherence Rate + On-Time Task Completion Rate per member) | P0 |
| 2 | Each auto-generated KPI's name matches the customer PPTX exactly — EN: `Attendance Adherence Rate` / `On-Time Task Completion Rate`; AR: `نسبة الالتزام بحضور الاجتماعات` / `نسبة الالتزام بتنفيذ التوصيات والتكليفات في الوقت المحدد`. No member name embedded in the KPI name. | P0 |
| 3 | Each auto-generated KPI has type = Individual KPI, target = 100%, and Responsible Person set to the corresponding team member. The 2N KPIs are distinguished by Responsible Person in the team's KPI list. | P0 |
| 4 | Formulas match the PPTX exactly — Attendance uses (meetings attended ÷ total meetings held) × 100; Task Completion uses (tasks completed on time ÷ total assigned tasks) × 100 | P0 |
| 5 | KPI values are auto-calculated in real time from MoM (attendance) and Actions (task completion) — no manual value entry, no admin intervention | P0 |
| 6 | Adding a new member to an existing team automatically creates that member's 2 Individual KPIs at the moment they are added | P0 |
| 7 | Removing a member from a team soft-deletes that member's 2 Individual KPIs; historical data on completed cycles is preserved | P0 |
| 8 | Deleting a team soft-deletes all auto-generated KPIs (matches R-446 cascade) | P0 |
| 9 | All fields on auto-generated KPIs are fully locked (name, type, formula, target, sub-weight, Responsible Person, actual value) — the API rejects any edit attempt with a clear error. There is no admin override. | P0 |
| 10 | Each auto-generated KPI card shows an **"Auto-generated" tag** (standard Arco Tag, no emoji/icon) next to the name, with a hover tooltip explaining the real-time auto-update behavior | P0 |
| 11 | Auto-generated KPI cards offer **no Delete / remove option** — they are removed only by the system (member removed → soft-delete that member's 2 KPIs; team deleted → cascade). Admin cannot manually delete an auto-generated KPI. | P0 |
| 12 | The completion ratio on each card is computed automatically (Attendance = attended ÷ meetings held; Task = on-time ÷ assigned, per period) from MoM / Actions data — no manual entry; it updates when the underlying data changes | P0 |
| 13 | Admins can still add additional Team / Admin / Individual KPIs manually via R-578 / R-579 — those operate independently and remain fully editable | P0 |
| 14 | Auto-generated KPIs are counted on the team detail's Individual KPI ring (per R-458 layout) | P0 |

---

## QA test scenario / QA 测试场景

| Setup | Steps | Expected |
|---|---|---|
| Admin can create teams. Test members A / B / C exist with both EN and AR names. A separate test member D exists with EN name only (no AR name). | 1. Create a new team with 3 members (A, B, C). 2. Open the team detail → KPI tab. 3. Inspect the auto-generated KPIs (count, names, types, formulas, Responsible Person). 4. Click into one KPI and verify the computed value is sourced from MoM / Actions data (not manual). 5. Add member D to the team. 6. Re-inspect — confirm D's 2 KPIs are present + the soft warning about D's missing AR name appears. 7. Remove member B from the team. 8. Re-inspect — B's 2 KPIs are soft-deleted; A, C, D still have theirs; B's historical data on past cycles is preserved. 9. Try to edit one of the auto-generated KPI names via the Add KPI edit modal — confirm the system rejects the change. 10. Add an extra Team KPI to the team via the R-578 / R-579 flow — confirm it sits alongside the auto-generated set without interference. 11. Delete the team and verify all auto-generated KPIs cascade-soft-delete. 12. Switch UI to Arabic and reload one of the team detail pages — confirm the Arabic-named members' KPIs render in Arabic. | Step 3: 6 KPIs visible — A/B/C × Attendance + Task Completion. Each has the correct name, type, target 100%, Responsible Person = the member, and a visible auto-generated badge. Step 4: KPI value pulls live from MoM / Actions. Step 6: 8 KPIs — D's two are added; soft warning displayed. Step 8: 6 KPIs — A, C, D each retain theirs; B's are gone but historical visibility on closed cycles is preserved. Step 9: edit attempt rejected with a clear error. Step 10: extra Team KPI coexists, editable as normal. Step 11: all auto-generated KPIs cascade. Step 12: Arabic names render correctly. |

---

## Proposed technical solution

> English-only section. PM does not need to review beyond this point.

### Backend

1. **New service method:** `CommitteeTeamService.autoGenerateMemberKpis(Long teamId, List<Long> memberIds)`. Invoked from:
   - The team-creation handler (post-save, after `team_members` rows are inserted).
   - The add-member handler (per-member, after the new `team_members` row is inserted).

2. **Add a `is_auto_generated boolean` column** to the team-scoped KPI table (`committee_kpi` or equivalent — the same table used by R-446 for team-scoped KPI storage). Migration: backfill existing rows with `is_auto_generated = false`.

3. **Auto-generation logic** — for each member, insert two `committee_kpi` rows:
   - `name = `<member.name> — Attendance`` (EN) / `<member.nameAr> — الالتزام بحضور الاجتماعات` (AR)
   - `kpi_type = INDIVIDUAL`
   - `formula = MEETING_ATTENDANCE_RATIO` (existing formula enum from MoM module, if available; else a new enum value)
   - `target = 100`
   - `sub_weight = 20`
   - `responsible_person_id = member_id`
   - `is_auto_generated = true`
   - Then the same for Task Completion with `formula = TASK_ON_TIME_COMPLETION_RATIO`, `sub_weight = 80`.

4. **Value computation** — both KPIs use existing aggregation logic from R-447's Individual KPI auto-calc. No new aggregation code needed; just wire the new KPI rows to consume the existing computed values from MoM / Actions.

5. **Cascade on member removal** — in the team-member removal handler, soft-delete the member's 2 auto-generated Individual KPIs (`is_deleted = true`, `deleted_at = NOW()`). Do not hard-delete — historical cycles must remain queryable.

6. **Cascade on team deletion** — existing R-446 cascade already soft-deletes team-scoped KPIs; verify the auto-generated set is included (it is, since they share the `committee_kpi` table).

7. **Read-only enforcement** — in the KPI edit endpoint, reject updates to `name / kpi_type / formula / target / sub_weight / responsible_person_id` when `is_auto_generated = true`. Return a clear business error like "This KPI is auto-generated and its core fields cannot be edited."

### Frontend

1. **Team detail → KPI tab:** auto-generated KPIs render with a small **"Auto-generated" Arco `Tag`** (neutral/grey, no emoji/icon) next to the name. Hovering shows a tooltip explaining the read-only behavior.
2. **Edit + remove actions on auto-generated KPI cards:** the pencil / edit icon is hidden (or disabled with the tooltip), and the card exposes **no Delete / remove option** (suppress the `handleKpiCancelLink` / Delete action for rows where `is_auto_generated = true`). Auto-gen rows are removed only by the member-removal and team-deletion handlers. (The R-578 "Cancel Link → Delete" change applies to manually-added cards.)
3. **R-458 type-ring counts** include the auto-generated KPIs — the Individual ring shows `2N`.

### Database

- One new column on the `committee_kpi` table: `is_auto_generated boolean not null default false`.
- No new tables.

### Effort estimate

- Backend: ~1 day (auto-gen logic + cascade hooks + read-only enforcement)
- Frontend: ~0.5 day (badge / lock icon on auto-generated cards)
- QA: ~0.5 day
- **Total: ~2 dev-days**

---

## Open questions / 待澄清

None. All design questions have been locked in the conversation with Eugene on 2026-06-12 — see Locked decisions.

---

## Locked decisions / 已锁定决策

1. **Scope: only the two per-member Individual KPIs are auto-generated** — Attendance Adherence Rate + On-Time Task Completion Rate. Anything else a team needs is added manually via R-578 / R-579. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12.

2. **No backfill for pre-existing teams.** The new behavior triggers only for teams created on or after the v3.4 release. Pre-existing teams keep their manually-added KPIs as-is. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12.

3. **KPI names follow the customer PPTX exactly** — `Attendance Adherence Rate` / `نسبة الالتزام بحضور الاجتماعات` and `On-Time Task Completion Rate` / `نسبة الالتزام بتنفيذ التوصيات والتكليفات في الوقت المحدد`. No member name in the KPI title; the Responsible Person field is what distinguishes per-member KPIs in the team list. Same convention as existing team-scoped KPIs (R-446). Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12.

4. **"Auto-generated" tag on every auto-gen KPI card — a plain Arco `Tag`, no emoji/icon** (the system has no existing "auto" badge, so reuse the standard tag style already on these cards). Hover shows the explanation. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-15.

5. **All fields fully locked on auto-generated KPIs — no admin override.** Auto-gen KPIs update in real time from MoM and Actions data; admin edits would be overwritten on the next sync, so editing is disabled entirely (name, type, formula, target, weight, Responsible Person, and the actual value are all read-only). Admins can still add new manual KPIs alongside via R-578 / R-579. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12.

6. **Completion ratio is auto-calculated from MoM / Actions data, not entered.** Attendance = (attended ÷ meetings held in period) × 100; On-Time Task Completion = (on-time ÷ assigned in period) × 100. Reuses the existing committee Individual-KPI aggregation. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-15.

7. **Auto-generated KPIs do not support manual remove/delete.** Their 3-dot menu has no Delete option. They are removed only by the system (member removed from team → soft-delete; team deleted → cascade). The R-578 "Cancel Link → Delete" change applies to manually-added team KPIs, not auto-generated ones. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-15.

---

## Related PRDs / 相关 PRD

- [R-446 Add KPI from Team Detail](../V3.3/[R-446]-add-kpi-from-team-detail.md) — team-scoped KPI storage and cascade rules; R-580 auto-generated KPIs reuse the same storage path

13	## The problem / 问题
14	
15	> 简述：在团队详情页（Committee → Teams → 详情 → KPI 标签页），Admin 想给一条 KPI 录入实际值/完成率，今天必须点进 KPI 完整编辑页，离开团队上下文，面对一整个多字段表单 —— 就为了输一个数字。客户说太重了，要一个"在卡片上直接弹小窗输数"的方式。系统里其他地方（KPI 列表行操作里的"录入完成率"）已经有这种弹窗，复用它就行，别新造一个。

17	On the team detail page, the KPI section shows one card per linked KPI (per R-446 / R-458). That heavyweight navigation is wrong for what is, in practice, a single-number input.

It must be consistent: the summary row (Measurement Cycle / Measurement Type / Assembly Method / Measurement Mechanism / Measurement Unit), the per-period tab(s), the period table (Measurement Frequency / Target Performance / **Actual Performance** / Period Performance Ratio / Status / Attachments), and the Analysis / Recommendation / Challenges fields. The user inputs **Actual Performance** for the period, identical to the standalone KPI flow. / 必须跟系统现有的"Completion Rate"弹窗一模一样（不是简化版）：上方汇总行、周期页签、周期表（目标/实际/达成率/状态/附件）、以及 Analysis/Recommendation/Challenges。用户录入"实际值"，跟独立 KPI 完全一致。 |

55	| Auto-generated KPIs (per R-580) / 自动生成的 KPI | **Excluded** — clicking an auto-generated KPI card does NOT open the quick-input popup. These KPIs auto-update in real time from MoM and Actions data (per R-580 lock), so manual input is not applicable. Clicking an auto-gen card instead routes to the KPI Detail page (read-only view of the computed value + source data drill-down). / 不适用 —— 点击 R-580 自动生成的 KPI 卡片不会弹出快速录入弹窗。这些 KPI 由 MoM 出席和 Actions 任务数据实时自动更新（详见 R-580 锁定决策），手动录入不适用。点击会跳转到 KPI 详情页（只读，可下钻查看源数据）。 |
56	| KPI Detail entry / 进入 KPI 详情 | Still available via the card's existing 3-dot menu → "Detail" — the quick-input does not remove that path. For auto-generated KPIs, clicking the card body also routes to Detail (since the quick-input is excluded for them). / 仍可通过卡片右上角三点菜单 → "Detail" 进入完整详情页。对于自动生成的 KPI，点击卡片正文也直接跳详情页（因为快速录入不适用）。 |
57	
58	The popup itself is the **existing `ActualValueModal`** — same fields, same period tabs, same with-formula / without-formula / duration formula behavior, same save semantics. Nothing new is built. **Consistency is the key requirement** — even though a committee KPI is a separate KPI (not one of the global workflow KPIs), the input experience must be identical to the standalone KPI's Completion Rate modal.
59	
60	### How the completion rate is calculated / 完成率怎么算
61	
62	> 简述：完成率不是用户填的，用户填的是"实际值（Actual Performance）"，系统按现有逻辑自动算出每个周期的达成率，再按 Assembly Method 汇总成这条 KPI 的总完成率，显示在卡片的环/饼图上。算法跟系统现有的完全一致（不新造）。
63	
64	The user enters **Actual Performance**; the system computes the completion rate using its **existing logic** (no new calculation — R-581 reuses it exactly):
65	
66	**Per-period ratio (Actual vs Target), by Measurement Type:**
67	
68	| Measurement Type / 测量类型 | Period ratio / 周期达成率 |
69	|---|---|
70	| Increasing Better (higher is better) | (Actual ÷ Target) × 100 (if Target = 0 → 100) |
71	| Decreasing Better (lower is better) | (Target ÷ Actual) × 100 (if Actual = 0 → 100) |
72	
73	Each period ratio is **capped at 100%**.
74	
75	**Overall completion rate (across periods), by Assembly Method:**
76	
77	| Assembly Method / 汇总方式 | Overall completion rate / 总完成率 |
78	|---|---|
79	| Sum / Average | average of the period ratios (sum ÷ number of periods) |
80	| Last Value | the last non-null period ratio |
81	
82	The computed overall completion rate is the value shown as the card's **Completion Ratio ring/pie**. The calculation is backend-authoritative; after the user saves an actual value, the card's ring re-renders to the recomputed rate (the card already renders a ring/pie for Completion Ratio — R-581 just ensures it reflects the freshly-saved value). / 算法是后端权威，保存后卡片环图按新值刷新；卡片本来就有完成率环图，R-581 只要保证它反映刚保存的值。
83	
84	### Card shows the completion rate as a ring/pie after input / 录入后卡片用环/饼图显示完成率
85	
86	After the user inputs the actual value and saves, the committee KPI card displays the resulting completion rate as a **ring/pie** next to "Completion Ratio" — consistent with how KPI cards already render the ratio elsewhere in the system. This is the same `getProgressDetailRate` → PieChart rendering the team-detail cards already use; it just needs to reflect the updated value after save.
87	
88	| Expected — clicking a KPI card opens the completion-rate popup in place / 期望 — 点 KPI 卡片就地弹出完成率录入弹窗 |
89	|---|
90	| ![expected](artifacts/screenshots/r581-completion-modal.png) |
91	
92	> Clicking a KPI card body opens the **same "Completion Rate" modal the system uses for standalone KPIs** — KPI-name subtitle, summary row (Measurement Cycle / Type / Assembly Method / Mechanism / Unit), per-period tabs (Q1 2026 / Q2 2026), the period table (Measurement Frequency / Target Performance / Actual Performance / Period Performance Ratio / Status / Attachments), and the required Analysis / Recommendation / Challenges fields + Close / Save. No navigation; the user enters Actual Performance and saves, and the card's ring refreshes. (Local prototype, 2026-06-16, matched to the system's `ActualValueModal`. On this shared backend the real `ActualValueModal` reports "KPI has been deleted" for committee test KPIs because it expects a standard KPI id — a data-fetch detail for the dev to resolve; the prototype replicates the identical modal on local data so the interaction is verifiable.) / 点 KPI 卡片就地弹出与系统标准 KPI 完全一致的"Completion Rate"弹窗（名称 + 汇总行 + 周期页签 + 周期表 + Analysis/Recommendation/Challenges + 关闭/保存）。
93	
94	## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准
95	
96	| # | Criterion / 标准 | Priority |
97	|---|---|---|
98	| 1 | Clicking the body of any KPI card on the team detail KPI section opens the existing completion-rate quick-input popup in place; the team detail page does not navigate away / 点 KPI 卡片正文打开现有快速录入弹窗，不跳转 | P0 |
99	| 2 | The popup is the existing `ActualValueModal` — **visually and functionally identical** to the standalone KPI Completion Rate modal (summary row, period table with Target/Actual Performance/Period Performance Ratio/Status/Attachments, Analysis/Recommendation/Challenges). No simplified or new modal. / 弹窗与独立 KPI 的"Completion Rate"弹窗完全一致，不简化、不新造 | P0 |
100	| 3 | The user enters Actual Performance; the completion rate is computed by the system's existing logic (per Measurement Type for the period ratio, per Assembly Method for the overall) — R-581 introduces no new calculation | P0 |
101	| 3b | After save, the card's Completion Ratio **ring/pie** re-renders in place to the recomputed completion rate; the popup closes; no navigation | P0 |
102	| 4 | Cancel / close inside the popup discards the change and leaves the card unchanged / 取消不改 | P0 |
103	| 5 | The existing 3-dot menu on the card (Detail / Cancel Link) still works — clicking it does NOT open the quick-input popup / 卡片三点菜单仍可用，点它不弹快速录入 | P0 |
104	| 6 | Quick-input is available on **manually-added** Admin KPI, Individual KPI, and Team KPI cards. Auto-generated KPI cards (R-580) are **excluded** — clicking them routes to the KPI Detail page instead. / 快速录入仅适用于 R-578/R-579 手动添加的卡片；R-580 自动生成的卡片点击直接跳详情页 | P0 |
105	| 7 | If the KPI's cycle / period is in a status that already blocks input via the existing modal (e.g. closed period without late-entry permission), the popup honors that block — no new permission logic is added / 沿用现有弹窗的周期/权限拦截逻辑，不增加新规则 | P0 |
106	| 8 | EN and AR users see the popup in their respective language — the reused modal already supports both / 弹窗中英文/阿拉伯语沿用现有组件已有的多语言支持 | P0 |
107	
108	---
109	
110	## QA test scenario / QA 测试场景
111	
112	| Setup / 前置 | Steps / 步骤 | Expected / 预期 |
113	|---|---|---|
114	| Admin role; a committee team with at least 4 KPI cards on the team detail KPI section — one manually-added Admin KPI, one manually-added Individual KPI, one manually-added Team KPI, and one auto-generated Individual KPI (R-580). The current cycle is open for input. / Admin 登录；团队 KPI 标签页 ≥4 张卡：手动添加的 Admin / Individual / Team 各一张，再加一张 R-580 自动生成的 Individual；当前周期开放录入。 | 1. Open team detail → KPI tab. 2. Click the manually-added Admin KPI card body — confirm the existing completion-rate popup opens in place without navigation. 3. Enter an actual value, save — confirm popup closes, card's completion-rate ring + % refresh on the team page. 4. Click the manually-added Individual KPI card — confirm same popup opens. 5. Click the manually-added Team KPI card — same popup opens. 6. Click the **auto-generated** Individual KPI card body — confirm the popup does NOT open; instead the user is routed to the KPI Detail page (read-only). 7. Open a manually-added card's 3-dot menu → Detail — confirm it still routes to the full KPI detail page (not the quick popup). 8. Open a manually-added card's 3-dot menu directly (no body click) — confirm the popup does NOT open. 9. Open a card, click Cancel/Close — confirm no value change on the card. 10. Switch language to Arabic, repeat steps 1–3 on any manually-added card. | Steps 2 / 4 / 5 all open the same existing `ActualValueModal` with the clicked card's KPI loaded, no navigation. Step 3: card refreshes with the new value in place. Step 6: auto-generated card click routes to Detail (NOT the popup) — the popup is excluded for auto-gen KPIs per R-580. Step 7: 3-dot Detail still works, routes to full detail. Step 8: 3-dot click does NOT trigger the quick popup (event isolation). Step 9: cancel leaves card untouched. Step 10: Arabic rendering and save both work. No new popup component appears in the bundle / DOM — same modal id / class as the standalone KPI list's completion-rate action. |
115	
116	---
117	
118	## Proposed technical solution
119	
120	> English-only section. PM does not need to review beyond this point.
121	
122	### Reused component (existing, do not duplicate)
123	
124	The system already ships the quick completion-rate popup as:
125	
126	- [`ActualValueModal.tsx`](frontend/src/pages/StrategicKpis/KpisManagement/KpiDetail/components/ActualValueModal/ActualValueModal.tsx) — full implementation; props are `{ kpiInfoId, visible, changeVisible, onSaveSuccess? }`
127	
128	Already invoked from three places today, proving it's a portable reusable:
129	
130	- KPI list page row action: [`StrategicKpis/KpisManagement/index.tsx:53,126,729-731,1478-1481`](frontend/src/pages/StrategicKpis/KpisManagement/index.tsx)
131	- KPI detail page header button: [`StrategicKpis/KpisManagement/KpiDetail/index.tsx:23,66,670,764-767`](frontend/src/pages/StrategicKpis/KpisManagement/KpiDetail/index.tsx)
132	- Index KPI list page row action: [`StrategicKpis/IndexKpi/index.tsx:55,133,729,1354-1357`](frontend/src/pages/StrategicKpis/IndexKpi/index.tsx)
133	
134	The modal already handles: period tabs, with-formula / without-formula / duration formulas, attachments, analysis / recommendation / challenges, single-row save via `saveOneRowInformation`, year toggle, late-entry / additional-value branches. R-581 reuses all of it — **no functional change to the modal itself**.
135	
136	**Completion-rate calculation (existing, reused as-is):**
137	- Per-period ratio — frontend preview `ActualValueModal.tsx:151-168` (`getRatio`), backend authoritative `KpisServiceImpl.java:2268-2291` (and `recalcPeriodRatio` `1317-1339`): Increasing Better = actual/target×100; Decreasing Better = target/actual×100; capped at 100% (`KpisServiceImpl.java:2289-2290`).
138	- Overall completion rate — backend `KpisServiceImpl.calcRatio` `2671-2696`: Sum/Average both = mean of period ratios; Last Value = last non-null ratio.
139	- Card ring — `KpiColumn/index.tsx getProgressDetailRate (~335-368)` reads `record.progress` (backend completion rate) → `<PieChart performance={...}>`. After save, `progress` updates and the ring reflects it. R-581 wires the modal's save success to refresh the card row so the ring updates in place.
140	
141	### Frontend wiring on the team detail
142	
143	Single file changes: [`Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx`](frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx).
144	
145	The component already has a partial mock for this behavior (`completionRateModalVisible` state at lines 128-129, click handler at lines 737-744, and an inline placeholder modal at lines 958-1053 marked `[HF-006 mock]`). R-581 finalizes that scaffolding by:
146	
147	1. **Delete the inline mock modal** at `KpiColumn/index.tsx:958-1053`.
148	2. **Import the real reusable:**
149	   ```tsx
150	   import ActualValueModal from '@/pages/StrategicKpis/KpisManagement/KpiDetail/components/ActualValueModal/ActualValueModal.tsx'
151	   ```
152	3. **Render it at the bottom of the component**, mirroring the pattern in `KpisManagement/index.tsx:1478-1481`:
153	   ```tsx
154	   <ActualValueModal
155	     kpiInfoId={completionRateKpi?.kpiInfoId}
156	     visible={completionRateModalVisible}
157	     changeVisible={setCompletionRateModalVisible}
158	     onSaveSuccess={refreshInPlace}
159	   />
160	   ```
161	4. **Update the card-body click handler** (`KpiColumn/index.tsx:737-744`) — it already opens the popup on body click and skips when the user clicked the 3-dot menu. Add one additional gate: **skip the popup for auto-generated KPIs (R-580)** and route to the KPI Detail page instead. Use `kpi.isAutoGenerated` (the new column added by R-580):
162	   ```tsx
163	   const handleCardClick = (kpi, e) => {
164	     if (e.target.closest('.td-card-more, .arco-dropdown')) return  // existing 3-dot gate
165	     if (kpi.isAutoGenerated) {
166	       navigate(`/strategic-kpis/kpisManagement/detail/${kpi.kpiInfoId}`)
167	       return
168	     }
169	     setCompletionRateKpi(kpi)
170	     setCompletionRateModalVisible(true)
171	   }
172	   ```
173	5. **`refreshInPlace`** is already defined in the file (lines 187-197) — it re-fetches the current page-size of KPI cards and updates `list` without resetting the scroll. Wire it as the modal's `onSaveSuccess` so a save updates the card's completion ring on the team page without a full page refresh.
174	
175	### Backend
176	
177	The single-row save endpoint `saveOneRowInformation` (used today by the same `ActualValueModal`) is reused. Team-scoped committee KPIs (R-446 / R-580) expose `kpiInfoId` on each card row (`KpiColumn/index.tsx:734,764`).
178	
179	> **Verify before build — committee-KPI data fetch.** When the real `ActualValueModal` was wired to a committee KPI in the local prototype, it reported **"The KPI has been deleted by the admin."** The modal's data fetch (and `saveOneRowInformation`) appear to expect a **standard KPI id**, whereas committee KPIs live in the `committee_kpi` flow with their own id. The dev must confirm the modal loads/saves against the correct committee-KPI id (pass the committee KPI id, or point the modal's fetch at the committee-KPI endpoint) so the period rows load and save correctly. This is the one non-trivial part of R-581 — the rest (open the modal on card click, exclude auto-gen, refresh in place) is straightforward. / 真实 `ActualValueModal` 对 committee KPI 会报"已删除"，因为它按标准 KPI id 拉数据；committee KPI 在 `committee_kpi` 体系里有自己的 id。开发需确认弹窗按正确的 committee KPI id 拉取/保存。
180	
181	### Database
182	
183	No schema change.
184	
185	### Effort estimate
186	
187	- Frontend: ~0.5 day (delete mock modal, wire the real one, verify `refreshInPlace` works on save)
188	- Backend: 0 (no change)
189	- QA: ~0.5 day (all card types, auto-generated KPI, 3-dot menu isolation, EN / AR)
190	- **Total: ~1 dev-day**
191	
192	---
193	
194	## Open questions / 待澄清
195	
196	None. Design locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12 — see Locked decisions.
197	
198	---
199	
200	## Locked decisions / 已锁定决策
201	
202	1. **Reuse the existing quick-input popup — do not invent a new one.** R-581 reuses `ActualValueModal` (the same modal that powers row-level "Completion Rate" action in the standalone KPI list and Index KPI list). No new modal component, no new endpoint. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12. / 复用 `ActualValueModal`，不新造弹窗。
203	
204	2. **Popup opens in place on the team detail — no navigation.** The team detail stays mounted; save refreshes the card via `refreshInPlace`, not a page reload. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12. / 弹窗就地弹出，不跳转，保存后就地刷新卡片。
205	
206	3. **Single number / percentage input only inside the popup.** The popup is the reused completion-rate modal — the full KPI edit form (name, type, formula, target, etc.) is NOT exposed here. Admins who need to edit those fields go via the card's 3-dot menu → Detail. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12. / 弹窗里只录完成率/实际值，不暴露完整 KPI 编辑表单；改其他字段走三点菜单 → Detail。
207	
208	4. **Applies to manually-added cards only — auto-generated KPIs are excluded.** Manually-added Admin / Individual / Team KPI cards open the quick-input popup on body click. **Auto-generated KPI cards (R-580) do NOT open the popup** — clicking them routes to the KPI Detail page (read-only view of the auto-computed value with source data drill-down). This keeps R-581 consistent with R-580's lock that auto-gen KPIs auto-update from MoM / Actions and are not user-editable. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12. / 仅手动添加的卡片可用快速录入；R-580 自动生成的卡片点击直接跳详情页，不弹快速录入。与 R-580"全字段锁定"决策保持一致。
209	
210	---
211	
212	## Related PRDs / 相关 PRD
213	
214	- [R-446 Add KPI from Team Detail](../v3.3/[R-446]-add-kpi-from-team-detail.md) — team-scoped KPI storage; the cards R-581 targets are rendered from this data
215	- [R-458 Team Detail KPI Type Rings](../v3.3/[R-458]-team-detail-kpi-type-rings.md) — the type-ring layout the cards live under
216	- [R-580 Auto-Generated Individual KPIs](./[R-580]-committee-team-auto-kpi-generation.md) — auto-generated cards are also quick-inputtable via R-581
