file.content:
# [P2] R-581 — Quick Completion-Rate Input on Team Detail KPI Cards / 团队详情 KPI 卡片快速录入完成率

| | |
|---|---|
| **Version** | V3.4 |
| **Source / 来源** | Customer requirement raised at 2026-06-12 review of the team detail KPI flow / 2026-06-12 评审委员会团队详情 KPI 流程时客户提出 |
| **Priority** | P2 |
| **Created** | 2026-06-12 |
| **PM status** | `draft` |

---

## The problem / 问题

> 简述：在团队详情页（Committee → Teams → 详情 → KPI 标签页），Admin 想给一条 KPI 录入实际值/完成率，今天必须点进 KPI 完整编辑页，离开团队上下文，面对一整个多字段表单 —— 就为了输一个数字。客户说太重了，要一个"在卡片上直接弹小窗输数"的方式。系统里其他地方（KPI 列表行操作里的"录入完成率"）已经有这种弹窗，复用它就行，别新造一个。

On the team detail page, the KPI section shows one card per linked KPI (per R-446 / R-458). To record a period's actual value or completion rate against any of these KPIs, the admin must currently click into the full KPI edit / detail page — a multi-field form on a separate route. That heavyweight navigation is wrong for what is, in practice, a single-number input.

The customer wants the click on a card to **open a small quick-input popup directly on the card**, capture the actual value, save in place, and refresh the card — no route change, no leaving the team context.

The system already has a quick-input popup for completion rate elsewhere (the row-level "Completion Rate" action in the standalone KPI list). **R-581 reuses that exact component** — no new popup is invented.

---

## Current behavior / 当前行为

> 简述：在团队详情 KPI 卡片上点击 → 跳转到 KPI 完整编辑/详情页 → 整个团队上下文丢了 → Admin 操作完还要点返回。完成率录入只是其中一项，但路径跟"改 KPI 名字"一样重。

Today, clicking a KPI card on the team detail KPI section routes the user away from the team page:

| Action / 操作 | Today's behavior / 当前 |
|---|---|
| Click KPI card body / 点 KPI 卡片正文 | Navigates to `/strategic-kpis/kpisManagement/detail/...` — full KPI edit/detail page / 跳转到 KPI 完整详情页 |
| Edit actual value / 编辑实际值 | Find the right period row inside the full edit form, fill multi-field form, save, navigate back to team / 在完整表单里找到对应周期行，填多个字段，保存，再返回团队页 |
| Stay on team page? / 保持在团队页 | No — admin loses the team context / 不行，团队上下文丢失 |

Result: a single-number update takes 4–5 clicks and a full route change. Admins regularly skip the update or batch it later, which delays the team's evaluation data.

---

## Expected behavior / 期望行为

> 简述：点 KPI 卡片 → 直接在卡片位置弹一个小窗，里面只有"完成率/实际值"输入 → 填完保存 → 弹窗关闭 → 卡片刷新最新值。不跳转。复用系统里已有的完成率快速录入弹窗（`ActualValueModal`），不重新设计。

When the admin clicks a KPI card on the team detail KPI section, a quick-input popup opens **in place** on top of the team detail page:

| Interaction / 交互 | Expected / 期望 |
|---|---|
| Click KPI card body / 点 KPI 卡片正文 | Quick-input popup opens in place; team detail stays mounted in the background / 弹窗就地弹出，团队页保持挂载 |
| Popup content / 弹窗内容 | **The exact same "Completion Rate" modal the system already uses for standalone KPIs** — not a simplified popup. It must be consistent: the summary row (Measurement Cycle / Measurement Type / Assembly Method / Measurement Mechanism / Measurement Unit), the per-period tab(s), the period table (Measurement Frequency / Target Performance / **Actual Performance** / Period Performance Ratio / Status / Attachments), and the Analysis / Recommendation / Challenges fields. The user inputs **Actual Performance** for the period, identical to the standalone KPI flow. / 必须跟系统现有的"Completion Rate"弹窗一模一样（不是简化版）：上方汇总行、周期页签、周期表（目标/实际/达成率/状态/附件）、以及 Analysis/Recommendation/Challenges。用户录入"实际值"，跟独立 KPI 完全一致。 |
| Save / 保存 | Popup closes; the KPI card's **Completion Ratio ring/pie** on the team page refreshes to the newly-computed completion rate (see calculation below) / 弹窗关闭，卡片上的完成率环/饼图刷新成新算出来的完成率 |
| Cancel / 取消 | Popup closes, no change / 关闭，无变更 |
| Navigation / 跳转 | None — admin stays on the team detail throughout / 全程不跳转 |
| Card scope / 卡片范围 | Applies to **manually-added** KPI cards only — Admin KPI, Individual KPI, Team KPI created via the R-578 / R-579 Add KPI flow / 只适用于通过 R-578/R-579 流程手动添加的 KPI 卡片（Admin / Individual / Team） |
| Auto-generated KPIs (per R-580) / 自动生成的 KPI | **Excluded** — clicking an auto-generated KPI card does NOT open the quick-input popup. These KPIs auto-update in real time from MoM and Actions data (per R-580 lock), so manual input is not applicable. Clicking an auto-gen card instead routes to the KPI Detail page (read-only view of the computed value + source data drill-down). / 不适用 —— 点击 R-580 自动生成的 KPI 卡片不会弹出快速录入弹窗。这些 KPI 由 MoM 出席和 Actions 任务数据实时自动更新（详见 R-580 锁定决策），手动录入不适用。点击会跳转到 KPI 详情页（只读，可下钻查看源数据）。 |
| KPI Detail entry / 进入 KPI 详情 | Still available via the card's existing 3-dot menu → "Detail" — the quick-input does not remove that path. For auto-generated KPIs, clicking the card body also routes to Detail (since the quick-input is excluded for them). / 仍可通过卡片右上角三点菜单 → "Detail" 进入完整详情页。对于自动生成的 KPI，点击卡片正文也直接跳详情页（因为快速录入不适用）。 |

The popup itself is the **existing `ActualValueModal`** — same fields, same period tabs, same with-formula / without-formula / duration formula behavior, same save semantics. Nothing new is built. **Consistency is the key requirement** — even though a committee KPI is a separate KPI (not one of the global workflow KPIs), the input experience must be identical to the standalone KPI's Completion Rate modal.

### How the completion rate is calculated / 完成率怎么算

> 简述：完成率不是用户填的，用户填的是"实际值（Actual Performance）"，系统按现有逻辑自动算出每个周期的达成率，再按 Assembly Method 汇总成这条 KPI 的总完成率，显示在卡片的环/饼图上。算法跟系统现有的完全一致（不新造）。

The user enters **Actual Performance**; the system computes the completion rate using its **existing logic** (no new calculation — R-581 reuses it exactly):

**Per-period ratio (Actual vs Target), by Measurement Type:**

| Measurement Type / 测量类型 | Period ratio / 周期达成率 |
|---|---|
| Increasing Better (higher is better) | (Actual ÷ Target) × 100 (if Target = 0 → 100) |
| Decreasing Better (lower is better) | (Target ÷ Actual) × 100 (if Actual = 0 → 100) |

Each period ratio is **capped at 100%**.

**Overall completion rate (across periods), by Assembly Method:**

| Assembly Method / 汇总方式 | Overall completion rate / 总完成率 |
|---|---|
| Sum / Average | average of the period ratios (sum ÷ number of periods) |
| Last Value | the last non-null period ratio |

The computed overall completion rate is the value shown as the card's **Completion Ratio ring/pie**. The calculation is backend-authoritative; after the user saves an actual value, the card's ring re-renders to the recomputed rate (the card already renders a ring/pie for Completion Ratio — R-581 just ensures it reflects the freshly-saved value). / 算法是后端权威，保存后卡片环图按新值刷新；卡片本来就有完成率环图，R-581 只要保证它反映刚保存的值。

### Card shows the completion rate as a ring/pie after input / 录入后卡片用环/饼图显示完成率

After the user inputs the actual value and saves, the committee KPI card displays the resulting completion rate as a **ring/pie** next to "Completion Ratio" — consistent with how KPI cards already render the ratio elsewhere in the system. This is the same `getProgressDetailRate` → PieChart rendering the team-detail cards already use; it just needs to reflect the updated value after save.

| Expected — clicking a KPI card opens the completion-rate popup in place / 期望 — 点 KPI 卡片就地弹出完成率录入弹窗 |
|---|
| ![expected](artifacts/screenshots/r581-completion-modal.png) |

> Clicking a KPI card body opens the **same "Completion Rate" modal the system uses for standalone KPIs** — KPI-name subtitle, summary row (Measurement Cycle / Type / Assembly Method / Mechanism / Unit), per-period tabs (Q1 2026 / Q2 2026), the period table (Measurement Frequency / Target Performance / Actual Performance / Period Performance Ratio / Status / Attachments), and the required Analysis / Recommendation / Challenges fields + Close / Save. No navigation; the user enters Actual Performance and saves, and the card's ring refreshes. (Local prototype, 2026-06-16, matched to the system's `ActualValueModal`. On this shared backend the real `ActualValueModal` reports "KPI has been deleted" for committee test KPIs because it expects a standard KPI id — a data-fetch detail for the dev to resolve; the prototype replicates the identical modal on local data so the interaction is verifiable.) / 点 KPI 卡片就地弹出与系统标准 KPI 完全一致的"Completion Rate"弹窗（名称 + 汇总行 + 周期页签 + 周期表 + Analysis/Recommendation/Challenges + 关闭/保存）。

## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准

| # | Criterion / 标准 | Priority |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Clicking the body of any KPI card on the team detail KPI section opens the existing completion-rate quick-input popup in place; the team detail page does not navigate away / 点 KPI 卡片正文打开现有快速录入弹窗，不跳转 | P0 |
| 2 | The popup is the existing `ActualValueModal` — **visually and functionally identical** to the standalone KPI Completion Rate modal (summary row, period table with Target/Actual Performance/Period Performance Ratio/Status/Attachments, Analysis/Recommendation/Challenges). No simplified or new modal. / 弹窗与独立 KPI 的"Completion Rate"弹窗完全一致，不简化、不新造 | P0 |
| 3 | The user enters Actual Performance; the completion rate is computed by the system's existing logic (per Measurement Type for the period ratio, per Assembly Method for the overall) — R-581 introduces no new calculation | P0 |
| 3b | After save, the card's Completion Ratio **ring/pie** re-renders in place to the recomputed completion rate; the popup closes; no navigation | P0 |
| 4 | Cancel / close inside the popup discards the change and leaves the card unchanged / 取消不改 | P0 |
| 5 | The existing 3-dot menu on the card (Detail / Cancel Link) still works — clicking it does NOT open the quick-input popup / 卡片三点菜单仍可用，点它不弹快速录入 | P0 |
| 6 | Quick-input is available on **manually-added** Admin KPI, Individual KPI, and Team KPI cards. Auto-generated KPI cards (R-580) are **excluded** — clicking them routes to the KPI Detail page instead. / 快速录入仅适用于 R-578/R-579 手动添加的卡片；R-580 自动生成的卡片点击直接跳详情页 | P0 |
| 7 | If the KPI's cycle / period is in a status that already blocks input via the existing modal (e.g. closed period without late-entry permission), the popup honors that block — no new permission logic is added / 沿用现有弹窗的周期/权限拦截逻辑，不增加新规则 | P0 |
| 8 | EN and AR users see the popup in their respective language — the reused modal already supports both / 弹窗中英文/阿拉伯语沿用现有组件已有的多语言支持 | P0 |

---

## QA test scenario / QA 测试场景

| Setup / 前置 | Steps / 步骤 | Expected / 预期 |
|---|---|---|
| Admin role; a committee team with at least 4 KPI cards on the team detail KPI section — one manually-added Admin KPI, one manually-added Individual KPI, one manually-added Team KPI, and one auto-generated Individual KPI (R-580). The current cycle is open for input. / Admin 登录；团队 KPI 标签页 ≥4 张卡：手动添加的 Admin / Individual / Team 各一张，再加一张 R-580 自动生成的 Individual；当前周期开放录入。 | 1. Open team detail → KPI tab. 2. Click the manually-added Admin KPI card body — confirm the existing completion-rate popup opens in place without navigation. 3. Enter an actual value, save — confirm popup closes, card's completion-rate ring + % refresh on the team page. 4. Click the manually-added Individual KPI card — confirm same popup opens. 5. Click the manually-added Team KPI card — same popup opens. 6. Click the **auto-generated** Individual KPI card body — confirm the popup does NOT open; instead the user is routed to the KPI Detail page (read-only). 7. Open a manually-added card's 3-dot menu → Detail — confirm it still routes to the full KPI detail page (not the quick popup). 8. Open a manually-added card's 3-dot menu directly (no body click) — confirm the popup does NOT open. 9. Open a card, click Cancel/Close — confirm no value change on the card. 10. Switch language to Arabic, repeat steps 1–3 on any manually-added card. | Steps 2 / 4 / 5 all open the same existing `ActualValueModal` with the clicked card's KPI loaded, no navigation. Step 3: card refreshes with the new value in place. Step 6: auto-generated card click routes to Detail (NOT the popup) — the popup is excluded for auto-gen KPIs per R-580. Step 7: 3-dot Detail still works, routes to full detail. Step 8: 3-dot click does NOT trigger the quick popup (event isolation). Step 9: cancel leaves card untouched. Step 10: Arabic rendering and save both work. No new popup component appears in the bundle / DOM — same modal id / class as the standalone KPI list's completion-rate action. |

---

## Proposed technical solution

> English-only section. PM does not need to review beyond this point.

### Reused component (existing, do not duplicate)

The system already ships the quick completion-rate popup as:

- [`ActualValueModal.tsx`](frontend/src/pages/StrategicKpis/KpisManagement/KpiDetail/components/ActualValueModal/ActualValueModal.tsx) — full implementation; props are `{ kpiInfoId, visible, changeVisible, onSaveSuccess? }`

Already invoked from three places today, proving it's a portable reusable:

- KPI list page row action: [`StrategicKpis/KpisManagement/index.tsx:53,126,729-731,1478-1481`](frontend/src/pages/StrategicKpis/KpisManagement/index.tsx)
- KPI detail page header button: [`StrategicKpis/KpisManagement/KpiDetail/index.tsx:23,66,670,764-767`](frontend/src/pages/StrategicKpis/KpisManagement/KpiDetail/index.tsx)
- Index KPI list page row action: [`StrategicKpis/IndexKpi/index.tsx:55,133,729,1354-1357`](frontend/src/pages/StrategicKpis/IndexKpi/index.tsx)

The modal already handles: period tabs, with-formula / without-formula / duration formulas, attachments, analysis / recommendation / challenges, single-row save via `saveOneRowInformation`, year toggle, late-entry / additional-value branches. R-581 reuses all of it — **no functional change to the modal itself**.

**Completion-rate calculation (existing, reused as-is):**
- Per-period ratio — frontend preview `ActualValueModal.tsx:151-168` (`getRatio`), backend authoritative `KpisServiceImpl.java:2268-2291` (and `recalcPeriodRatio` `1317-1339`): Increasing Better = actual/target×100; Decreasing Better = target/actual×100; capped at 100% (`KpisServiceImpl.java:2289-2290`).
- Overall completion rate — backend `KpisServiceImpl.calcRatio` `2671-2696`: Sum/Average both = mean of period ratios; Last Value = last non-null ratio.
- Card ring — `KpiColumn/index.tsx getProgressDetailRate (~335-368)` reads `record.progress` (backend completion rate) → `<PieChart performance={...}>`. After save, `progress` updates and the ring reflects it. R-581 wires the modal's save success to refresh the card row so the ring updates in place.

### Frontend wiring on the team detail

Single file changes: [`Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx`](frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/KpiColumn/index.tsx).

The component already has a partial mock for this behavior (`completionRateModalVisible` state at lines 128-129, click handler at lines 737-744, and an inline placeholder modal at lines 958-1053 marked `[HF-006 mock]`). R-581 finalizes that scaffolding by:

1. **Delete the inline mock modal** at `KpiColumn/index.tsx:958-1053`.
2. **Import the real reusable:**
   ```tsx
   import ActualValueModal from '@/pages/StrategicKpis/KpisManagement/KpiDetail/components/ActualValueModal/ActualValueModal.tsx'
   ```
3. **Render it at the bottom of the component**, mirroring the pattern in `KpisManagement/index.tsx:1478-1481`:
   ```tsx
   <ActualValueModal
     kpiInfoId={completionRateKpi?.kpiInfoId}
     visible={completionRateModalVisible}
     changeVisible={setCompletionRateModalVisible}
     onSaveSuccess={refreshInPlace}
   />
   ```
4. **Update the card-body click handler** (`KpiColumn/index.tsx:737-744`) — it already opens the popup on body click and skips when the user clicked the 3-dot menu. Add one additional gate: **skip the popup for auto-generated KPIs (R-580)** and route to the KPI Detail page instead. Use `kpi.isAutoGenerated` (the new column added by R-580):
   ```tsx
   const handleCardClick = (kpi, e) => {
     if (e.target.closest('.td-card-more, .arco-dropdown')) return  // existing 3-dot gate
     if (kpi.isAutoGenerated) {
       navigate(`/strategic-kpis/kpisManagement/detail/${kpi.kpiInfoId}`)
       return
     }
     setCompletionRateKpi(kpi)
     setCompletionRateModalVisible(true)
   }
   ```
5. **`refreshInPlace`** is already defined in the file (lines 187-197) — it re-fetches the current page-size of KPI cards and updates `list` without resetting the scroll. Wire it as the modal's `onSaveSuccess` so a save updates the card's completion ring on the team page without a full page refresh.

### Backend

The single-row save endpoint `saveOneRowInformation` (used today by the same `ActualValueModal`) is reused. Team-scoped committee KPIs (R-446 / R-580) expose `kpiInfoId` on each card row (`KpiColumn/index.tsx:734,764`).

> **Verify before build — committee-KPI data fetch.** When the real `ActualValueModal` was wired to a committee KPI in the local prototype, it reported **"The KPI has been deleted by the admin."** The modal's data fetch (and `saveOneRowInformation`) appear to expect a **standard KPI id**, whereas committee KPIs live in the `committee_kpi` flow with their own id. The dev must confirm the modal loads/saves against the correct committee-KPI id (pass the committee KPI id, or point the modal's fetch at the committee-KPI endpoint) so the period rows load and save correctly. This is the one non-trivial part of R-581 — the rest (open the modal on card click, exclude auto-gen, refresh in place) is straightforward. / 真实 `ActualValueModal` 对 committee KPI 会报"已删除"，因为它按标准 KPI id 拉数据；committee KPI 在 `committee_kpi` 体系里有自己的 id。开发需确认弹窗按正确的 committee KPI id 拉取/保存。

### Database

No schema change.

### Effort estimate

- Frontend: ~0.5 day (delete mock modal, wire the real one, verify `refreshInPlace` works on save)
- Backend: 0 (no change)
- QA: ~0.5 day (all card types, auto-generated KPI, 3-dot menu isolation, EN / AR)
- **Total: ~1 dev-day**

---

## Open questions / 待澄清

None. Design locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12 — see Locked decisions.

---

## Locked decisions / 已锁定决策

1. **Reuse the existing quick-input popup — do not invent a new one.** R-581 reuses `ActualValueModal` (the same modal that powers row-level "Completion Rate" action in the standalone KPI list and Index KPI list). No new modal component, no new endpoint. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12. / 复用 `ActualValueModal`，不新造弹窗。

2. **Popup opens in place on the team detail — no navigation.** The team detail stays mounted; save refreshes the card via `refreshInPlace`, not a page reload. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12. / 弹窗就地弹出，不跳转，保存后就地刷新卡片。

3. **Single number / percentage input only inside the popup.** The popup is the reused completion-rate modal — the full KPI edit form (name, type, formula, target, etc.) is NOT exposed here. Admins who need to edit those fields go via the card's 3-dot menu → Detail. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12. / 弹窗里只录完成率/实际值，不暴露完整 KPI 编辑表单；改其他字段走三点菜单 → Detail。

4. **Applies to manually-added cards only — auto-generated KPIs are excluded.** Manually-added Admin / Individual / Team KPI cards open the quick-input popup on body click. **Auto-generated KPI cards (R-580) do NOT open the popup** — clicking them routes to the KPI Detail page (read-only view of the auto-computed value with source data drill-down). This keeps R-581 consistent with R-580's lock that auto-gen KPIs auto-update from MoM / Actions and are not user-editable. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12. / 仅手动添加的卡片可用快速录入；R-580 自动生成的卡片点击直接跳详情页，不弹快速录入。与 R-580"全字段锁定"决策保持一致。

---

## Related PRDs / 相关 PRD

- [R-446 Add KPI from Team Detail](../v3.3/[R-446]-add-kpi-from-team-detail.md) — team-scoped KPI storage; the cards R-581 targets are rendered from this data
- [R-458 Team Detail KPI Type Rings](../v3.3/[R-458]-team-detail-kpi-type-rings.md) — the type-ring layout the cards live under
- [R-580 Auto-Generated Individual KPIs](./[R-580]-committee-team-auto-kpi-generation.md) — auto-generated cards are also quick-inputtable via R-581

1	# [P2] R-582 — Member Evaluation: Add Overall Score + Person Percentage / 委员会成员评估表：新增"总体得分"与"个人评分"两列

3	| | |

5	| **Version** | V3.4 |

12	---
13	
14	## The problem / 问题
15	
16	> 简述：经理在评估团队成员的时候，今天表单里只有两个自动计算的字段 —— 出勤（从 MoM 拉）和准时完成任务（从 Actions 拉），都是只读的。但客户的评估模板里其实还有一个第三项 ——"个人评分（Person Percentage）"，由经理手动打分，体现"出勤 / 任务"之外的主观判断（工作质量、态度、配合度等）。系统里其实早就有这个非必填字段，但 UI 没有显眼地暴露，经理经常忽略。客户希望把这一项跟另外两个字段并列摆在一起，让经理评估时一眼就能看到。
17	
18	When a team manager evaluates a committee team member today, the evaluation form has two auto-calculated, read-only fields:
19	
20	- **Attendance** — auto-pulled from the MoM module (meeting attendance ratio)
21	- **On-Time Task Completion** — auto-pulled from the Actions module
22	
23	The customer template defines a third component — **Person Percentage** — a manager-entered judgment score that captures qualitative factors (work quality, attitude, collaboration) not visible in attendance / task data. The field already exists in the data model as a non-mandatory input, but the UI does not surface it alongside the other two, so managers routinely skip it without realising it is part of the evaluation.
24	
25	The customer wants Person Percentage **visible as a peer of the two auto-calculated fields** on the member evaluation form so it is filled consistently across teams.
26	
27	---
28	
29	## Current behavior / 当前行为
30	
31	> 简述：今天评估弹窗里，每个成员一行，只显示 Member / Actions（X/Y）/ Attendance（X/Y）三列，都是只读展示。底部有一个针对整个团队的"Manager overall comment"文本框，没有针对单个成员的打分字段。Person Percentage 在数据层面是存在的非必填字段，但 UI 上没有任何入口。
32	
33	Manager opens *Committee → Members Evaluation → Add Evaluation*. The modal shows:
34	
35	| Column / 列 | Content / 内容 | Editable? / 是否可编辑 |
36	|---|---|---|
37	| Member / 成员 | Member name + avatar / 姓名 + 头像 | — |
38	| Actions / 任务 | `actionFinish / actionTotal` (e.g. `4/5`) / 完成任务数 / 总任务数 | ✗ auto from Actions / 自动 |
39	| Attendance / 出勤 | `attendeeCount / attendeeTotal` (e.g. `3/4`) / 实际出勤次数 / 应出勤总次数 | ✗ auto from MoM / 自动 |
40	
41	Below the per-member table sits a single **Manager overall comment** textarea (max 500 chars) that applies to the whole team — not to any individual member. There is no per-member numerical input in the form today.
42	
43	Person Percentage is accepted by the backend as part of the evaluation payload (it is a non-mandatory field on the existing data model), but no UI control writes to it, so in practice it stays empty for every member.

45	---
46	
47	## Expected behavior / 期望行为
48	
49	> 简述：分两个地方。① **评估列表页**（每行 = 一次评估）新增一列 **Overall Score（总体得分）**，放在 Avg Meeting Attendance 之后，= 出勤×20% + 任务×80%（跟客户计算器的"Member Score / الدرجة"一致），自动只读、以环形图显示。② **Add/Edit Evaluation 弹窗**（评估详情，按成员逐行）显示 **Person Percentage（个人评分）**——经理手填的 0–100 整数，可不填。弹窗本身布局不变，只是把个人评分这一列显示出来。
50	
51	This change touches **two screens**:
52	
53	**A) Evaluation list page** (`/committee/evaluation/list` — one row per evaluation) — **add an "Overall Score" column** after Avg Meeting Attendance:
54	
55	| Column / 列 | Source / 数据来源 | Editable? |
56	|---|---|---|
57	| Avg Task Completion / 任务完成 | Auto from Actions / 自动 | ✗ read-only (existing) |
58	| Avg Meeting Attendance / 出勤 | Auto from MoM / 自动 | ✗ read-only (existing) |
59	| **Overall Score (new) / 总体得分（新）** | Auto = `Avg Meeting Attendance×20% + Avg Task Completion×80%` (= calculator's "Member Score / الدرجة") | ✗ read-only |
60	
61	- **Overall Score** is the per-evaluation headline aggregate, shown as a ring/pie like the other two columns. *(This is the "Overall" aggregate Amir asked for in R-580-Q1 — surfaced here, not as a third auto-generated KPI card; see R-580.)*
62	
63	**B) Add/Edit Evaluation modal** (the evaluation detail, per-member rows) — **display the Person Percentage column** (manager input):
64	
65	| Member-row column / 成员行列 | Source | Editable? |
66	|---|---|---|
67	| Actions / 任务 | Auto from Actions / 自动 | ✗ read-only (existing) |
68	| Attendance / 出勤 | Auto from MoM / 自动 | ✗ read-only (existing) |
69	| **Person Percentage / 个人评分** | Manager input, integer 0–100, non-mandatory / 经理手填 0–100，可不填 | ✓ editable in edit/add, read-only in detail |
70	
71	- The modal's layout is otherwise **unchanged** — Person Percentage is just shown as the per-member input column. Empty counts as `0` in any composite that uses it (Locked decision 6). Whether Person Percentage feeds the Overall Score (and at what weight) is **not in the customer calculator/PPTX** — pending customer confirmation (see Open questions); for now Overall Score = Attendance×20% + Task×80% only.

103	## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准
104	
105	| # | Criterion / 验收点 | Priority |
106	|---|---|---|
107	| 1 | The **evaluation list** gains a new **"Overall Score"** column after Avg Meeting Attendance, rendered as a ring/pie like the other two | P0 |
108	| 2 | **Overall Score** is auto-calculated, read-only = `Avg Meeting Attendance×20% + Avg Task Completion×80%` (the calculator's "Member Score / الدرجة") per evaluation | P0 |

113	| 7 | Avg Task Completion and Avg Meeting Attendance remain read-only and auto-calculated from Actions and MoM / 任务完成与出勤保持自动计算、只读 | P0 |
114	| 8 | The existing team-level "Manager overall comment" textarea is unchanged in position, label, and validation / 团队整体评论框不变 | P0 |
115	| 9 | The list Overall Score column, the modal Person Percentage column header, and the `%` suffix render correctly in EN and AR (RTL) | P0 |
116	| 10 | Saving persists each member's Person Percentage to the backend as part of the evaluation record | P0 |
117	| 11 | Person Percentage is editable only for users with the existing evaluation edit permission (`committee::evaluation::edit`) — same gate as Add Evaluation; no new permission. Others see read-only. | P0 |
118	
119	---
120	
121	## QA test scenario / QA 测试场景
122	
123	| Setup | Steps | Expected |
124	|---|---|---|
125	| Manager role logged in. A committee team T with 3 members (A, B, C) exists, has at least one MoM meeting recorded and at least one Action assigned, and has not yet been evaluated this cycle. | 1. Open *Committee → Members Evaluation → Add Evaluation* and select team T. 2. Inspect the member table — confirm the new Person Percentage column is present at the right end. 3. For member A type `85`, for member B leave the cell blank, for member C type `70`. 4. Try to type `150`, `-5`, `12.5`, and the letter `x` into a cell — confirm each is rejected. 5. Save the evaluation with the mix of filled / blank values from step 3. 6. Reopen the same evaluation in Detail mode and verify the displayed values. 7. Open it again in Edit mode, clear A's value, set B to `40`, leave C as `70`, and save. 8. Reopen in Detail mode and re-verify. 9. Switch the UI to Arabic and reopen — confirm column header, input, and `%` suffix render correctly in RTL. | Step 2: column visible with width comparable to Attendance. Step 3: each cell accepts independent values; Attendance and Actions cells stay read-only. Step 4: invalid inputs rejected (cell does not accept them or shows inline error). Step 5: save succeeds. Step 6: Detail shows `A = 85%`, `B = —`, `C = 70%`; Attendance and Actions unchanged; overall comment unchanged. Step 7: save succeeds with the new mix. Step 8: Detail shows `A = —`, `B = 40%`, `C = 70%`. Step 9: Arabic layout renders the column header in Arabic, the `%` suffix on the correct side for RTL, and the input still accepts integers 0–100. |
126	
127	---
128	
129	## Proposed technical solution
130	
131	> English-only section. PM does not need to review beyond this point.
132	
133	### Frontend
134	
135	Single file to change — the evaluation modal: [EvaluationEditDetailModal/index.tsx](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Evaluation/components/EvaluationEditDetailModal/index.tsx).
136	
137	1. **Add a new column** to the `columns: TableColumnProps[]` array at `EvaluationEditDetailModal/index.tsx:57-87`, positioned after the existing `attendance` column. The new column's `render` function returns either an `InputNumber` (in edit / add mode) or plain text (in detail mode), bound to the per-row `personPercentage` value:
138	
139	   ```tsx
140	   {
141	     title: t('committeeEvaluation:columns.personPercentage'),
142	     dataIndex: 'personPercentage',
143	     width: 160,
144	     render: (_, record, index) => {
145	       if (isDetailMode) {
146	         return record.personPercentage == null
147	           ? '—'
148	           : `${record.personPercentage}%`
149	       }
150	       return (
151	         <InputNumber
152	           min={0}
153	           max={100}
154	           precision={0}
155	           hideControl
156	           suffix='%'
157	           value={record.personPercentage}
158	           onChange={(val) => updateMemberPercentage(index, val)}
159	         />
160	       )
161	     },
162	   }
163	   ```
164	
165	2. **Add `updateMemberPercentage(index, val)`** as a local helper that mutates `memberList[index].personPercentage` via `setMemberList`. The current component already keeps `memberList` in state (line 54) and feeds it to the table via the `getList` callback (lines 161-180), so the same state can carry the manager's edits.
166	
167	3. **Persist on save / edit** — extend the `runSaveEvaluation` and `runEditEvaluation` payloads (lines 127-152) to include the per-member percentages. Suggested shape:
168	
169	   ```ts
170	   runSaveEvaluation({
171	     teamId,
172	     comment,
173	     memberScores: memberList.map(m => ({
174	       userId: m.userDetail.id,
175	       personPercentage: m.personPercentage ?? null,
176	     })),
177	   })
178	   ```
179	
180	4. **Detail / Edit pre-population** — when `getEvaluationDetail` or `getEvaluationDetailInit` returns the attendee list, each member entry should already carry `personPercentage` from the backend (null when unset). The existing `onSuccess` handlers (lines 92-106) drop the list straight into `memberList`, so no extra mapping is needed once the backend payload includes the field.
181	
182	5. **i18n keys** — add to `src/locale/en/committeeEvaluation.json` and the AR equivalent under `src/locale/arEG/committeeEvaluation.json`:
183	
184	   ```json
185	   "columns": {
186	     ...,
187	     "personPercentage": "Person Percentage"   // AR: "النسبة الشخصية"
188	   }
189	   ```
190	
191	6. **Read-only mode rendering** — already handled by the `isDetailMode` branch inside the column's `render`. No separate component or layout change.
192	
193	### Backend
194	
195	The Person Percentage field is described as already existing on the data model as a non-mandatory input. Backend work is therefore limited to surfacing it through the existing evaluation endpoints:
196	
197	- `saveEvaluation` / `editEvaluation` — accept the `memberScores[]` array on the request body and persist `personPercentage` per attendee row alongside the existing attendance / action counters.
198	- `getEvaluationDetail` / `getEvaluationDetailInit` — include `personPercentage` (nullable) on each entry of the returned `attendeeList`.
199	
200	If the column does not yet exist on the attendee / evaluation-member table in the database, add a nullable integer column `person_percentage tinyint unsigned null` (range 0-100 enforced at the API layer). To be confirmed with backend during ticket grooming.
201	
202	No change to the final-score calculation pipeline is in scope for this ticket — see *Open questions* below for the weighting decision that is still open.
203	
204	### Effort estimate
205	
206	- Frontend: ~0.5 day (one new column, one input control, payload wiring, two i18n keys)
207	- Backend: ~0.5 day (request / response field surfacing; optional schema column if not yet present)
208	- QA: ~0.5 day (input validation, persistence round-trip, detail / edit mode, RTL)
209	- **Total: ~1.5 dev-days**
210	
211	---
212	
213	## Open questions / 待澄清
214	
215	1. **⚠ Does Person Percentage feed the Overall Score / composite — and at what weight? PENDING CUSTOMER CONFIRMATION (Amir 2026-06-17).** Checked the customer materials: **neither the calculator (`Committee_KPI_Calculator.xlsx`) nor the PPTX (`KPI Template for committee calculation performance.pptx`) contains a "Person Percentage" component** — the documented per-member composite is **only Attendance 20% + Task 80% (= 100%)**. So Person Percentage's role in scoring is undefined in the customer model: it could (a) be **informational only** (captured, not scored — current default; Overall Score = Att×20% + Task×80% as-is), or (b) become a **new weighted component**, which would require re-balancing the 20/80 split. Confirm with the customer before any calculation-pipeline change. *(This determines whether the "empty → 0" rule in decision 6 has any score impact.)* / 计算器和 PPTX 里都没有 Person Percentage，文档化的成员综合分只有出勤 20% + 任务 80%；个人评分是否计入、占多少权重需客户确认，否则按"仅信息、不计分"。
216	
217	2. ~~**Handling of empty values downstream.**~~ — **Resolved (Amir 2026-06-17):** an empty Person Percentage **counts as `0`** in that component of the composite score (NOT "ignored / re-normalised"). This is the intentional, more punitive behaviour — a manager who skips the field scores that member **0** for the Person-Percentage component, dragging their composite down rather than being neutral. Dev must implement "treat null/blank as 0", not "skip + re-normalise". See Locked decisions. / 已定（Amir 2026-06-17）：留空按 **0** 计入综合分（不是忽略/重新归一）。这是有意为之、更严格——经理不填，这名成员该项就是 0，会拉低综合分。开发须按"空值=0"实现，不要"跳过+重新归一"。
218	
219	---
220	
221	## Locked decisions / 已锁定决策
222	
223	1. **Person Percentage is a manager-input (manual) field, non-mandatory.** Matches the existing data-model semantics — the field is already accepted by the backend as optional, and this PRD does not change that. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12. / 个人评分是经理手动填的、非必填，沿用现有数据模型的语义，本次不改其可选性。Eugene 于 2026-06-12 锁定。
224	
225	2. **Sits alongside Attendance and On-Time Task Completion in the Member Evaluation form, as a peer column.** Position: to the right of Attendance. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12. / 在评估弹窗里作为第三列，与 Attendance / Task Completion 并列，位置在 Attendance 右侧。Eugene 于 2026-06-12 锁定。
226	
227	3. **Attendance and On-Time Task Completion remain auto-calculated and read-only.** No behavior change to those two columns; their data sources (MoM and Actions) and rendering are untouched. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12. / 出勤和任务完成保持自动计算、只读，数据源（MoM / Actions）和渲染方式都不动。Eugene 于 2026-06-12 锁定。
228	
229	4. **Permission follows the existing Add/Edit Evaluation permission — no new permission.** Person Percentage is editable only by users who already have the evaluation edit permission (`committee::evaluation::edit`, `CommitteePermissionEnum.EvaluationEdit` — the same gate that controls the "Add Evaluation" button and the editable modal, see `Evaluation/index.tsx:45,106`). Users without it see the evaluation (and Person Percentage) in read-only detail mode, exactly as they do for the rest of the form. The field is just another input in the evaluation modal, so it inherits the modal's existing edit gate. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-15. / 个人评分的可编辑权限沿用现有的"添加/编辑评估"权限（committee::evaluation::edit），不新增权限；没有该权限的人只读查看。Eugene 于 2026-06-15 锁定。
230	
231	5. **Visibility: shown on all committee teams' evaluation forms** (no per-team config toggle) — it is part of the standard evaluation template. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-15. / 所有委员会团队的评估表都显示，不做团队级开关。
232	
233	6. **Empty Person Percentage counts as `0` in the composite score** (not ignored / re-normalised). Skipping the field scores that member 0 for this component — intentionally punitive. Dev implements "treat null/blank as 0". Locked per Amir 2026-06-17. / 留空按 0 计入综合分（不忽略、不重新归一），有意从严；开发按"空值=0"实现。Amir 2026-06-17 锁定。
234	
235	---
236	
237	## Related PRDs / 相关 PRD
238	
239	- R-447 — Committee KPI weight distribution (Individual 20% / Team 60% / Admin 20%) — Person Percentage feeds into the Individual KPI component / 个人评分归到 Individual KPI 那一块
240	- [R-580 Auto-Generate Individual KPIs per Member](./[R-580]-committee-team-auto-kpi-generation.md) — auto-creates the Attendance + Task Completion KPIs that this PRD's two read-only columns reflect / R-580 自动生成的两条 Individual KPI，正是本 PRD 中两个只读列的数据来源

file.content:
# [P2] R-582 — Member Evaluation: Add Overall Score + Person Percentage / 委员会成员评估表：新增"总体得分"与"个人评分"两列

| | |
|---|---|
| **Version** | V3.4 |
| **Source / 来源** | Customer requirement raised at 2026-06-12 V3.4 planning meeting / 2026-06-12 V3.4 规划会议上客户提出的需求 |
| **Priority** | P2 |
| **Created** | 2026-06-12 |
| **PM status** | `draft` |
| **Spec source / 公式来源** | [`reference/client-docs/KPI Template for committee calculation performance.pptx`](../../../reference/client-docs/KPI%20Template%20for%20committee%20calculation%20performance.pptx) — Member Evaluation section / 客户提供的模板"成员评估"章节 |

---

## The problem / 问题

> 简述：经理在评估团队成员的时候，今天表单里只有两个自动计算的字段 —— 出勤（从 MoM 拉）和准时完成任务（从 Actions 拉），都是只读的。但客户的评估模板里其实还有一个第三项 ——"个人评分（Person Percentage）"，由经理手动打分，体现"出勤 / 任务"之外的主观判断（工作质量、态度、配合度等）。系统里其实早就有这个非必填字段，但 UI 没有显眼地暴露，经理经常忽略。客户希望把这一项跟另外两个字段并列摆在一起，让经理评估时一眼就能看到。

When a team manager evaluates a committee team member today, the evaluation form has two auto-calculated, read-only fields:

- **Attendance** — auto-pulled from the MoM module (meeting attendance ratio)
- **On-Time Task Completion** — auto-pulled from the Actions module

The customer template defines a third component — **Person Percentage** — a manager-entered judgment score that captures qualitative factors (work quality, attitude, collaboration) not visible in attendance / task data. The field already exists in the data model as a non-mandatory input, but the UI does not surface it alongside the other two, so managers routinely skip it without realising it is part of the evaluation.

The customer wants Person Percentage **visible as a peer of the two auto-calculated fields** on the member evaluation form so it is filled consistently across teams.

---

## Current behavior / 当前行为

> 简述：今天评估弹窗里，每个成员一行，只显示 Member / Actions（X/Y）/ Attendance（X/Y）三列，都是只读展示。底部有一个针对整个团队的"Manager overall comment"文本框，没有针对单个成员的打分字段。Person Percentage 在数据层面是存在的非必填字段，但 UI 上没有任何入口。

Manager opens *Committee → Members Evaluation → Add Evaluation*. The modal shows:

| Column / 列 | Content / 内容 | Editable? / 是否可编辑 |
|---|---|---|
| Member / 成员 | Member name + avatar / 姓名 + 头像 | — |
| Actions / 任务 | `actionFinish / actionTotal` (e.g. `4/5`) / 完成任务数 / 总任务数 | ✗ auto from Actions / 自动 |
| Attendance / 出勤 | `attendeeCount / attendeeTotal` (e.g. `3/4`) / 实际出勤次数 / 应出勤总次数 | ✗ auto from MoM / 自动 |

Below the per-member table sits a single **Manager overall comment** textarea (max 500 chars) that applies to the whole team — not to any individual member. There is no per-member numerical input in the form today.

Person Percentage is accepted by the backend as part of the evaluation payload (it is a non-mandatory field on the existing data model), but no UI control writes to it, so in practice it stays empty for every member.

---

## Expected behavior / 期望行为

> 简述：分两个地方。① **评估列表页**（每行 = 一次评估）新增一列 **Overall Score（总体得分）**，放在 Avg Meeting Attendance 之后，= 出勤×20% + 任务×80%（跟客户计算器的"Member Score / الدرجة"一致），自动只读、以环形图显示。② **Add/Edit Evaluation 弹窗**（评估详情，按成员逐行）显示 **Person Percentage（个人评分）**——经理手填的 0–100 整数，可不填。弹窗本身布局不变，只是把个人评分这一列显示出来。

This change touches **two screens**:

**A) Evaluation list page** (`/committee/evaluation/list` — one row per evaluation) — **add an "Overall Score" column** after Avg Meeting Attendance:

| Column / 列 | Source / 数据来源 | Editable? |
|---|---|---|
| Avg Task Completion / 任务完成 | Auto from Actions / 自动 | ✗ read-only (existing) |
| Avg Meeting Attendance / 出勤 | Auto from MoM / 自动 | ✗ read-only (existing) |
| **Overall Score (new) / 总体得分（新）** | Auto = `Avg Meeting Attendance×20% + Avg Task Completion×80%` (= calculator's "Member Score / الدرجة") | ✗ read-only |

- **Overall Score** is the per-evaluation headline aggregate, shown as a ring/pie like the other two columns. *(This is the "Overall" aggregate Amir asked for in R-580-Q1 — surfaced here, not as a third auto-generated KPI card; see R-580.)*

**B) Add/Edit Evaluation modal** (the evaluation detail, per-member rows) — **display the Person Percentage column** (manager input):

| Member-row column / 成员行列 | Source | Editable? |
|---|---|---|
| Actions / 任务 | Auto from Actions / 自动 | ✗ read-only (existing) |
| Attendance / 出勤 | Auto from MoM / 自动 | ✗ read-only (existing) |
| **Person Percentage / 个人评分** | Manager input, integer 0–100, non-mandatory / 经理手填 0–100，可不填 | ✓ editable in edit/add, read-only in detail |

- The modal's layout is otherwise **unchanged** — Person Percentage is just shown as the per-member input column. Empty counts as `0` in any composite that uses it (Locked decision 6). Whether Person Percentage feeds the Overall Score (and at what weight) is **not in the customer calculator/PPTX** — pending customer confirmation (see Open questions); for now Overall Score = Attendance×20% + Task×80% only.

### Layout / 布局

```
A) Evaluation LIST (one row per evaluation) — Overall Score column added
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Date  │ Submitted By │ Members │ Avg Task Completion │ Avg Meeting Attendance │ Overall Score │ Action │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ 02/04  │ ydd_admin    │   4     │   ◔ 27%             │   ● 91%                │   ◔ 40%       │ 👁 ✎  │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
   Overall Score = Avg Meeting Attendance×20% + Avg Task Completion×80% (auto ring/pie, read-only)

B) Add/Edit Evaluation MODAL (per member) — Person Percentage column displayed
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Member                  │  Actions │  Attendance │  Person Percentage │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  [avatar] ydd_user2_163  │   1/2    │   35/39     │   [      ] %        │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
   Person Percentage = manager input (0–100, non-mandatory)
```

Evaluation list — new **Overall Score** column (after Avg Meeting Attendance):

![R-582 Overall Score in evaluation list](artifacts/screenshots/member-evaluation/expected-overall-score-list.png)

Add/Edit Evaluation modal — **Person Percentage** per member:

![R-582 Person Percentage in modal](artifacts/screenshots/member-evaluation/expected-person-percentage.png)

---

## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准

| # | Criterion / 验收点 | Priority |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | The **evaluation list** gains a new **"Overall Score"** column after Avg Meeting Attendance, rendered as a ring/pie like the other two | P0 |
| 2 | **Overall Score** is auto-calculated, read-only = `Avg Meeting Attendance×20% + Avg Task Completion×80%` (the calculator's "Member Score / الدرجة") per evaluation | P0 |
| 3 | The **Add/Edit Evaluation modal** shows a **Person Percentage** column per member (manager input); the modal's other sections are unchanged | P0 |
| 4 | Person Percentage is a numeric input accepting integers 0–100; decimals, negatives, > 100, non-numeric rejected; `%` suffix shown, stored as a plain integer | P0 |
| 5 | Person Percentage is non-mandatory; empty is allowed and **counts as 0** in any composite that uses it (Locked decision 6) | P0 |
| 6 | Re-opening a saved evaluation pre-populates the Person Percentage value in edit mode; in detail (read-only) mode it renders `—` (empty) / `NN%` (filled) | P0 |
| 7 | Avg Task Completion and Avg Meeting Attendance remain read-only and auto-calculated from Actions and MoM / 任务完成与出勤保持自动计算、只读 | P0 |
| 8 | The existing team-level "Manager overall comment" textarea is unchanged in position, label, and validation / 团队整体评论框不变 | P0 |
| 9 | The list Overall Score column, the modal Person Percentage column header, and the `%` suffix render correctly in EN and AR (RTL) | P0 |
| 10 | Saving persists each member's Person Percentage to the backend as part of the evaluation record | P0 |
| 11 | Person Percentage is editable only for users with the existing evaluation edit permission (`committee::evaluation::edit`) — same gate as Add Evaluation; no new permission. Others see read-only. | P0 |

---

## QA test scenario / QA 测试场景

| Setup | Steps | Expected |
|---|---|---|
| Manager role logged in. A committee team T with 3 members (A, B, C) exists, has at least one MoM meeting recorded and at least one Action assigned, and has not yet been evaluated this cycle. | 1. Open *Committee → Members Evaluation → Add Evaluation* and select team T. 2. Inspect the member table — confirm the new Person Percentage column is present at the right end. 3. For member A type `85`, for member B leave the cell blank, for member C type `70`. 4. Try to type `150`, `-5`, `12.5`, and the letter `x` into a cell — confirm each is rejected. 5. Save the evaluation with the mix of filled / blank values from step 3. 6. Reopen the same evaluation in Detail mode and verify the displayed values. 7. Open it again in Edit mode, clear A's value, set B to `40`, leave C as `70`, and save. 8. Reopen in Detail mode and re-verify. 9. Switch the UI to Arabic and reopen — confirm column header, input, and `%` suffix render correctly in RTL. | Step 2: column visible with width comparable to Attendance. Step 3: each cell accepts independent values; Attendance and Actions cells stay read-only. Step 4: invalid inputs rejected (cell does not accept them or shows inline error). Step 5: save succeeds. Step 6: Detail shows `A = 85%`, `B = —`, `C = 70%`; Attendance and Actions unchanged; overall comment unchanged. Step 7: save succeeds with the new mix. Step 8: Detail shows `A = —`, `B = 40%`, `C = 70%`. Step 9: Arabic layout renders the column header in Arabic, the `%` suffix on the correct side for RTL, and the input still accepts integers 0–100. |

---

## Proposed technical solution

> English-only section. PM does not need to review beyond this point.

### Frontend

Single file to change — the evaluation modal: [EvaluationEditDetailModal/index.tsx](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Evaluation/components/EvaluationEditDetailModal/index.tsx).

1. **Add a new column** to the `columns: TableColumnProps[]` array at `EvaluationEditDetailModal/index.tsx:57-87`, positioned after the existing `attendance` column. The new column's `render` function returns either an `InputNumber` (in edit / add mode) or plain text (in detail mode), bound to the per-row `personPercentage` value:

   ```tsx
   {
     title: t('committeeEvaluation:columns.personPercentage'),
     dataIndex: 'personPercentage',
     width: 160,
     render: (_, record, index) => {
       if (isDetailMode) {
         return record.personPercentage == null
           ? '—'
           : `${record.personPercentage}%`
       }
       return (
         <InputNumber
           min={0}
           max={100}
           precision={0}
           hideControl
           suffix='%'
           value={record.personPercentage}
           onChange={(val) => updateMemberPercentage(index, val)}
         />
       )
     },
   }
   ```

2. **Add `updateMemberPercentage(index, val)`** as a local helper that mutates `memberList[index].personPercentage` via `setMemberList`. The current component already keeps `memberList` in state (line 54) and feeds it to the table via the `getList` callback (lines 161-180), so the same state can carry the manager's edits.

3. **Persist on save / edit** — extend the `runSaveEvaluation` and `runEditEvaluation` payloads (lines 127-152) to include the per-member percentages. Suggested shape:

   ```ts
   runSaveEvaluation({
     teamId,
     comment,
     memberScores: memberList.map(m => ({
       userId: m.userDetail.id,
       personPercentage: m.personPercentage ?? null,
     })),
   })
   ```

4. **Detail / Edit pre-population** — when `getEvaluationDetail` or `getEvaluationDetailInit` returns the attendee list, each member entry should already carry `personPercentage` from the backend (null when unset). The existing `onSuccess` handlers (lines 92-106) drop the list straight into `memberList`, so no extra mapping is needed once the backend payload includes the field.

5. **i18n keys** — add to `src/locale/en/committeeEvaluation.json` and the AR equivalent under `src/locale/arEG/committeeEvaluation.json`:

   ```json
   "columns": {
     ...,
     "personPercentage": "Person Percentage"   // AR: "النسبة الشخصية"
   }
   ```

6. **Read-only mode rendering** — already handled by the `isDetailMode` branch inside the column's `render`. No separate component or layout change.

### Backend

The Person Percentage field is described as already existing on the data model as a non-mandatory input. Backend work is therefore limited to surfacing it through the existing evaluation endpoints:

- `saveEvaluation` / `editEvaluation` — accept the `memberScores[]` array on the request body and persist `personPercentage` per attendee row alongside the existing attendance / action counters.
- `getEvaluationDetail` / `getEvaluationDetailInit` — include `personPercentage` (nullable) on each entry of the returned `attendeeList`.

If the column does not yet exist on the attendee / evaluation-member table in the database, add a nullable integer column `person_percentage tinyint unsigned null` (range 0-100 enforced at the API layer). To be confirmed with backend during ticket grooming.

No change to the final-score calculation pipeline is in scope for this ticket — see *Open questions* below for the weighting decision that is still open.

### Effort estimate

- Frontend: ~0.5 day (one new column, one input control, payload wiring, two i18n keys)
- Backend: ~0.5 day (request / response field surfacing; optional schema column if not yet present)
- QA: ~0.5 day (input validation, persistence round-trip, detail / edit mode, RTL)
- **Total: ~1.5 dev-days**

---

## Open questions / 待澄清

1. **⚠ Does Person Percentage feed the Overall Score / composite — and at what weight? PENDING CUSTOMER CONFIRMATION (Amir 2026-06-17).** Checked the customer materials: **neither the calculator (`Committee_KPI_Calculator.xlsx`) nor the PPTX (`KPI Template for committee calculation performance.pptx`) contains a "Person Percentage" component** — the documented per-member composite is **only Attendance 20% + Task 80% (= 100%)**. So Person Percentage's role in scoring is undefined in the customer model: it could (a) be **informational only** (captured, not scored — current default; Overall Score = Att×20% + Task×80% as-is), or (b) become a **new weighted component**, which would require re-balancing the 20/80 split. Confirm with the customer before any calculation-pipeline change. *(This determines whether the "empty → 0" rule in decision 6 has any score impact.)* / 计算器和 PPTX 里都没有 Person Percentage，文档化的成员综合分只有出勤 20% + 任务 80%；个人评分是否计入、占多少权重需客户确认，否则按"仅信息、不计分"。

2. ~~**Handling of empty values downstream.**~~ — **Resolved (Amir 2026-06-17):** an empty Person Percentage **counts as `0`** in that component of the composite score (NOT "ignored / re-normalised"). This is the intentional, more punitive behaviour — a manager who skips the field scores that member **0** for the Person-Percentage component, dragging their composite down rather than being neutral. Dev must implement "treat null/blank as 0", not "skip + re-normalise". See Locked decisions. / 已定（Amir 2026-06-17）：留空按 **0** 计入综合分（不是忽略/重新归一）。这是有意为之、更严格——经理不填，这名成员该项就是 0，会拉低综合分。开发须按"空值=0"实现，不要"跳过+重新归一"。

---

## Locked decisions / 已锁定决策

1. **Person Percentage is a manager-input (manual) field, non-mandatory.** Matches the existing data-model semantics — the field is already accepted by the backend as optional, and this PRD does not change that. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12. / 个人评分是经理手动填的、非必填，沿用现有数据模型的语义，本次不改其可选性。Eugene 于 2026-06-12 锁定。

2. **Sits alongside Attendance and On-Time Task Completion in the Member Evaluation form, as a peer column.** Position: to the right of Attendance. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12. / 在评估弹窗里作为第三列，与 Attendance / Task Completion 并列，位置在 Attendance 右侧。Eugene 于 2026-06-12 锁定。

3. **Attendance and On-Time Task Completion remain auto-calculated and read-only.** No behavior change to those two columns; their data sources (MoM and Actions) and rendering are untouched. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-12. / 出勤和任务完成保持自动计算、只读，数据源（MoM / Actions）和渲染方式都不动。Eugene 于 2026-06-12 锁定。

4. **Permission follows the existing Add/Edit Evaluation permission — no new permission.** Person Percentage is editable only by users who already have the evaluation edit permission (`committee::evaluation::edit`, `CommitteePermissionEnum.EvaluationEdit` — the same gate that controls the "Add Evaluation" button and the editable modal, see `Evaluation/index.tsx:45,106`). Users without it see the evaluation (and Person Percentage) in read-only detail mode, exactly as they do for the rest of the form. The field is just another input in the evaluation modal, so it inherits the modal's existing edit gate. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-15. / 个人评分的可编辑权限沿用现有的"添加/编辑评估"权限（committee::evaluation::edit），不新增权限；没有该权限的人只读查看。Eugene 于 2026-06-15 锁定。

5. **Visibility: shown on all committee teams' evaluation forms** (no per-team config toggle) — it is part of the standard evaluation template. Locked by Eugene on 2026-06-15. / 所有委员会团队的评估表都显示，不做团队级开关。

6. **Empty Person Percentage counts as `0` in the composite score** (not ignored / re-normalised). Skipping the field scores that member 0 for this component — intentionally punitive. Dev implements "treat null/blank as 0". Locked per Amir 2026-06-17. / 留空按 0 计入综合分（不忽略、不重新归一），有意从严；开发按"空值=0"实现。Amir 2026-06-17 锁定。

---

## Related PRDs / 相关 PRD

- R-447 — Committee KPI weight distribution (Individual 20% / Team 60% / Admin 20%) — Person Percentage feeds into the Individual KPI component / 个人评分归到 Individual KPI 那一块
- [R-580 Auto-Generate Individual KPIs per Member](./[R-580]-committee-team-auto-kpi-generation.md) — auto-creates the Attendance + Task Completion KPIs that this PRD's two read-only columns reflect / R-580 自动生成的两条 Individual KPI，正是本 PRD 中两个只读列的数据来源

content.content:
1	# [P2] R-583 — Committee Action: Manual Completion Date + Status Redesign / 委员会行动项：手动录入完成日期 + 状态体系重做
2	
3	| | |
4	|---|---|
5	| **Version** | V3.4 |
6	| **Source / 来源** | Customer feedback on R-457 (auto-logged completion date) + the status-visual redesign deferred from v3.3.1 (HF-007 / HF-008) / 客户对 R-457 自动记录完成日期的反馈 + v3.3.1 延期的状态视觉重做（HF-007 / HF-008） |
7	| **Priority** | P2 |
8	| **Created** | 2026-06-15 |
9	| **PM status** | `draft` |
10	| **Supersedes / 取代** | [R-457](../V3.3/[R-457]-action-complete-auto-log.md) — Action Complete auto-logged date (the auto-log behavior is replaced by manual input) |
11	| **Pulls in / 纳入** | HF-007 + HF-008 (consolidated status redesign deferred from v3.3.1 on 2026-06-07) |
12	
13	---
14	
15	## Overview / 总览
16	
17	> 简述：这份 PRD 把两件相关的事一起做。① 客户反馈：行动项点"完成"时，不要系统自动记今天的日期，而是让用户自己填完成日期 —— 因为有时候事情其实早就完成了，只是今天才来点"完成"。② 我们之前在 v3.3.1 设计过但没上线的状态体系重做（HF-007 + HF-008）：修延期状态的颜色、加"逾期(Overdue)"视觉、把"延期后完成"和"超期完成"统一成一个"Completed (late)"。这两件事天然绑在一起 —— 用户填的完成日期正好决定了一条行动项算不算"迟到完成(Completed late)"。
18	
19	This PRD combines two related changes to committee **action items** (Team Detail → Action Items):
20	
21	- **Part A — Manual completion date.** Today (per R-457) clicking Complete auto-stamps the server date. The customer wants the user to **enter the completion date themselves**, because an action may actually have been completed earlier than the day they click Complete.
22	- **Part B — Status redesign.** The action-item status visuals designed during v3.3.1 (HF-007 + HF-008) but deferred — fix the Postpone color, add an **Overdue** visual, and give late completions two distinct orange sub-types: **"Completed (overdue)"** (slipped past target, no postpone) and **"Completed (postponed)"** (postpone history).
23	
24	They ship together because they are interdependent: **the completion date the user enters in Part A is exactly the value that decides whether an action is "Completed (late)" in Part B** (completed date later than target date → late).
25	
26	---
27	
28	# Part A — Manual completion date / 手动录入完成日期
29	
30	## A. The problem / 问题
31	
32	> 简述：现在点"完成"，系统直接记今天为完成日期，而且不能改。但实际情况是：行动项可能上周就做完了，负责人这周才想起来点"完成"。这样系统记的完成日期就是错的，进而影响"是否按时完成"的判断和委员会评估。客户要求点"完成"时让用户自己填真实的完成日期。
33	
34	Per [R-457](../V3.3/[R-457]-action-complete-auto-log.md), clicking **Complete** on an action item auto-records the **server date** as the completion date, and locks it. In practice an action is often finished days earlier than the person gets around to clicking Complete — so the auto-stamped date is wrong, which then distorts the on-time/late judgment and the committee evaluation. The customer wants the user to **enter the real completion date** when completing.
35	
36	## A. Current behavior / 当前行为
37	
38	> 简述：点 Complete → 系统记今天（服务器日期）为完成日期，卡片上显示 "Completed on: DD/MM/YYYY"，不可编辑，完成是终态。
39	
40	- Clicking **Complete** on an action immediately stamps the **server date** as `completed_date`. No prompt, no input.
41	- The card shows `Completed on: DD/MM/YYYY` with that auto-date.
42	- The completion is terminal — no reopen, the date cannot be edited (per R-457).
43	
44	## A. Expected behavior / 期望行为
45	
46	> 简述：点 Complete → 弹一个小窗，让用户填"完成日期"，默认今天但可以改成更早的日期。确认后，这个用户填的日期就是 `completed_date`，卡片照常显示 "Completed on: DD/MM/YYYY"。完成日期不能晚于今天（不能填未来），也不能早于行动项的开始/创建日期。完成仍然是终态（不可重开，沿用 D-12）。
47	
48	- Clicking **Complete** opens a small **date-input popup** asking the user for the **Completion Date**.
49	- The field **defaults to today** but is **editable** — the user can set an earlier date reflecting when the work was actually finished.
50	- On confirm, the entered date becomes `completed_date`; the card shows `Completed on: DD/MM/YYYY` with that date (same card display as today).
51	- **Validation:**
52	  - Completion date **cannot be in the future** — the ceiling is **today**, checked against the system's current (server) date (D-7).
53	  - Completion date **cannot be earlier than the action's start / creation date** (no completing before it existed) (D-7).
54	- Completion remains **terminal** — no reopen (per locked decision D-12). The completion date is set once at completion time, **but an admin may later correct it** (admin-only, via the action edit flow, no reopen) (D-6).
55	
56	| Aspect / 方面 | Before (R-457) / 之前 | After (R-583) / 之后 |
57	|---|---|---|
58	| On Complete click / 点完成 | Auto-stamps server date, no input | Opens a popup to enter the Completion Date |
59	| Default value / 默认值 | n/a (server date) | Today (editable) |
60	| Can backdate? / 能否填更早的日期 | No | Yes — to the real completion date |
61	| Future date? / 未来日期 | n/a | Blocked (≤ today) |
62	| Card display / 卡片显示 | `Completed on: DD/MM/YYYY` (auto) | `Completed on: DD/MM/YYYY` (user-entered) |
63	
64	---
65	
66	# Part B — Status redesign (HF-007 + HF-008) / 状态体系重做
67	
68	## B. The problem / 问题
69	
70	> 简述：现在行动项的状态视觉有几个问题：① 延期(Postpone)的状态点是绿色，跟"完成"一样，看不出区别；② 没有"逾期(Overdue)"的视觉提示 —— 一条还没完成、但已经过了目标日期的行动项，看起来跟正常进行中的一样；③ "延期后完成" 和 "超期完成" 现在分别处理，口径不统一。客户希望状态一眼能看明白。
71	
72	The action-item status visuals have gaps:
73	1. The **Postpone** status dot is green (`#45AD5E`) — identical to Complete, so you can't tell them apart.
74	2. There is **no Overdue cue** — an unfinished action past its target date looks the same as a healthy in-progress one.
75	3. **Late completion** is handled inconsistently: "completed after postponement" and "completed past target without postponement" are treated differently. They should read the same to the user.
76	
77	This is the design that was worked out for v3.3.1 (HF-007 + HF-008) and deferred on 2026-06-07 to ship as one coherent change — which is now.
78	
79	## B. Current behavior / 当前行为
80	
81	| Stored status / 存储状态 | Dot / 状态点 | Label / 文字 |
82	|---|---|---|
83	| InProcess | blue `#3B92C0` | "In Process" |
84	| Postpone | **green `#45AD5E`** (bug — same as Complete) | "Postponed" |
85	| Complete (on time) | green `#45AD5E` | "Completed" |
86	| Complete (after postpone) | green / "Completed (postponed)" per v3.3.1 HF-002 | inconsistent with late-without-postpone |
87	| Any unfinished action past target date | no special cue — looks normal | (none) |
88	
89	## B. Expected behavior / 期望行为
90	
91	> 简述：最终状态视觉按下表来。Overdue 是"算出来的"视觉提示（目标日期 < 今天且未完成），不是新存的状态，所以不增加新的状态机、不加新按钮、不改权限。迟到完成**拆成两种**（都橙色、标签不同，Amir 2026-06-17 要求不要合并）：**"Completed (overdue)"**＝过了目标日期但没延期过；**"Completed (postponed)"**＝有延期记录（优先级更高，不管完成日期）。
92	
93	The final status visual table — this is the locked design from the v3.3.1 work:
94	
95	| Stored status / 存储状态 | Date check / 日期判断 | Dot / 状态点 | Label / 文字 |
96	|---|---|---|---|
97	| InProcess | target ≥ today | blue `#3B92C0` | "In Process" |
98	| InProcess | target < today | red `#F5626C` | **"Overdue"** |
99	| Postpone | new target ≥ today | orange `#F78956` | "Postponed" |
100	| Postpone | new target < today | red `#F5626C` | **"Overdue"** |
101	| Complete | completed ≤ target AND no postpone history | green `#45AD5E` | "Completed" |
102	| Complete | completed > target AND **no** postpone history | orange `#F78956` | **"Completed (overdue)"** |
103	| Complete | **has** postpone history (any completion date) | orange `#F78956` | **"Completed (postponed)"** |
104	
105	All states rendered as real action cards (mock):
106	
107	![R-583 status states](artifacts/screenshots/r583-status-cards.png)
108	
109	Key points:
110	- **Overdue is a derived visual only** — computed at render time from `target_date < today` on unfinished actions. No new stored status, no new state-machine transition, no new buttons, no new permissions. The operations available on an Overdue card are identical to those on its underlying stored status (InProcess or Postpone).
111	- **Late completion splits into TWO sub-types** (both orange `#F78956`, distinct labels — per Amir 2026-06-17, do *not* collapse into one "late"):
112	  - **"Completed (overdue)"** — completed **after** the target date with **no** postpone history (the action just slipped).
113	  - **"Completed (postponed)"** — completed when a **postpone history exists** (officially deferred, then completed). Postpone history takes precedence: any postpone → "Completed (postponed)", regardless of the completion date.
114	  - In both, the `Completed on:` date renders in orange.
115	- The **Postpone** (in-progress) dot color is corrected from green to **orange `#F78956`** (distinct from Complete's green).
116	
117	### How Part A feeds Part B / A 部分如何驱动 B 部分
118	
119	The user-entered completion date from Part A is the `completed_date` used in the completion-status check: with **no postpone history**, backdating to on-or-before the target shows green **"Completed"**, while a date after the target shows orange **"Completed (overdue)"**. If a **postpone history exists**, it shows orange **"Completed (postponed)"** regardless of the entered date. So entering the true completion date can legitimately turn what would have looked overdue (if today's date were auto-stamped) into an on-time green "Completed" — which is exactly the customer's point.
120	
121	---
122	
123	## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准
124	
125	| # | Criterion / 验收项 | Part | Priority |
126	|---|---|---|---|
127	| 1 | Clicking Complete on an action opens a popup to enter the Completion Date; it does NOT auto-stamp and close | A | P0 |
128	| 2 | The Completion Date field defaults to today and is editable to an earlier date | A | P0 |
129	| 3 | The Completion Date cannot be set in the future (> today is rejected) | A | P0 |
130	| 4 | The Completion Date cannot be earlier than the action's start / creation date | A | P1 |
131	| 5 | On confirm, the entered date is stored as the completion date and shown on the card as `Completed on: DD/MM/YYYY` | A | P0 |
132	| 6 | Completion remains terminal — no reopen (D-12 unchanged) | A | P0 |
133	| 6b | An admin can correct the completion date after completion (admin-only, via the action edit flow, no reopen) | A | P1 |
134	| 7 | The Postpone status dot renders orange `#F78956` (not green), distinct from Complete | B | P0 |
135	| 8 | An unfinished action (InProcess or Postpone) whose target date is in the past renders red `#F5626C` with an "Overdue" label | B | P0 |
136	| 9 | Overdue is a derived visual only — no new stored status, no new buttons, and the available operations on an Overdue card match its underlying stored status | B | P0 |
137	| 10 | A completed action renders green "Completed" only when completed-date ≤ target AND there is no postpone history | B | P0 |
138	| 11 | A completed action with **no postpone history** but completed-date > target renders orange **"Completed (overdue)"**; the `Completed on:` date is shown in orange | B | P0 |
139	| 11b | A completed action with **any postpone history** renders orange **"Completed (postponed)"** regardless of the completion date; the `Completed on:` date is shown in orange | B | P0 |
140	| 12 | The completion date entered in Part A drives the Part B status (no postpone: ≤ target → green "Completed", > target → "Completed (overdue)"; postpone history → "Completed (postponed)") | A+B | P0 |
141	| 13 | Postponed actions still count as overdue / not-on-time in committee evaluation (consistent with R-456 §AC) | B | P0 |
142	| 14 | EN and AR both render correctly for the new popup, the "Overdue" label, and the "Completed (overdue)" / "Completed (postponed)" labels | A+B | P0 |
143	
144	---
145	
146	## QA test scenario / QA 测试场景
147	
148	| Setup / 前置 | Steps / 步骤 | Expected / 期望 |
149	|---|---|---|
150	| A committee team with action items: one InProcess with a future target, one InProcess with a past target, one Postponed with a future new-target, one Postponed with a past new-target. | 1. Click Complete on the future-target InProcess action → confirm a Completion Date popup appears, defaulting to today. 2. Try to set a future date → rejected. 3. Set a date on-or-before the target, confirm → card shows green "Completed" with the entered date. 4. Complete another action (no postpone) and set the date AFTER its target → card shows orange "Completed (overdue)". 5. Observe the past-target InProcess action (not completed) → red dot + "Overdue". 6. Observe the future-target Postponed action → orange dot + "Postponed". 7. Observe the past-target Postponed action → red + "Overdue". 8. Complete a previously-postponed action with any date → orange "Completed (postponed)" (postpone history takes precedence). 9. Confirm no Reopen option appears on any completed card. 10. Switch UI to Arabic and re-check the popup, "Overdue", "Completed (overdue)", and "Completed (postponed)" labels. | Step 1: popup opens, default today. Step 2: future date blocked. Step 3: green "Completed", date = entered. Step 4: orange "Completed (overdue)". Step 5: red "Overdue". Step 6: orange "Postponed". Step 7: red "Overdue". Step 8: orange "Completed (postponed)". Step 9: no reopen. Step 10: Arabic renders correctly. |
151	
152	---
153	
154	## Proposed technical solution
155	
156	> English-only section. PM does not need to review beyond this point.
157	
158	### Frontend
159	
160	All work concentrates in [`frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/ActionColumn/index.tsx`](../../../frontend/src/pages/Committee/Teams/TeamsDetail/components/ActionColumn/index.tsx).
161	
162	**Part A — manual completion date:**
163	1. Replace the current Complete handler (which auto-stamps the server date) with one that opens a small date-picker modal/popover. Default the picker to today; `disabledDate` blocks `> today` and `< action.startDate`.
164	2. On confirm, send the chosen date as `completed_date` to the existing complete endpoint (the endpoint already stores a completion date — now it comes from the user instead of the server clock).
165	
166	**Part B — status redesign** (the v3.3.1 mock is recoverable from local git history per the deferral note — reuse it):
167	1. `getActionStatusClass(status, action)` — branch as per the final visual table. Use helpers `parseTeamDate`, `isOverdueOnFly`, `isLateCompletion`, `getCompletedDisplay`, `getActiveStatusLabel` (these existed in the v3.3.1 mock).
168	2. Postpone dot → orange `#F78956`.
169	3. Overdue → derived at render from `target_date < today` for InProcess/Postpone; red `#F5626C` + "Overdue" label. No stored-status change.
170	4. Late completion → orange, split two ways: if `postponeFlag` set → **"Completed (postponed)"** (takes precedence, any date); else if `completed_date > target_date` → **"Completed (overdue)"**; render the `Completed on:` date in orange in both.
171	5. Locale: add/confirm `Overdue`, `Completed (overdue)`, and `Completed (postponed)` keys in EN + AR committee locale files. (The v3.3.1 `Completed (postponed)` key is kept; a new `Completed (overdue)` key is added.)
172	
173	### Backend
174	
175	- The complete endpoint must accept a client-supplied `completed_date` (instead of stamping `now()`), with server-side validation: `completed_date ≤ today` and `≥ action.start_date`. Reject otherwise.
176	- No status-enum change for Overdue (derived on the frontend). Confirm the committee-evaluation late/on-time calculation uses the stored `completed_date` vs `target_date` (it already does per R-456) so backdating flows through correctly.
177	
178	### Database
179	
180	No schema change — `completed_date` already exists; it is now user-supplied rather than server-stamped.
181	
182	### Effort estimate
183	
184	- Frontend: ~1.5 days (completion-date popup + status visual redesign — partly recoverable from v3.3.1 mock)
185	- Backend: ~0.5 day (accept + validate client completion date)
186	- QA: ~1 day
187	- **Total: ~3 dev-days**
188	
189	---
190	
191	## Open questions / 待澄清
192	
193	> All resolved with Eugene 2026-06-16 — see Locked decisions D-6, D-7, D-8.
194	
195	1. ~~Editing the completion date after completion~~ — **Resolved:** admin **can correct** the completion date after completion (admin-only, via the action edit flow, no reopen). See D-6.
196	2. ~~Lower bound for the completion date~~ — **Resolved:** floor = the action's **start / creation date**; ceiling = **today** (the system's current/server date). See D-7.
197	3. ~~"Completed (late)" when backdated on-time but postponed~~ — **Resolved (updated Amir 2026-06-17):** any postpone history forces **"Completed (postponed)"** (orange) regardless of the entered date, taking precedence over the overdue check (matches R-456 "postponed counts as not-on-time"). See D-8.
198	
199	---
200	
201	## Locked decisions / 已锁定决策 (carried from the v3.3.1 design, 2026-06-07)
202	
203	1. **D-12 — Complete is terminal.** No reopen / un-complete. Carried. 2026-06-07.
204	2. **Overdue is a derived visual only** — no new stored status, no new state-machine transition, no new buttons, no new permissions. Carried. 2026-06-07.
205	3. ~~**"Completed (late)" consolidation**~~ — **Superseded by Amir 2026-06-17:** do NOT collapse into one "late". Split into two orange sub-types — **"Completed (overdue)"** (past target, no postpone) and **"Completed (postponed)"** (has postpone history). Both orange `#F78956`, distinct labels.
206	4. **Postpone dot color = orange `#F78956`** (corrected from green). Carried. 2026-06-07.
207	5. **Manual completion date replaces R-457 auto-log** — user enters the date on Complete; default today, backdating allowed, no future dates. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-15.
208	6. **D-6 — Admin can correct the completion date after completion** — admin-only edit via the existing action edit flow, without reopening the action (completion stays terminal). Locked by Eugene 2026-06-16.
209	7. **D-7 — Completion-date bounds** — floor = the action's **start / creation date**; ceiling = **today**, checked against the system's current (server) date. Locked by Eugene 2026-06-16.
210	8. **D-8 — Postpone history forces "Completed (postponed)"** — any postpone history makes a completed action **"Completed (postponed)"** (orange) regardless of the entered completion date, taking precedence over the overdue check (consistent with R-456). Updated per Amir 2026-06-17 (was "Completed (late)").
211	
212	---
213	
214	## Related PRDs / 相关 PRD

217	- [R-456 Action Postpone — Target Date + Reason + History](../V3.3/[R-456]-action-postpone-history.md) — postpone history is one trigger for "Completed (late)"; evaluation late/on-time rule
